subject: Not the most fun part of the job…

body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg2RZFiiwTDS5Qe-wKPLOaqz3wBjQ2RxioBX7MridnrHqXz2Y3bUxYrZcDG6RI5DTb_vQO4zlI0wXMlf88JQ0iCyszQefPNXrZkZXcqvU0j_Q-xb-C-tbb9TOqsKYu8Ff8q8JLR0UFiEposSPDj-4lFHWz3lnSaq8di1jv5B25i-Q/3uu/XOFNbXgbRBywudWh5QtJ_Q/h0/jLsDeTQUirsFPxjeuYerQ9wbfgUWa7Hsu2ehGEC6Lk4) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.

**Folks, we have to be honest.
**
Pestering you with fundraising emails this early in an election cycle is not fun.

We know there are plenty of other things you’d like to read than a fundraising plea.

Congressman Ruiz knows this – reaching out like this to ask you to donate is never his favorite thing to do. And it’s honestly a struggle to convey the sense of urgency that gets hard-working folks like you to click donate in March of a non-election year.

**But the unfortunate truth is that if we don’t stay on track with our fundraising targets, even this far out from Election Day, we’ll find ourselves in the House Minority once again.
**
[**So before we explain a little more about what your donation today will mean, can we count on you to chip in just $5 right now and boost our efforts to retake the House Majority? »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad1UPDKtbU9VdBnKa54UyDTE9qSPD6r46--IyW2nb-dkLhGoyKoZ1iyAHORqHTQtlqmHzd7CrxixJ5DnRqLSYeQoZh_HOk6fDON1QLHZJ7xNDKD1u4h0IWamVOE1o6BDiBx89cql9yeEYQ2HG95-TaFyT9GGy2ChqQ2p3jH15x6hwvKlkvj01s6YGwmjizaVBCbZm9wjJp3H_C14IZalav9fFx2vUOcHBrnpJURfI6SGpmWXHjXvcrwMXAkGw1utUFgfwZ-lNQD-1Z_daZGxQKKmC4V4ZJBfJtM20KsTXJ-tgFdBMcMKMSutlR2mz2h3qLVScQeDGv6yDqmMK949ffUIygmcVBwpzh8xLnUMOXJ3ZoRgdnPs8zDGXvtTrtA_Z5g/3uu/XOFNbXgbRBywudWh5QtJ_Q/h2/IYCnQqtP47F_iwJzKbtSB9aYbJtlgpLcnLiGYMXKx9I) | [CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad1UPDKtbU9VdBnKa54UyDTE9qSPD6r46--IyW2nb-dkLhGoyKoZ1iyAHORqHTQtlqmHzd7CrxixJ5DnRqLSYeQoZh_HOk6fDON1QLHZJ7xNDCVL-t2vCq-Lu7xHR-lWxZzJXbJstwLY8qLX9L0OzAeiax9YLwE1G6CvX7DfZX8NoZhB9svZiw6wDIwPobQDYKUrpV1BJVPqK8UDiulezh4laHrsNTjL1-8fxPHyL02KMfpGqkLCW2-ccGdbeGUkniwked__1PLKeskqsmLOtiSZX3Fzo731DJrGCsfM8_1NxMUgy7S9IpWnLYeZhJwtqwoARPFERK6zzfBSWV4fUwf--13A_TWW6aO0kE_RpX2NiWFlxudRzgISyPhBfi-JqaA/3uu/XOFNbXgbRBywudWh5QtJ_Q/h3/8gNG6GnsJeQSstS5fTRti8d6w9N3IY4EmnrkqUEMCHQ)

If there’s anyone to blame for fundraising emails like this one, it’s the conservative justices of the Supreme Court who opened the floodgates on campaign finance, effectively allowing unlimited campaign contributions in the now infamous _Citizens United_ case.

Because of that ruling, individual House races will routinely cost upwards of five million dollars.

**This means conservatively speaking, our campaign has to raise about $100,000 each month to stay competitive with our GOP opponents.
**
Now look, team, our Democratic caucus is working tirelessly to rewrite our campaign finance laws so that the rich and powerful don’t decide elections in smoke-filled backrooms.

**But we can’t do that when dark money Republicans run the show in Washington.** So we need to get to work now and do everything we can to flip the House, and usher in a new era with less dark money influence, and fewer anxiety-inducing campaign emails.

[**And we know it’s ironic to now ask you to chip in a few bucks, but our grassroots supporters are the strongest weapon we have in the fight against dark-money GOP mega-donors, so we’re asking for you to step up. »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad1UPDKtbU9VdBnKa54UyDTE9qSPD6r46--IyW2nb-dkLhGoyKoZ1iyAHORqHTQtlqmHzd7CrxixJ5DnRqLSYeQoZh_HOk6fDON1QLHZJ7xNDluYWJdTwM4QndQ9LhL5-iQ3NelIMduAh3IQlw8PZR8rPw-oaVyPU5v-CJukKop4lpIHBemjASaCz7oJMX8TSQw6N-o5dC8KN5yqq2EEHYHSgvOrixdTuwp8x3HVXCD7JmtSVSd7ifzk2vORnt8D9-_K3NTTXLFHe24sA0DIZJd0wKbXFxF1K0FR2kNsbX6rYxw1QST3jcJsUGl-iJjv0H4-v2suxxesLVZjaCgBvj-jBysqqhReLAJpFeiR7rsKoTtj-MZo4ntIrCXaF7CpH8A/3uu/XOFNbXgbRBywudWh5QtJ_Q/h4/IpDs7mLpgmAR7VZI_FGnpeCPvUQua9PcvFF_2qaJD_I)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I can explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2000%2E5257348%2Ei7X0Tx ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — can I explain what this FEC deadline in five days means
to our campaign?

On March 31, we’re facing our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline
since launching this campaign for Senate. It’s critical our campaign can
show that we have a strong, grassroots team behind us, and here’s why:

Republicans have gone all-in to attack me from the minute I announced my
campaign.

It actually started right before that: Mere hours before I launched my
campaign, Kevin McCarthy made good on his threat to remove me from the
Intelligence Committee unilaterally.

He even doubled down on his attacks against me in a recent speech to GOP
activists, saying I “should never become senator for California.”

Donald Trump is attacking me relentlessly.

Tucker Carlson and the entire Fox News machine would like nothing better
than to see me lose.

The Republican Party has put its full weight into keeping me from serving
Californians.

And they are prepared to pile on if we fall short of this month's goal.
After our fundraising is released to the public, they will comb through
every single statistic to see any sign of vulnerability. Everything from
how much we’ve raised to the number of grassroots donors who’ve joined our
campaign thus far.

That’s why I need your help to present the strongest possible report to
the Federal Election Commission on March 31.

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek — can I explain what this FEC deadline in five days means to our campaign? On March 31, we’re facing our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline since launching this campaign for Senate. It’s critical our campaign can show that we have a strong, grassroots team behind us, and here’s why: Republicans have gone all-in to attack me from the minute I announced my campaign. It actually started right before that: Mere hours before I launched my campaign, Kevin McCarthy made good on his threat to remove me from the Intelligence Committee unilaterally. He even doubled down on his attacks against me in a recent speech to GOP activists, saying I “should never become senator for California.” Donald Trump is attacking me relentlessly. Tucker Carlson and the entire Fox News machine would like nothing better than to see me lose. The Republican Party has put its full weight into keeping me from serving Californians. And they are prepared to pile on if we fall short of this month's goal. After our fundraising is released to the public, they will comb through every single statistic to see any sign of vulnerability. Everything from how much we’ve raised to the number of grassroots donors who’ve joined our campaign thus far. That’s why I need your help to present the strongest possible report to the Federal Election Commission on March 31. [ ]With our FEC deadline just five days away, can you make a donation to my campaign today? I don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so your gift — even $3 — will go a long way to help us reach every Californian. Legislative Update for Week Ending March 25, 2003
This update will cover the last two weeks. Due to the SCC election in Gering last weekend we were unable to produce last week’s edition. Let’s get started. Pro-LIfe Last week an amendment was brought forward to change the original language from 6 weeks (approximately when a heartbeat begins) to 12 weeks. This proposal created an emotional episode at the Capitol as well as within the party. Collaborative discussion between Senators addressed concerns to get this bill back on track. Meanwhile, at the SCC convention, a resolution that was already in the works to affirm the heartbeat bill was amended and passed by an overwhelming support of the body. The amendment offered and affirmed that the SCC governing body did not support an extension of the time frame of the bill beyond the terms written in the original bill. Kids Take Center Stage This week saw the Capitol overrun with people as the Unicameral took action on the Let Them Grow Act (LB 574). In addition, committee hearings were held on banning access to porn in schools by installing filters and prohibiting involvement of children with Drag shows. Good news...we advanced LB 574 to Select file! Changing one’s sex is not “Gender Affirming” or “Healthcare” (as Wyoming just redefined). Gender affirming is preserving one’s sex before one is an adult and healthcare is not taking actions to put aspects of your health at risk. Don’t buy into the progressive media’s redefinition of words for the benefit of their handlers. The GOP is committed to protecting our children and the legal precedents that children will not be considered the same as adults for very solid and logical reasons. As usual, the Democrats define everything as hate. The 2023 Republican will not be deterred by this claim made at every hour of the day by the Filibuster Party. As a sarcastic contrast we would expect the opponents of these bills to bring ridiculous legislation forward to make...it legal for children to drink...be prosecuted the same as adults...lowering the age to be drafted to war...giving them the option to not go to school...and many more decisions that adults make in our society. The arguments are absurd, inaccurate, and most importantly inappropriate. The visuals and the discussions being had on the floor were downright embarrassing. One teacher wisely removed her class from listening to the offensive discussions in the pews in the balcony. There is no hate. There are just wise decisions being made for children before they are of age to make complete rational decisions for themselves. Strong efforts were made by the party and elected officials to preserve LB 574 from last week to advancing it on Thursday. There is plenty of work yet to be done for complete passage. Finally, the GOP passed a Parental Bill of Rights in DC. Unfortunately, the Parental Bill of Rights is struggling in Nebraska. The DC bill seeks to restore parental power over their kids and not the school. Budget review, rights to speak, and curriculum review were all in the bill. We need parental rights preserved at a national and state level that are defined in detail to prevent future redefining of words.
Winner Take All Senator Loren Lippincott introduced a bill to make Nebraska match most other states in regards to the Electoral College. The winner of the state would take all electoral college votes and would no longer be split. The committee has yet to act on that bill. More Educational Outrage in Omaha This letter shed light on the actions the Papillion board was taking against parents by teaching their methods to suppress parental concerns at a National Conference in Orlando. This week the controversy is at Omaha Westside. Undercover reporters exposed the plans to continue SEL and CRT lessons by using new words such as “Belonging” to teach the same concepts. We need CRT/Racism out of our schools. [https://youtu.be/R62bFu_jSXg](https://www.ne.gop/so/a3OSWUHLS/c?w=VBr438DTOZtvN0b54H1qaB0BnSnfxK5cpXvDVAvMnjY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9SNjJiRnVfalNYZyIsInIiOiJhNmViODU0Ny04NzZiLTQ1ZWItYzU1OC03M2ViMDg2ZGM5ZWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ) Statements were also made that they had large banking families and the Chamber’s influence down at the Unicameral to get their way. We have not validated those statements, but are concerned about other groups doing the bidding of these boards as stated by this administrator. Republicans should continue as a unified party to emphasize school boards at all levels. Parents, not school boards, should dictate the education of their kids. The NEGOP will continue to listen to the parents in schooling of their children and will not put the interests of the powerful ahead of what is right. Finally, we remain concerned about education on the whole. The legislative research office reported an English proficiency rate of 28% and a math proficiency rate of 20% for Omaha Public Schools. The ACT scores of under 16 and an English ACT score of less than 14 was alarming for a district spending over $700 million and has the resources for a student to teacher ratio of 15. It is apparent education needs serious work in our largest city, yet we find these similar statistics occurring in rural communities as well. Republicans need to continue to seek change for the benefit of Nebraska's children. New ideas need to be addressed and new leaders need to be found to change the trajectory of outcomes that affirms equality not equity, a focus on improved performance, and a respect for values being taught at home...as opposed to radical ideology being spread by schools. The NEGOP
The NEGOP held their Constitutionally required, biannual leadership elections in Gering last weekend. The weather was perfect and we thank the hosts and volunteers who made the warm welcome to CD3. Chairman Eric Underwood was unanimously reelected by the SCC. Each of the Congressional districts held their leadership elections. There were changes in various leadership roles for all three districts. We are grateful for the contributions of our past and current leaders to make this party stronger. Thank you! The party elected a new Treasurer in Dave Plond (Grand Island) who urged the need for financial support. Donate and support these efforts! Thank you to outgoing Treasurer Mike Kennedy of Omaha for all your leadership and guidance over the past eight months. Resolutions were brought forward and voted on. The support for EPIC tax was reaffirmed, a call to free those still in custody from January 6th was affirmed, the Heartbeat bill was officially supported and an amendment was brought affirming that the party did not support extending the number of weeks in the Heartbeat bill. Gracious sponsorship came from Congressman Adrian Smith for the Booster Social on Friday night. Attorney General Mike Hilgers sponsored breakfast and spoke of the many legal battles he and his office are fighting at the National level for Nebraskans. Senator Brian Hardin of LD 48 welcomed everyone to the Panhandle and both Senator Hardin and Senator Steve Erdman gave speeches on Unicameral updates. Lunchtime speakers were Public Service Commissioner Kevin Stocker, State Board of Education member Elizabeth Tegtmeier, and UNL Board of Regents Kathy Wilmot who all provided updates on their respective offices. Rod Edwards spoke for Charles W. Herbster of Conklin who sponsored lunch and yummy desserts. Political Director Todd Watson and Legislative Director Will Feely, gave updates on the Legislative Plan as passed by the body and a preview of issues that will have an effect on the 2024 election cycle. Rules of the Unicameral; Productivity As we discussed in previous editions and was addressed in the SCC-adopted Legislative Plan, the Rules of the Unicameral can dictate the efficiency and productivity of the session. Currently, ZERO bills have made it through Select File to be presented to Governor Pillen. It is indicated that there will be an amendment to the Unicameral rules debated on Tuesday in the hope to make this session more productive. There are different opinions amongst the body of what needs to be changed in the rules. We look forward to seeing where the consensus lands on Tuesday when they reconvene. These changes could have a dramatic effect on the trajectory of this session. Without doing something, the productivity of this session is severely limited based on the liberal leadership of the Filibuster Party. Please pray for the updated rules to be passed so this can be a productive session for Nebraska. Taxes Tax packages continue to move forward on property tax relief. LB 243 moved out of Committee. Senator Briese’s bill will increase property tax relief from $315 to $388 billion in 2024 and eventually $560 million by 2029.
LB 589 advanced and seeks to cap School spending at 3% a year (unless an override by 75% of the school board occurs). The state also advanced removing community college taxes to the state and off the property tax rolls. Finally, Senator Riepe introduced his Constitutional Amendment to repeal the Inheritance Tax. The Republican Party Platform supports this measure and lets Nebraskans decide if we should continue this tax only 5 states deploy. Election Security The media, Senators, and everyone opposed to Voter ID are doing their best to water down election security in this cycle. Regardless, we continue to hear key bills on securing the election. If there is one issue of consensus that separates the people and the legislature...it is Election Accountability and Voter Verification. The NEGOP will continue to represent the Platform, the Legislative Plan, and express the will of the people to seek strong security measures in our elections. The government committee continues to hear bills on machines being made in America, secure ballots with watermarks, and third party audits of the work of the Secretary of State with many noting that our elections lack third party verification outside of that office. However, as the progress of this session slows, the focus continues to shift to the Voter ID bill in a limited action environment. Republicans and the 65% who voted last year for a Photo Voter ID law should be concerned about the final version of that bill. The Legislative Committee volunteers have invested thousands of hours into those bills that have suddenly gone dark. The NEGOP stands behind the collaborative work in Senator Erdman’s ID bill. This bill reflects the true will of the people who have given a voice at our meetings and it is designed in a manner to create a secure, fair, and a Constitutionally honored outcome (validate the ID upon receipt of the ballot). The Constitutional Amendment MUST BE OBSERVED and that means a verification of the ID for every ballot WHEN TURNED IN. We anticipate a new ID bill from Senator Slama to be released soon with new language. Stay tuned.... Water Water resources has been in many conversations and pieces of legislation. Bills from around the state are seeking to address nitrates, expand capacity, build lines from the Missouri into Lincoln, and address the Perkins canal. Although most of the bills don’t really relate from one to another, it is clear that Nebraskans have different concerns on water for different reasons in different areas of the state. Our Political Plan for 2023-24 will put a greater focus on NRD boards. I’m seeking a volunteer political advisor that will be solely focused on these important races around the state. It is imperative our Republican county chairs are briefed on the important people running these races. Furthermore, I’m calling on the citizens to start paying more attention to these critical races. Water is a big concern for different reasons to all Nebraskans. Water is critical to life. We will be seeking more information and focus to ensure our natural resources remain in a good place for all of Nebraska.
2nd Amendment We are anticipating the vote for Constitutional Carry to be on Tuesday this week. The NRA will be providing a lunch at the NEGOP headquarters at 1610 N St. in Lincoln before the floor vote. Lunch will start at 11:30. Come join other freedom loving Americans before the vote for a bite to eat! A Caution on Spending In the coming weeks the NEGOP will be taking a look at all the new spending proposals coming from both parties. There IS merit to some new spending to solve critical problems. However, the fiscal footnotes continue to show a little here, a little there, a lot here, a lot there, and boom you have a new level of government spending. Our platform for Republicans is clear we are for lower taxes and fiscal responsibility. Lower taxes can only occur with lower spending. The Governor has been clear that he wants to scrub every dollar for efficiency. We agree with that assessment. The state is blessed with a large surplus. However, we believe that surplus belongs to the people. We are encouraging our Senators to look at the “Whole” of new spending and see where cuts can be made and ask if we really need this expenditure or if that increase to an existing program is wise. Lower spending enables lower taxes. Psychologically, we know more money in the wallet creates loose spending. We need to overcome that psychology and take a hard look at the new proposals. "Do we really need this?", should be the primary question. We need to remain diligent on spending so that we can lower tax rates and be competitive in the region for the long haul. Banking Problems The economic world was stunned when two of the largest banks collapsed. The response by Biden and the Federal Reserve has damaged the future trajectory of the banks that support Nebraska. The actions of the Federal Reserve backstopped all the deposits of customers over 250k of those large banks in large urban hubs. 250k is the amount insured by the FDIC. They elected to supersede those limits. Meanwhile, Senator Lankford of Oklahoma grilled Yellen that it was unfair that a smaller bank was not bailed out and was allowed to fail by the Federal Reserve. This action continues to show the favoritism and Inequality Under the Law practiced by our government. The decision communicated to the market that your deposits are safe at the large institutions (Class Shareholders of the Fed typically) and not safe at the smaller banks. This message being communicated is having depositors question where they will bank their deposits “To Be Safe”. A reduction of deposits to smaller banks will hurt our local institutions and economy. It is these smaller banks that are the bedrock of Nebraska communities from loans to the sponsorships of Little League Teams. It is imperative that our federal delegation restore Equality Before the Law for the sake of our local banks that make our local communities run. Big banks winning and small banks losing just show how out of touch the Fed and this President is with rural America and bedrock concepts of Equality Before the Law. Meanwhile, the Central Bank continues to push through laws in every state of the land. Controversy developed when Governor Noem put a stop to the bill in South Dakota that yielded the power of the people and currencies of their choice (not subject to the printing press) to Central Bank control. You can watch that video here. *[LB 94](https://www.ne.gop/so/a3OSWUHLS/c?w=Fdaj_dgsUjS64aTNDZ--Ogl2obZ8gxbotXyvr6lEvR0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk4MzYiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) carried by Senator Slama is the Nebraska version of the bill Governor Noem vetoed. Senator Slama promised to look into every line of that bill after the controversy took hold in Nebraska. The NEGOP supports equality before the law and a return of understanding of the Constitution as stated in Article I, Section 8, Clause 5. Monetary policy that has drifted from Constitutional understanding is having dramatic consequences. We encourage our Federal Delegation to fight for the interests of equality in all banking and the freedom of the people to choose currencies not manipulated by the printing press since the Congress has relegated its power to the Federal Reserve. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WVfRzWlmiXg](https://www.ne.gop/so/a3OSWUHLS/c?w=BQYOtaJUYmAHF9ALOZ3igJhjuDyvrC8IM64W51zKN-Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1XVmZSeldsbWlYZyIsInIiOiJhNmViODU0Ny04NzZiLTQ1ZWItYzU1OC03M2ViMDg2ZGM5ZWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ) Special Acknowledgment The NEGOP wishes to recognize Senator Ray Aguilar and Senator Mike Jacobsen for their votes. Senator Aguilar showed true grit and determination as he was brought into the chamber in a wheelchair with severe discomfort due to knee surgery. Even in pain, he cast a critical vote this week. In a culture where we hear complaints of how it should be made easier to vote...we saw the duty and the value of having the right to vote, by Senator Aguilar, who endured to push the button. Absolutely amazing. Senator Jacobsen faced a stiff fine for not being at an important banking governance meeting so he could be here to vote. To subject himself to a personal fine to stand for the kids of Nebraska does not go unnoticed. The sacrifices for kids and principles is inspiring. Despite the chaos the media wants you to see, we found the moments that really inspire and show our true values. We don’t see hate. We see a love of kids, and people willing to pay a price for their long term interests at the Unicameral this week. Until Next Week... Todd WatsonNEGOP Political Director political@ne.gop

That correction has been made and the right bill number is linked below. | | 108th Legislative Session"2ND HOUSE ALERT/WEEKLY UPDATE"March 26, 2023 | | | | | | | | | | Get Our Second House Alerts | | | | | | | Legislative Update for Week Ending March 25, 2003 This update will cover the last two weeks. Due to the SCC election in Gering last weekend we were unable to produce last week’s edition. Let’s get started. Pro-LIfe Last week an amendment was brought forward to change the original language from 6 weeks (approximately when a heartbeat begins) to 12 weeks. This proposal created an emotional episode at the Capitol as well as within the party. Collaborative discussion between Senators addressed concerns to get this bill back on track. Meanwhile, at the SCC convention, a resolution that was already in the works to affirm the heartbeat bill was amended and passed by an overwhelming support of the body. The amendment offered and affirmed that the SCC governing body did not support an extension of the time frame of the bill beyond the terms written in the original bill. Kids Take Center Stage This week saw the Capitol overrun with people as the Unicameral took action on the Let Them Grow Act (LB 574). In addition, committee hearings were held on banning access to porn in schools by installing filters and prohibiting involvement of children with Drag shows. Good news...we advanced LB 574 to Select file! Changing one’s sex is not “Gender Affirming” or “Healthcare” (as Wyoming just redefined). Gender affirming is preserving one’s sex before one is an adult and healthcare is not taking actions to put aspects of your health at risk. Don’t buy into the progressive media’s redefinition of words for the benefit of their handlers. The GOP is committed to protecting our children and the legal precedents that children will not be considered the same as adults for very solid and logical reasons. As usual, the Democrats define everything as hate. The 2023 Republican will not be deterred by this claim made at every hour of the day by the Filibuster Party. As a sarcastic contrast we would expect the opponents of these bills to bring ridiculous legislation forward to make...it legal for children to drink...be prosecuted the same as adults...lowering the age to be drafted to war...giving them the option to not go to school...and many more decisions that adults make in our society. The arguments are absurd, inaccurate, and most importantly inappropriate. The visuals and the discussions being had on the floor were downright embarrassing. One teacher wisely removed her class from listening to the offensive discussions in the pews in the balcony. There is no hate. There are just wise decisions being made for children before they are of age to make complete rational decisions for themselves. Strong efforts were made by the party and elected officials to preserve LB 574 from last week to advancing it on Thursday. There is plenty of work yet to be done for complete passage. Finally, the GOP passed a Parental Bill of Rights in DC. Unfortunately, the Parental Bill of Rights is struggling in Nebraska. The DC bill seeks to restore parental power over their kids and not the school. Budget review, rights to speak, and curriculum review were all in the bill. We need parental rights preserved at a national and state level that are defined in detail to prevent future redefining of words. Winner Take All Senator Loren Lippincott introduced a bill to make Nebraska match most other states in regards to the Electoral College. The winner of the state would take all electoral college votes and would no longer be split. The committee has yet to act on that bill. More Educational Outrage in Omaha This letter shed light on the actions the Papillion board was taking against parents by teaching their methods to suppress parental concerns at a National Conference in Orlando. This week the controversy is at Omaha Westside. Undercover reporters exposed the plans to continue SEL and CRT lessons by using new words such as “Belonging” to teach the same concepts. We need CRT/Racism out of our schools. Statements were also made that they had large banking families and the Chamber’s influence down at the Unicameral to get their way. We have not validated those statements, but are concerned about other groups doing the bidding of these boards as stated by this administrator. Republicans should continue as a unified party to emphasize school boards at all levels. Parents, not school boards, should dictate the education of their kids. The NEGOP will continue to listen to the parents in schooling of their children and will not put the interests of the powerful ahead of what is right. Finally, we remain concerned about education on the whole. The legislative research office reported an English proficiency rate of 28% and a math proficiency rate of 20% for Omaha Public Schools. The ACT scores of under 16 and an English ACT score of less than 14 was alarming for a district spending over $700 million and has the resources for a student to teacher ratio of 15. It is apparent education needs serious work in our largest city, yet we find these similar statistics occurring in rural communities as well. Republicans need to continue to seek change for the benefit of Nebraska's children. New ideas need to be addressed and new leaders need to be found to change the trajectory of outcomes that affirms equality not equity, a focus on improved performance, and a respect for values being taught at home...as opposed to radical ideology being spread by schools. The NEGOP The NEGOP held their Constitutionally required, biannual leadership elections in Gering last weekend. The weather was perfect and we thank the hosts and volunteers who made the warm welcome to CD3. Chairman Eric Underwood was unanimously reelected by the SCC. Each of the Congressional districts held their leadership elections. There were changes in various leadership roles for all three districts. We are grateful for the contributions of our past and current leaders to make this party stronger. Thank you! The party elected a new Treasurer in Dave Plond (Grand Island) who urged the need for financial support. Donate and support these efforts! Thank you to outgoing Treasurer Mike Kennedy of Omaha for all your leadership and guidance over the past eight months. Resolutions were brought forward and voted on. The support for EPIC tax was reaffirmed, a call to free those still in custody from January 6th was affirmed, the Heartbeat bill was officially supported and an amendment was brought affirming that the party did not support extending the number of weeks in the Heartbeat bill. Gracious sponsorship came from Congressman Adrian Smith for the Booster Social on Friday night. Attorney General Mike Hilgers sponsored breakfast and spoke of the many legal battles he and his office are fighting at the National level for Nebraskans. Senator Brian Hardin of LD 48 welcomed everyone to the Panhandle and both Senator Hardin and Senator Steve Erdman gave speeches on Unicameral updates. Lunchtime speakers were Public Service Commissioner Kevin Stocker, State Board of Education member Elizabeth Tegtmeier, and UNL Board of Regents Kathy Wilmot who all provided updates on their respective offices. Rod Edwards spoke for Charles W. Herbster of Conklin who sponsored lunch and yummy desserts. Political Director Todd Watson and Legislative Director Will Feely, gave updates on the Legislative Plan as passed by the body and a preview of issues that will have an effect on the 2024 election cycle. Rules of the Unicameral; Productivity As we discussed in previous editions and was addressed in the SCC-adopted Legislative Plan, the Rules of the Unicameral can dictate the efficiency and productivity of the session. Currently, ZERO bills have made it through Select File to be presented to Governor Pillen. It is indicated that there will be an amendment to the Unicameral rules debated on Tuesday in the hope to make this session more productive. There are different opinions amongst the body of what needs to be changed in the rules. We look forward to seeing where the consensus lands on Tuesday when they reconvene. These changes could have a dramatic effect on the trajectory of this session. Without doing something, the productivity of this session is severely limited based on the liberal leadership of the Filibuster Party. Please pray for the updated rules to be passed so this can be a productive session for Nebraska. Taxes Tax packages continue to move forward on property tax relief. LB 243 moved out of Committee. Senator Briese’s bill will increase property tax relief from $315 to $388 billion in 2024 and eventually $560 million by 2029. LB 589 advanced and seeks to cap School spending at 3% a year (unless an override by 75% of the school board occurs). The state also advanced removing community college taxes to the state and off the property tax rolls. Finally, Senator Riepe introduced his Constitutional Amendment to repeal the Inheritance Tax. The Republican Party Platform supports this measure and lets Nebraskans decide if we should continue this tax only 5 states deploy. Election Security The media, Senators, and everyone opposed to Voter ID are doing their best to water down election security in this cycle. Regardless, we continue to hear key bills on securing the election. If there is one issue of consensus that separates the people and the legislature...it is Election Accountability and Voter Verification. The NEGOP will continue to represent the Platform, the Legislative Plan, and express the will of the people to seek strong security measures in our elections. The government committee continues to hear bills on machines being made in America, secure ballots with watermarks, and third party audits of the work of the Secretary of State with many noting that our elections lack third party verification outside of that office. However, as the progress of this session slows, the focus continues to shift to the Voter ID bill in a limited action environment. The Legislative Committee volunteers have invested thousands of hours into those bills that have suddenly gone dark. The NEGOP stands behind the collaborative work in Senator Erdman’s ID bill. This bill reflects the true will of the people who have given a voice at our meetings and it is designed in a manner to create a secure, fair, and a Constitutionally honored outcome (validate the ID upon receipt of the ballot). The Constitutional Amendment MUST BE OBSERVED and that means a verification of the ID for every ballot WHEN TURNED IN. We anticipate a new ID bill from Senator Slama to be released soon with new language. Stay tuned.... Water Water resources has been in many conversations and pieces of legislation. Bills from around the state are seeking to address nitrates, expand capacity, build lines from the Missouri into Lincoln, and address the Perkins canal. Although most of the bills don’t really relate from one to another, it is clear that Nebraskans have different concerns on water for different reasons in different areas of the state. Our Political Plan for 2023-24 will put a greater focus on NRD boards. I’m seeking a volunteer political advisor that will be solely focused on these important races around the state. It is imperative our Republican county chairs are briefed on the important people running these races. Furthermore, I’m calling on the citizens to start paying more attention to these critical races. Water is a big concern for different reasons to all Nebraskans. Water is critical to life. We will be seeking more information and focus to ensure our natural resources remain in a good place for all of Nebraska. 2nd Amendment We are anticipating the vote for Constitutional Carry to be on Tuesday this week. The NRA will be providing a lunch at the NEGOP headquarters at 1610 N St. in Lincoln before the floor vote. Lunch will start at 11:30. Come join other freedom loving Americans before the vote for a bite to eat! A Caution on Spending In the coming weeks the NEGOP will be taking a look at all the new spending proposals coming from both parties. There IS merit to some new spending to solve critical problems. However, the fiscal footnotes continue to show a little here, a little there, a lot here, a lot there, and boom you have a new level of government spending. Our platform for Republicans is clear we are for lower taxes and fiscal responsibility. Lower taxes can only occur with lower spending. The Governor has been clear that he wants to scrub every dollar for efficiency. We agree with that assessment. The state is blessed with a large surplus. However, we believe that surplus belongs to the people. We are encouraging our Senators to look at the “Whole” of new spending and see where cuts can be made and ask if we really need this expenditure or if that increase to an existing program is wise. Lower spending enables lower taxes. Psychologically, we know more money in the wallet creates loose spending. We need to overcome that psychology and take a hard look at the new proposals. "Do we really need this?", should be the primary question. We need to remain diligent on spending so that we can lower tax rates and be competitive in the region for the long haul. # **Forget The Banking Collapse, This Is Worse!**
---
### **Forget The Banking Collapse, This Is Worse!**
| | | The collapse of Silicon Valley Bank (America's 16th largest lender) was _**one of the most severe bank failures in American history!**_

But as bad as it was, there is **something far worse.**

Something with much more fallout and damage! I'm talking about **the collapse of the U.S. Dollar!**

We are in the death throes of this happening right before our eyes. It started when Nixon took America off the gold standard in the 1970s. And continues today with the debt ceiling being raised every year. Which allows the government to print infinite amounts of money.

When this finally comes to a head, Americans will face a rapidly deteriorating financial situation:

* The average American lifestyle **_will cost more and more every month_** _._ And this will push many people below the poverty line.
* Retirement account values will suddenly crash as companies lose massive amounts of income and business _(because their customers are cutting back on expenses)_.

Is there something you can do to protect yourself? YES! And...

# **Is Your Bank Next?**
**The 2****nd****largest bank failure in US history occurred in just 48 hours. Could your bank be next?** Imagine waking up one morning to the news that your bank is in trouble, and then getting this message when you log in:
> _"Our online banking system and mobile services are currently unavailable. Please check back later for availability"_
**Terrifying right?** Well, this is exactly what the customers of Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) read as its executives frantically tried to squash rumors of its failure and collapse through social media. The irony lies in the fact that those who **are trying to****save your deposits** are the same **ones who created the monster in the first place.**** ** After the rapid collapse of SVB, the federal government launched an emergency rescue of the U.S banking system in an effort to halt the contagion of further collapses. However, **the cancer in the financial system** had spread so rapidly that within hours of the first collapse, Signature Bank of NY collapsed, **marking the 3****rd****largest bank failure in history**. **This is just the tip of the iceberg.** Banks have been given free rein to gamble away your money with minimal oversight **due to deregulation.** The [banking crisis](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtkTmO3DAQRU_TCgWSxU2BgjHGfQ-qSVEUtXAbajm9ZccGKqiqD7zgP9NjLrqOCAzQ6H6QXUfHxvUEEUDwvClhAC1uBZcg3r_YN2Hkt2RfL4qSs1M53GaTCXsq7Wdfm6n_jKLjTHfCSCO5VPSBP5sZAUZEmW7WnglKJULQLP1USnjB14u8nynJt_-B_g3hfZblBd8T3q06PmakkXp8wSwlJTTYumjvUd5I2Nn0ZKWS-hPjbLOXi_PzEe3GrtJVedXLYKnptVdXjzUrrWLaiVfxuagZujzmxIF0u-owG7j9_ORBbemg1s9YBphyhbUuiX4sw7fHG5vKUIxKYaQjsvzU17lVEchCT02UkfNPuSBCd7OUsozI0cJg2S8dMcqfc00bn_HF7mV0qxDaBP90SChkcaqAH3pFhZh6ZFnIOcQX4cZNTxf-XuWWy8xDWmcxTLfIc63blaOAQdmpSb0Oh1sWl7l4fNlVueWfpdKfbcrMI9TCGFFb6Jr03RZQfoPWKU7o3IoUPG5HQfXjfzriH8Ikt80) seems to be bigger than expected. For instance, MarketWatch just reported that "20 Banks... are sitting on huge potential securities losses- as was SVB." **Will First Republic Bank be next?** With more than $212 billion in assets, First Republic Bank sent an urgent email to try to soothe the minds of their customers. This had the opposite effect as within hours of the markets opening, their **stock fell over 67%.** Although the FDIC can intervene to cover bank losses, the FDIC itself can run short if numerous banks fail at once, which happened during the last recession. Consider that as of December 2022, the FDIC deposit insurance fund contained **$128 billion** , while the total deposits the FDIC insured amounted to more than **$10 trillion**. If you thought that would be sufficient, well, think again! **The SVB failure alone is enough to deplete the entire FDIC reserve.** **What other more[ sinister mechanisms](http://mgmail.rightwingreport.com/c/eJxtkUuO5CAQRE9TtbSA5GMWXvSop--BscEYcGHA39OPZ9YjxSpCikjlGzvMhZREYID30PWtlNS8XUcQAQSPTQkDaHAjeAvi5xf7Joz8btnXi6Ls7FQPt9g8pk-ujf7E99QxrShFmrSY8VZJ1eMWuNTcUD5qSsQ7dkxQ2iIE79BNtaYXfL3Iz6OaffOf0r8h_Jw1vOB7wh-rDj0aulKPL5jblhKa7B4G71FZzFmoXMqxicTiSaVe_YIi99neJ85mrM5bFvgk7kvlXekq57FqooK1FJ-XMPIzxNBPd_Bbj2ElvQsKVlNGHudb7PvpemvatN1Jc-mg7BH4PKRt4fN-jlpd6d5puc9nxJXDnXZTh4xS35czfv_0YzH9EnKZz3m62GWYtnzdo5JARrT0I0C7TVPyDLNBXF7BUY5QHR8MFpe9Nna_CB_d9PzC37FdSp15ynEWz82izPu-XGUV0Cs7vXM3pMOF4AoXDy8blQv_KNXubHJhHqEGzIqaSmMe7qaC8gs0TnFC50bk5HFjBB0e_tOx_gE87roq) could be at play? ** Was it a coincidence that the Fed and major banks began testing the **Digital Dollar** back in November of 2022? After the rapid collapse of SVB, the federal government launched an emergency rescue of the U.S banking system in an effort to halt the contagion of further collapses. However, the cancer in the financial system had spread so rapidly that within hours of the first collapse, Signature Bank of NY collapsed, marking the 3rdlargest bank failure in history. This is just the tip of the iceberg. Banks have been given free rein to gamble away your money with minimal oversight due to deregulation. The seems to be bigger than expected. For instance, MarketWatch just reported that "20 Banks... are sitting on huge potential securities losses- as was SVB." Will First Republic Bank be next? With more than $212 billion in assets, First Republic Bank sent an urgent email to try to soothe the minds of their customers. This had the opposite effect as within hours of the markets opening, their stock fell over 67%. Although the FDIC can intervene to cover bank losses, the FDIC itself can run short if numerous banks fail at once, which happened during the last recession. Consider that as of December 2022, the FDIC deposit insurance fund contained $128 billion , while the total deposits the FDIC insured amounted to more than $10 trillion. If you thought that would be sufficient, well, think again! The SVB failure alone is enough to deplete the entire FDIC reserve. What other more could be at play? Was it a coincidence that the Fed and major banks began testing the Digital Dollar back in November of 2022? Or, was it that they knew of the inevitable collapse of the banking system and the potential wipe out of trillions of your hard-earned savings? Knowing that the Federal Reserve and this administration have lied about inflation for over a year and, with more interest rate hikes anticipated, additional banks will see their bond assets devalue causing . If a bank as big as SVB can fail in 48 hours with little prior notice, how long would it take other smaller banks to last... minutes? Is this the time for you to rethink? Well, things are about to get worse and the threat signals to the economy are flashing red. Americans should know better by now not to listen to either the banks, the lying administration or the greedy financial advisors. They are all in cahoots. Recently, savvy investors such as Robert Kiyosaki and David Morgan warned us repeatedly that a banking crisis is imminent and urged us to invest in the same vehicle that the banks themselves are trying to hoard. It’s time to fight back and . While stocks have been scrambling, real estate plummeting, bonds devaluing, dollar and oil crashing and banks failing, one asset is standing firm against all odds. It is the only asset that does not depend on anyone or anything to create its value. By owning Gold, you bypass many of the current economic crisis pitfalls while minimizing your financial risks. You deserve that peace of mind! Don’t let another opportunity pass you by. Whether you like Gold or not, deep down you know well that it is a safe haven asset that has proven to outperform the markets and hold its value no matter how many financial institutions fail. This is urgent - Democrats introduced a bill to make Washington DC the 51st state in America... and it's picking up more support than you can believe...

**FIRST:** House Democrats joined forces to push for DC statehood
**THEN:** Dozens of top Senate Democrats quickly signed on
**NOW:** Joe Biden is publicly endorsing their plot, giving it the most attention we've ever seen

This is an emergency for Conservatives everywhere. Why? Because it's not about representation or doing what's right - _it 's about power._ If we fail, we'd be handing the Democrats TWO new Liberal senators and AT LEAST one House seat.

_**[Democrats are mounting a coordinated political ambush to force DC statehood on the rest of the country. I have no choice but to ask for your help to stop them. Even though the Democrats are CHARGING AHEAD with their plot, we still have a chance to stop them as long as we move right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483670:6ttJv9GUN:m:1:3391001263:0912E10AD306E63B589DAB08D0C165ED:r "Democrats are

---
**Remember - this is the same city that just UNANIMOUSLY voted to lower penalties for: **

- Carjackings
- Armed robbery
- Other violent crimes

That city would be electing TWO new senators and filling at least one House seat. It could shift the balance of power in Washington FOR GOOD. As of right now, we have a razor-thin Majority in the House and a 49-51 Senate.

_If we fail to stop their plot to make DC a state, we can kiss our House AND Senate Majorities goodbye forever! _

_**[The future of our country is at stake. Are you going to help stop Democrats from pulling off this devastating plot? I hope not. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A big announcement from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I'm making it official today, and I want you to hear it from me. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60788576/398214178/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12I_LAU_E_20230327_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDVjMWRlNS05YmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4kNdwAdtnzTHcf2FHgIr1qG0TVbiNlH9H987PsZyqlQ=&emci=115c1de5-9bcc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=145c1de5-9bcc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
I’m making it official today, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.** Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families in Massachusetts and across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One: [_**Can you make a donation of $15, or any amount that makes sense right now, to become a Founding Donor for our re-election campaign? You’ve helped power our movement, and I’d be deeply grateful to have your support as I take on this new righteous fight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60788577/398214179/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12I_LAU_E_20230327_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDVjMWRlNS05YmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4kNdwAdtnzTHcf2FHgIr1qG0TVbiNlH9H987PsZyqlQ=) | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60788578/398214180/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12I_LAU_E_20230327_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDVjMWRlNS05YmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4kNdwAdtnzTHcf2FHgIr1qG0TVbiNlH9H987PsZyqlQ=)
---
I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else.
I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including:
* Getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk
* Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits
* Lowering the cost of hearing aids
* Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal
* Supporting infrastructure projects from the Berkshires to New Bedford
* Even making billionaires cry on national TV

Now I’m running to keep representing Massachusetts because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Protect our Commonwealth’s coastal communities from climate emergencies. Build a 21st-century transportation system across all of Massachusetts. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.
**We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests like Big Pharma, Big Oil, and big banks who use their deep pockets to try to block change.**
[_**Please make a donation if you can today, and become a Founding Donor. Every contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up and helps show that there’s strong support for our plans and our values. Side by side, let’s rebuild the middle class, root corruption out of Washington, and strengthen our democracy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60788579/398214181/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12I_LAU_E_20230327_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDVjMWRlNS05YmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4kNdwAdtnzTHcf2FHgIr1qG0TVbiNlH9H987PsZyqlQ=)
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60788580/398214182/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12I_LAU_E_20230327_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDVjMWRlNS05YmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4kNdwAdtnzTHcf2FHgIr1qG0TVbiNlH9H987PsZyqlQ=)
---
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

name: R.I.N.O. Projects
subject: We can Do Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY R.I
body:
Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483766:6JXWD9GIN:m:1:3331421248:13AFED38B676C85ECC6D2D8AB8B90202:r "Headline") Peter: Congress has been in session for less than two months, and we already have Republicans caving into the left. With our razor thin margin in Congress, we don't need to be responsible for helping Joe Biden's radical progressive agenda succeed. The Democrats have been more than capable at ruining our country without help from the GOP. But Mitch McConnell has been busy standing with Joe Biden at press conferences lauding spending bills and then seen attacking Rick Scott over his proposal to reduce the size of our Federal Government. **Wait, isn 't that what Republicans have pledged to do?** You see, when you've got the Mitch McConnell types in the Senate and then the Ken Buck types in the House, we're destined to fail and that's not an outcome I'm willing to accept. **[Will you help us root out the RINOs so we can elect more conservatives to reverse the damage we've experienced from Biden and the Democrats?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483766:6JXWD9GIN:m:1:3331421248:13AFED38B676C85ECC6D2D8AB8B90202:r "Will you help us root out the RINOs so we can elect more
conservatives to reverse the damage we’ve experienced from Biden and the Democrats?")** When the Democrats controlled both Houses of Congress, they rammed every progressive bill through without consulting the GOP. In fact, they threw at least two GOP Members of Congress off Committees for the crime of speaking their minds. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483766:6JXWD9GIN:m:1:3331421248:13AFED38B676C85ECC6D2D8AB8B90202:r "Headline")So, when it's good enough for Democrats to punish Republicans for their rights to Freedom of Speech, why isn't it good enough for Republicans to punish a Democrat who has made numerous anti-American statements that included support for terrorism? **Individuals like Ken Buck clearly don 't have their priorities straight and that's why we need to remove RINOs like him from Congress and any other GOP member who don't put the principles of national security and our Constitution above their needs for fame or electoral outcomes!** It's bad enough that we've had Republicans voting in favor of Biden's spending bills, failing to block progressive appointees to his Administration and the bench, supporting Pelosi's J6 witch hunt and the two illegal impeachments of President Trump, all of which was used to suppress votes for the GOP in the 2022 Election, but we're not going to let it happen in 2024. **[Help us stop the RINOs before they deliver more victories for Democrats in 2024.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483766:6JXWD9GIN:m:1:3331421248:13AFED38B676C85ECC6D2D8AB8B90202:r "Help us stop the RINOs before they deliver more victories for
Democrats in 2024.")** During the 118th Congress, we're going to have plenty of opportunities to see those who campaigned on a conservative message, but failed when it counted, as well as those who are delivering on their promises for a conservative change. **It 's no time for us to be silent.** We need to make our voices heard and hold Republicans accountable to their commitment to reduce taxes, shrink government, reign in out-of-control regulations, appointing judges who adhere to the Constitution and ensure our families are safeguarded by local police and a strong military. One of the reasons the Red Wave didn't happen in 2022 was a result of RINOs like Mitch McConnell who worked against conservative candidates, or when our GOP candidates embraced the Pelosi witch hunts instead of our conservative principles. **[Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483766:6JXWD9GIN:m:1:3331421248:13AFED38B676C85ECC6D2D8AB8B90202:r "Donate TODAY and help us hold the RINOs accountable!")** For Conservative Values, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483766:6JXWD9GIN:m:1:3331421248:13AFED38B676C85ECC6D2D8AB8B90202:r "Autry Pruitt") Autry Pruitt
Conservative Author and Pundit | | [DEFEAT THE RINOS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483766:6JXWD9GIN:m:1:3331421248:13AFED38B676C85ECC6D2D8AB8B90202:r "DEFEAT THE RINOS")
---

name: American Action News
subject: Dollar to Plunge in April 2023 [Experts Warn]
body:
The U.S. Central Bank has been quietly stockpiling gold over the past few weeks.

** The United States Is About to Face Arguably...
The Greatest Dollar Collapse We've Ever Seen **
Hopefully, you've been preparing yourself because this problem is accelerating right before our very eyes...
**[>>> Get Your Free "Wealth Survival Kit" Here <<<](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj77oign44p3gpcps4jaovk8dbir1bapf861feig_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs)**
The U.S. Central Bank has been quietly stockpiling gold over the past few weeks.[1](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt9qcqpge3kh88vvcv4gfn5jrq9e2gfmh03jqheo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs) They won't admit that **the U.S dollar is in a free fall**.
We recently have seen the first real indications that the **U.S. Dollar is in a real decline** ...
For over 10 years now the U.S Dollar and Treasury bonds have been seen as a hedge against volatility...
But with lower yields now for bonds[2](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvq1ue3124v1o1sliocplujf2d5es38ilklk46sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs) -- [investors are running back to gold and silver](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo54lro59d6du1lnhfdov023phbji35oii63gjlg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs) and away from the U.S. dollar.
The dynasty of the U.S. dollar is coming to an end.
And when you have a Fed with a massive balance sheet that can and will continue to print money -- It's **only a matter of time before the dollar completely collapses.**
Billionaires have already been making major moves to protect themselves. Even China's Crypto billionaire is stockpiling Gold[3](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh8vicne53fsa20mrasle23bjfg6ivumi8sq6d68_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs).
But it's the **IRA and 401(k) savers who will be screwed** unless they [**make some major pivots now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z52c1os1efu62eeth7f1ivju8j2qaq34f00sn0q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs).
So it's incredibly important **RIGHT NOW to protect your family**.
**The warning signs are here ...**
**[Request your FREE'Wealth Survival Kit' from Lear Capital >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zambqpvakrquvbd615sckj3ehbuofk6pubtqvj00_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs)**
**Inside you 'll discover a LEGAL IRS LOOPHOLE that may protect your IRA, 401(k), or pension savings. (Tax and Penalty Free)**
[Click here now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zradask1knkcquii4503cq1nkdcbdfg3129pnov8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs), because once this crisis hits, it'll already be too late.
Christopher Coyne
**P.S.**
Don't wait to protect your hard-earned savings. Top economists and billionaires are predicting that the **dollar could collapse by the end of April[4](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z20sll42h69cbv0l82kqtrsl6udupbkcvgcbn8hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs)** \- [Get informed and prepare now before it's too late](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu2b03nkp82ifkkj1mjo72gvqrripdra40kn0d1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjh6co72cth2bs).

name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Friend, can you help me out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
JUST 4 DAYS UNTIL OUR NEXT BIG FINANCIAL REPORT! MARCH 31 MIDNIGHT
---
| | | | | |
---
| MARCH 31 MIDNIGHT NEXT BIG DEADLINE ONLY 4 DAYS REMAINING!
---
| |
---
| | |
---
|
Greetings!
Could you please make a donation today?
The Republican Primary is less than 2 1/2 months away and we have our biggest campaign expenditures in the next couple of weeks to let voters know about the Republican Primary which will be held on Tuesday, June 20.
Our NEXT BIG fundraising deadline is Friday, March 31 at midnight, and I need YOUR help.
For the past 2 months I've been in session working hard for you. By law, state legislators are not allowed to collect campaign donations during session.
Now that session has adjourned, I need to quickly play catch up before our next big fundraising deadline on March 31, 2023 at midnight.
Would you please give your most generous donation today?
The Republican Primary is in just 2 1/2 months and I really need your help!
You may donate online or by mail. For more instructions please click here to [donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001En2feADP7RMcfN7cBXgzkLn2cShNoOxsYyeQvYyny-VeOWka4zpbk2JnmGinh8MlXdvYgePl8tA_FOIUPB-Oz-I3NQ0uczHmrEgnkpJxVuw-dPUf8IFIx3EK_JWE4w-z9BrqKR1Bw30x2n3R8dIqazILc_vZB-JtgYui8AkxPB7nr-Xd_hXOWdFRTa6WeKWzbmnW4Qy2diPvqwPmcEy5Oaq1RU8U_noX7-YXChn4jWcBQ9YP0btg1xx4SXsALHlcfT4tlZpAd8ee32ZZH3SZqYuE8YHDQ7BV_09CQ06QxW1BC79W8n9byg==&c=vqUVrr_fBZnZk7-vxwbNKVresBd4ZWz36tStTkNujqwHyucGFdpxGg==&ch=fOZEw8J0l8MRmMqbx1K4RLOke0cdkLDKHwleopstAapfhzKg7ozM2Q==).
Our FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL reporting number has to be a good one. My opponents have been able to raise money to run against me for several months, while I have been in session for 2 of the 3 months of the next financial reporting period.
I really need your help NOW.
Please don't wait to give. Please give your most generous gift today, so that I can spend the next several months reaching voters and letting them know my name is on the ballot in June.
Our next fundraising deadline is on Friday, March 31, less than 4 days away! Will you please give your most generous donation today?
For God and Virginia,
---
---
| Senator Amanda Chase has represented Virginia's 11th Senatorial District , which is made up of Amelia County, Colonial Heights, and parts of Chesterfield County, since 2016. After redistricting, she is running in Virginia's 12 Senatorial District continuing to represent most of Chesterfield and Colonial Heights. Senator Chase is the only incumbent Senator running in Senatorial District 12.

subject: The Facts are not on Joe’s side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC**
body:
I think Joe is willing to say anything to get reelected.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483779:64UmW9GdN:m:1:3331421248:EB21B55763CFE2CCD8CBB82F1DE0E8A0:r "Headline") Peter: Now that Joe Biden's War on Cops is backfiring and violent crime is raging, he appears to be changing his tune and shifting the blame. In all the years I've been a part of the law enforcement community, I've only heard Democrats demand we disarm, disband or to defund our local police. I think Joe is willing to say anything to get reelected. **[Will you chip in today and help us expose Biden's attempts to hide his War on Cops from the American people?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483779:64UmW9GdN:m:1:3331421248:EB21B55763CFE2CCD8CBB82F1DE0E8A0:r "Will you chip in $50, $100, or $250 today and help us expose
Biden’s attempts to hide his War on Cops from the American people?")** In the Summer of 2020, it took Biden nearly 90 days to condemn Antifa and BLM violence. I've yet to hear him condemn Antifa's recent attacks in Atlanta, the increase in violence against police officers in Atlanta, or on the subways in New York City. In fact, I've yet to hear Biden reprimand any Democrat for their attempts to defund the police, and I've never seen Biden demand that Democrat DAs enforce our laws, revoke cashless bail, or strengthen punishments for violent offenders like he professed to do with his 1994 Crime Bill. **No, all I 've seen Biden do is ignore the crime crisis in America.** The American people may not be paying attention yet, but we're going to make sure they do. **[Help us educate America on how Biden and his allies have caused America's Crime Crisis. Donate TODAY to ensure voters know the truth before Biden attempts to whitewash his record next year.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483779:64UmW9GdN:m:1:3331421248:EB21B55763CFE2CCD8CBB82F1DE0E8A0:r "Help us educate America on how Biden and his allies have caused
America’s Crime Crisis. Donate TODAY to ensure voters know the truth before Biden attempts to whitewash his record next year.")** It was just a few weeks ago when Biden was calling on Congress to enact "police reforms." It appears his plan seeks to reduce the spike in "violent crime" but that won't happen if there's no cops to patrol our streets. **Police officers are tired of being treated like punching bags for politicians.** That's why so many are either retiring early, or accepting Governor Ron DeSantis' invitation to continue serving in Florida where leaders have a proven track record for Backing the Blue. Biden can claim the GOP is blocking his attempts to hire and train more police officers, but the facts clearly demonstrate that he and his allies prefer to defund the police. That's why we can't let voters be deceived by the tactics being implored from Biden down to local city council members. We need concerned citizens like you to help us educate the public and expose the politicians who play these games at the expense of our public safety. **[Please join our efforts to keep America safe. Donate ANY AMOUNT TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483779:64UmW9GdN:m:1:3331421248:EB21B55763CFE2CCD8CBB82F1DE0E8A0:r "Please join our efforts to keep America safe. Donate ANY AMOUNT
TODAY!")** America has become a pawn in partisan politics and it's time to fix that paradigm and clean up our cities. **[Chip in TODAY and help us prevent Biden from whitewashing the truth.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483779:64UmW9GdN:m:1:3331421248:EB21B55763CFE2CCD8CBB82F1DE0E8A0:r "Chip in TODAY and help us prevent Biden from whitewashing the
truth.")** For your safety, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483779:64UmW9GdN:m:1:3331421248:EB21B55763CFE2CCD8CBB82F1DE0E8A0:r "Major Sam Peters, USAF \(ret\)") Major Sam Peters, USAF (ret)
Founder
Law Enforcement Loyalty PAC | | [BACK THE BLUE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483779:64UmW9GdN:m:1:3331421248:EB21B55763CFE2CCD8CBB82F1DE0E8A0:r "BACK THE BLUE")

clean_body: Help me send a message to Biden and the radical Left. | Peter, After next Friday's FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, we're going to have to go public with our fundraising numbers. As the Democrats prepare to move forward with an unprecedented, politically motivated prosecution of President Trump, I want to send them a message... ... no matter WHAT they do to President Trump, House conservatives and the patriots who back us will NEVER waver in our support for the America First movement. The swamp's latest phony witch hunt against President Trump is the very definition of irony. While they weaponize America 's justice system to come after him, they're ignoring - and in some cases, even working to cover up - evidence of Joe Biden's corruption. House conservatives have PROOF that Biden's family received more than $1 MILLION after a Chinese company wired money to a Biden family associate. Source: Fox News According to bank records, the money was transferred to Hunter Biden, James Biden, Hallie Biden, and a fourth, unknown bank account identified simply as "Biden". Wonder who that could be? Of course, the corrupt establishment in Washington doesn't want us to find out. They're hoping that this bogus indictment of President Trump distracts the American people from the very real national security implications of Biden's family taking money from foreign nationals. But House conservatives won't rest until we get to the bottom of this and uncover the TRUTH. Biden's days of profiting off America are over. Accountability is coming. Thank you, Rep. name: Betsy, Nikki Haley for President
subject: Attached: Team Haley Campaign Strategy
body:
[confidential]
| |
---
| | | | **[CONFIDENTIAL CAMPAIGN MEMO] **
To: Peter
From: Betsy A.
Date: 03/27/2023
RE: Grassroots Strategy on the ground

Hi \- You are receiving this memo as one of Nikki Haley's _most trusted_ supporters.

Since we launched over a month ago, we have been traveling the country and meeting with voters in critical states.

-> Nikki officially announced her candidacy in her home state of South Carolina in front of a crowd of thousands. Since then, Nikki's held multiple events across the state, including a rally in Myrtle Beach where over 1,000 supporters showed up. (ICYMI: _**[watch the rally here](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484754:Jzq2c9GUN:m:1:3365131770:F1DA0D956778665DB02EDDD06AA91377:r "watch the rally
here")**_ to see why momentum is building behind our movement!)

-> Nikki's first official presidential campaign trip was to New Hampshire. Nikki met with voters and held packed town halls all over the state, including Exeter, Bow, Manchester, and Concord. She's not just giving speeches; she's answering questions from the crowd and taking time to shake hands and talk directly to voters.

-> Nikki held her first big town hall in Iowa on Presidents' Day. Nikki has traveled back and forth to Iowa since then to hold town halls and talk with countless voters all over Urbandale, Marion, Council Bluffs, Nevada, Clive, and more.

Nikki has outlined her vision to restore the American Dream to enthusiastic crowds across South Carolina, New Hampshire, Iowa, and more but she's not stopping there. Nikki will be traveling across the country until her message of truth and hope reaches all Americans.

We're building the infrastructure from the ground up but __assembling__ and __sustaining__ an operation this size is no small task. We're relying on grassroots donations to fund this real-time movement happening on the ground all across the country.
**Your investment in our grassroots infrastructure allows us to: **
* **Identify and contact voters **
* **Hold town halls, rallies, fundraisers and other events **
* **Build field teams and hire key staff **

---
| | [CHIP IN TO HELP BUILD THIS CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484755:Jzq2c9GUN:m:1:3365131770:F1DA0D956778665DB02EDDD06AA91377:r)
---

This is a key part in running a successful campaign and by building out strong operations on the ground, we can pave the way for victory.

I hope you will consider making your early grassroots infrastructure investment today.

---
| | [CHIP IN TODAY ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484755:Jzq2c9GUN:m:1:3365131770:F1DA0D956778665DB02EDDD06AA91377:r "CHIP IN TODAY ")
---

Thank you in advance.

Betsy
Campaign Manager
Nikki Haley for President
---
| | | | |
* * *
**GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH**
A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America.
---
---
| |
**JOIN NIKKI 'S TEAM**
---
---
Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

**[In order to build momentum and get Nikki's message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki's team and pitch in a donation today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484756:Jzq2c9GUN:m:1:3365131770:F1DA0D956778665DB02EDDD06AA91377:r "In order to
build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? ")**

Thank you in advance for your support.

Thank you,

Team Haley

P.S. If you don't have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today.

---
| | [DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484756:Jzq2c9GUN:m:1:3365131770:F1DA0D956778665DB02EDDD06AA91377:r "DONATE")
---
| Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Inc.
---

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

Our mailing address is:
186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401
Daniel Island, SC 29492
[Privacy Policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484757:Jzq2c9GUN:m:1:3365131770:F1DA0D956778665DB02EDDD06AA91377:r)
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system October 12, 2022.

name: Wake Up the Left
subject: Democratic Republic, not a Banana Republic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
body:
It's time America stands up to the left and says ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483774:6FMm39GNL:m:1:3331421248:277C632C41C3F0A35E05A35FD647AE05:r "Headline") Peter: We've had 7 years of witch hunts, 2 sham impeachment trials and over $30 million spent on investigations as a result of a false dossier that was used as propaganda by the left to impugn President Donald Trump. Dozens of kangaroo court dramas as allies of President Trump have been persecuted by the opposition party. Raids on the home of President Trump and his allies. Now we have to concern ourselves with a potential indictment. **It 's time America stands up to the left and says ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** **[Will you donate TODAY and help me make that message heard loud and clear?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483774:6FMm39GNL:m:1:3331421248:277C632C41C3F0A35E05A35FD647AE05:r "Will you donate $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and help me make that
message heard loud and clear?")** During this same time, billions of dollars in damage has been levied against America's cities by BLM and Antifa activists without any accountability. Millions of people have illegally entered our nation through its porous borders with drugs [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483774:6FMm39GNL:m:1:3331421248:277C632C41C3F0A35E05A35FD647AE05:r "Headline")and other criminality, but leaders on the left prefer to turn a blind eye. These same leftist leaders have attempted to control how we live, work, play and worship under the guise of a public health emergency have championed measures that have incited an economic and crime crisis like none we've seen in decades. And even worse, is their double standard towards the actions of the Biden family. Now, the left is doing everything they can to destroy our nation in a desperate attempt to hold onto their power including their new attempt to indict President Trump. **[Help me remind the left we live in a Democratic Republic, not a Banana Republic!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483774:6FMm39GNL:m:1:3331421248:277C632C41C3F0A35E05A35FD647AE05:r "Help me remind the left we live in a Democratic Republic, not a
Banana Republic!")** All of their efforts are part of a calculated plan to keep Americans from focusing on how the Biden family's business relationship with China's CCP, shady businesses in Ukraine and elsewhere to enrich themselves. And while Biden and his allies want to force us into a game of whack-a-mole, we cannot lose sight of their attempt to also abolish our gun rights, increase their crime wave, their attempts to ruin our economy forever and efforts to trample on our Constitutional Rights once again. **In this country, we will have free and fair elections where Biden and his allies will be held accountable.** **As a result, these leftists are not playing by the same rules and are attempting to seize control of our country by punishing their political adversaries in hopes that they are never held accountable.** **[Join the Bergman Battalion TODAY and help me safeguard our Democratic Republic!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483774:6FMm39GNL:m:1:3331421248:277C632C41C3F0A35E05A35FD647AE05:r "Join the Bergman Battalion TODAY and help me safeguard our
Democratic Republic!")** There is no doubt that without freedom-loving Americans who will remain vigilant in defense of our liberty, Biden and his allies would turn our nation in some third world banana republic. I will not allow it. **[Help me stop them!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483774:6FMm39GNL:m:1:3331421248:277C632C41C3F0A35E05A35FD647AE05:r "Help me stop them!")** Not on My Watch,
Rep. Jack Bergman (MI-1)
Lt. Gen., USMC (ret.) **P.S.** I spent 40 years in the Marine Corps to ensure citizens could rely upon our Constitution to keep government at bay, not have leftists use our taxpayer-funded resources to punish political opponents like we've seen throughout history in banana republics. **[Please donate and help me protect our Democratic Republic from Biden's tyranny!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483774:6FMm39GNL:m:1:3331421248:277C632C41C3F0A35E05A35FD647AE05:r "Please donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 and help me protect our
Democratic Republic from Biden’s tyranny!")** | | [JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62483774:6FMm39GNL:m:1:3331421248:277C632C41C3F0A35E05A35FD647AE05:r "JOIN THE BERGMAN BATTALION")
---

| **Paid for by Bergman for Congress**
---
Rep. Jack Bergman is a retired member of the United States Marine Corps. The use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy, the Marine Corps, or the Department of Defense.
