name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: NEW Explosive Revelations on Biden Corruption
body:
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484615:J4Bi39GgN:m:1:3360412034:FC2975C286A20D35D180FD71CFD0DC6D:r)
---
Peter, I have breaking news to share with you... My team at America First Legal just released our second batch of **Biden Documents** that the federal government attempted to keep hidden until we forced their release with our aggressive litigation and investigatory tactics. [**_Support us now to help expose Biden corruption_ >>>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484615:J4Bi39GgN:m:1:3360412034:FC2975C286A20D35D180FD71CFD0DC6D:r) This **second trove of shocking documents** confirms there was effectively no daylight between Joe Biden and Hunter Biden regarding the Biden family's business dealings in Ukraine. But there is more. **These never-before-seen records and emails contain more explosive revelations** , _including:_ **#1 -** Then Vice President Biden personally signed off on the statement given in response to reporters about whether Hunter's appointment to **Burisma** undermines the Vice President's credibility in pushing anti-corruption measures in the Ukraine; **#2 -** The Office of the Vice President connected reporters writing about Hunter's appointment to**Burisma** to Amos Hochstein, a trusted Biden advisor who was then the "point person" for International Energy Affairs at the U.S. Department of State, to provide a "unique and valuable perspective" on the relationships in Ukraine; **#3 -** The Office of the Vice President coordinated closely with Hunter Biden's notorious firm **Rosemont Seneca Advisors** (the firm has been prominently involved in Hunter Biden's various international business dealings, which Joe Biden has claimed to know nothing about) in response to press inquiries; **#4 -** U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine, Marie L. Yovanovitch, reported _- to the Department of State's Victoria Nuland, Anna Makanju in Vice President Biden's Office, and the National Security Counsel's Eric Ciaramella-_**that "this time there are accusations that Burisma allegedly had a subsidiary dump natural gas as a way to pay bribes" and "mentions that Hunter Biden and former Polish President Kwasniewski are on the Burisma board."** Taken together with the Oversight Committee's revelations about the Biden Family finances, **it is now _indisputable_ that there is a need for a full criminal investigation** into the Bidens' foreign influence peddling and exotic foreign financial payoffs. We now have the evidence in plain sight. _This can be ignored no longer!_
| [**HELP EXPOSE BIDEN >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484615:J4Bi39GgN:m:1:3360412034:FC2975C286A20D35D180FD71CFD0DC6D:r)
---
This is yet another example of how our hard work at America First Legal is paying off and getting results for _YOU_ , the American People. [**Please make a generous and urgently needed donation now to help my team continue the fight and expose Biden 's corruption in a court of law. ****_Please help us continue the investigation right now >> _****_ _**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484615:J4Bi39GgN:m:1:3360412034:FC2975C286A20D35D180FD71CFD0DC6D:r) _With deep gratitude for your continuously brave support,_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal
|
---
Note: This hard evidence which shows the intertwinement of Hunter Biden's foreign dealings with then Vice President Joe Biden, _including proof that people inside Biden's Vice Presidential Office knew about and were worried about Biden's Burisma_ _dealings_ would not have been discovered without our lawsuits.**
| [**DONATE HERE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484615:J4Bi39GgN:m:1:3360412034:FC2975C286A20D35D180FD71CFD0DC6D:r)

body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60800972/398261823/-46504088?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4017-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODRjNzBlZC1iNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykD5YlMSQ4uBE4W9-44A0UADb9slDJCfQQy96tccX7w=)
Hey folks — James Carville here. Jon Tester just launched his reelection campaign and I can already tell this race is going to be NUTS!!

We already know the Senate majority will come down to Montana — and if we don’t keep Jon Tester in the Senate, **Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye!**
I have a reputation for calling it like it is. In my expert opinion, this is the most important election in the country. We don’t yet know who Jon’s opponent will be, but we have a few clues, and none of the options look good.
That’s why we need to do EVERYTHING we can to support Jon in this race right as this campaign is rolling!

When I called Jon to ask how I could help, he said they had a critical fundraising deadline coming up in **_four days,_** and he thought I might be able to convince you folks how important this is.
**So listen up, folks : This election is going to be close. Right now, Jon’s team is $210,876 short of their goal! This early in the game, in a race as important as this one, this is not the time to be falling behind. **
**[_With just days left in this critical end-of-quarter deadline, I’m asking you to step up to the plate and chip in a split donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and Jon’s campaign. Our Senate majority depends on your support:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60800974/398261826/-46504088?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4017-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODRjNzBlZC1iNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykD5YlMSQ4uBE4W9-44A0UADb9slDJCfQQy96tccX7w=)**

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60800984/398261837/1575385346?refcode=jtk4017-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODRjNzBlZC1iNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykD5YlMSQ4uBE4W9-44A0UADb9slDJCfQQy96tccX7w=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60800986/398261839/1575385346?refcode=jtk4017-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODRjNzBlZC1iNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ykD5YlMSQ4uBE4W9-44A0UADb9slDJCfQQy96tccX7w=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: Crazy AWESOME Week!
body:
Incredible Week! I want to send an update on how last week went since I requested prayer from you. Thank you for praying! On Monday, we held our Pas
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11309.1.ae85f552eaf50a94a428f9ea66d7732d) Sheridan.Church OKC Launch | March 25
---
## Incredible Week!
---
I want to send an update on how last week went since I requested prayer from you. **Thank you for praying!** On Monday, we held our [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11310.1.f57b97d4e71f34556ca25af2f6d0e34d) prayer call with **President Donald Trump** , **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** and other guests as well as over 115,000 people joining LIVE. You can watch here: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11311.1.89da883055700b48fc7eb45cd324bb6f) We are in the process of planning our next [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11312.1.265454c7201d9c14332f73876a30a291) LIVE prayer call. Be sure to register at [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11313.1.ccf3a0fd562989b8603a22dff0306465) On Saturday, [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11314.1.dc4cc5f3801335ee967c3d28402373bb) launched its' **Oklahoma City Campus**! It was a _tremendous_ start. Every chair in the building was full and we even had to bring out the office chairs for people to sit in. More importantly, God showed up and **lives were changed**! Finally, I preached a sermon on Sunday at [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11315.1.887773e598eddeaa9b537075a10f97b6) Tulsa for our 9 & 11am service that I believe will bless you. Watch: [Genesis Pt. 50 - Undeserved](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11316.1.f4a79cec0fec0fdb85dab5fb505725db) The week went GREAT! Thank you for praying.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11317.1.d929b588edfb174b3821bcfa584e0555) Genesis Pt. 50 | Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
If you do not have a home church please consider joining me for **Holy Week**. In-Person or Online.
**-[Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11318.1.cbd32c7077d89d65c51c5cd67a2cb831) Holy Week Schedule:**
Sunday, April 2 @9:00 or 11:00am - Palm Sunday (**Tulsa**)
Friday, April 7 @7:00pm - Good Friday Service (**Tulsa**)
Saturday, April 8 @5:00pm - Resurrection Celebration (**OKC**)
Sunday, April 9 @8:30, 10:00 & 11:30am - Resurrection Celebration (**Tulsa**)
**-Subscribe to[Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11319.1.5f5dacf6982ea48aa6fa08499429e4a2)'s YouTube page**: [https://clr.cm/9gWE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11320.1.e0e16a1e0bbc0e6ade858428b4f58abb)
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11321.1.896a08d0b8920d79506a5f21c6f11e26)
---
**-Sean Feucht** , **Clay Clark** and **Dr. Randy Caldwell** will be joining me in Tulsa at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11322.1.aefb84fa04789754b8e2e8d3d08db276) for a ONE night event that will be **incredible**!
**Worship** | **Faith** | **Politics**
**[Hold The Line Tulsa](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11323.1.2cca44aadeb812e53fb612bf72d1b972)**
**Date** : April 20
**Time** : 6:30-8:30pm
**Location** : 4121 S Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK 74145
**Cost** : $10
RSVP Here: [www.sheridan.church/rsvp](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11324.1.2a1a6c29ab5c6b50768403293e2e6ba9)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11325.1.84c904a8b18905f1dfc30ddccf843c98), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11326.1.031f49fdfa58cd6e389ac70cdebb6981), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11327.1.2833b7857737405e123c565147f3a4e4), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11328.1.85d72de5ad5109d3b8df29525f41841f), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11329.1.c758f824ef8613b4f624c84f18fd330f), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19580724.11330.1.c40d88571b1f4409c081776d433d70b3)).

name: James Carville
subject: calling it like it is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks — James Carville here. Jon Tester just launched his reelection campaign and I can already tell this race is going to be NUTS!!
We already know the Senate majority will come down to Montana – and if we don’t keep Jon Tester in the Senate, Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye!
I have a reputation for calling it like it is. In my expert opinion, this is the most important election in the country. We don’t yet know who Jon’s opponent will be, but we have a few clues, and none of the options look good.
That’s why we need to do EVERYTHING we can to support Jon in this race right as this campaign is rolling!
When I called Jon to ask how I could help, he said they had a critical fundraising coming up in 4 days and he thought I might be able to convince you folks how important this is.
So listen up, folks: This election is going to be close. Right now, Jon’s team is $210,876 short of their goal! This early in the game, in a race as important as this one, this is not the time to be falling behind.
With just days left in this critical end-of-quarter deadline, I’m asking you to step up to the plate and chip in a split donation between Seth Moulton and Jon’s campaign. Our Senate majority depends on your support: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks, y’all. Let’s do this thing!
— James Carville
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: 6 easy commitments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
EVERY GOP Candidate Should Make These EASY Commitments. Do you agree?

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zu8oiurv9qe268b47j3obtu0pauqlssmv838ts9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)
Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

Fellow American, Republicans can't be asleep at the wheel any longer, I need you on my team. **[Chip in $1 or more if you agree that our next president should commit to these 6 things!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlac6rqg823f3hr5a1qab83eeevr2c9eo5qha0mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)**

Let's stop just complaining about the Left and DO something about it.

Stand with me today,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znmjb8k9j2he5j92jvji1dg4t4bh56bhv9sqsv90_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg70q2thba991smt19bnmgkmj4rru0govn26n0jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfdc7gek67noqutld8cuqf0uq14d8g8ugb7t8t1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh1hsnm388pgipg4kl3gmk3rq1vrvvfnli5gi1j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1f8ekc1hmhlpfv0u2ouk63pe8vkkmqdg9a4m3uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0j7sgciof1motvde3omve7n6j3bavgtle8frud0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3jqpaju7l0v43qi6sj9kaupe2ispiu06i91f5f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o37cpi6cp324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zt801kfn0mc1glvpslr9igk1miikq976iigar3g0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj68p76c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj7tg1hofk8as51o0i7pfdkshorjm3tlkrim1n90_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cjiecp34spge49fg)

name: Grace Jo
subject: Fox News Segment: How I escaped North Korea
body:
The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zugkas1pvhvoigi1vjoqoa09d153r3pasmktdh6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)
Hello Friend,

Fox News recently invited me to appear and speak with Rachel Campos-Duffy about how I escaped North Korea.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn46shu9b3s0iil9pov2g47eefgeroip46un44qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)

_The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.**My mother even had to carry me in her backpack as she held my sister 's hand and swum across a river into China.**

But we were caught and sent back. This happened several times...

In North Korea, it is easy for the government to control everyone through starvation. From the moment I woke up to the moment I went to sleep, all I could think about was my next meal. That's all anyone could think about. _

That's only a small part of my story.

Thanks to the Dissident Project, I can share my story with students across the country. The Dissident Project provides high schools with informed, intelligent speakers with firsthand experience with authoritarianism, like me.

We provide this at no cost to the schools or students, which is why I am working to raise $5,000 this month.

[_**Friend, will you help fight authoritarianism with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to rush your support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zud1ai6g38ufu781ckgns173efkrv5i2f2mmukk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)

**Socialism is the worse government in the world. It kills people.**

High school students need to hear about the horrors of socialism and how it takes away everything and everyone you love. They don't know what it feels like to lay there, starving. Or how the government will punish you for merely doing whatever you can to survive.

Many students today think socialism is fair and equitable. Without hearing about experiences like mine, they will never have the chance to know about the true horrors until it's too late.

**Freedom is very precious in the United States, so we are responsible for protecting it for the future.**

Dissident Project speakers know how to connect our experiences to the principles that have made America prosperous and why we must defend them.

[_**Will you help us turn our experiences into a powerful warning for high school students? Then click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7egotakrd506jioe83k8s55qiaprdas45i5ud88_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)

We've spoken to 27 so far. But we're not even close to done - we have 50 engagements in total this year.

**Your generous gift provides this once-in-a-lifetime experience to schools for no charge.**

Can I count on you to help me share my story?**Click any link below to donate.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zktp3ui9c59p7losfv8lia1u7ic0ubne5pn9h0d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zba0ocv955qah4psj45076gnt5b4vlkdmpd41eq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpkejq1ovafk8t72ustog149dupg41id63utbkk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zihgt6d376g7s3jnockvpi9bibt1pth67n1avebg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhopg6ghsnkn1kn62kfqtdumf7gndkpb54cpj2t0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj64o76chh2bs)

Grace Jo

clean_body: The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old Hello Friend, Fox News recently invited me to appear and speak with Rachel Campos-Duffy about how I escaped North Korea. The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.My mother even had to carry me in her backpack as she held my sister’s hand and swum across a river into China. But we were caught and sent back. This happened several times... In North Korea, it is easy for the government to control everyone through starvation. From the moment I woke up to the moment I went to sleep, all I could think about was my next meal. That’s all anyone could think about. That’s only a small part of my story. Thanks to the Dissident Project, I can share my story with students across the country. The Dissident Project provides high schools with informed, intelligent speakers with firsthand experience with authoritarianism, like me. We provide this at no cost to the schools or students, which is why I am working to raise $5,000 this month. Socialism is the worse government in the world. It kills people. High school students need to hear about the horrors of socialism and how it takes away everything and everyone you love. They don’t know what it feels like to lay there, starving. Or how the government will punish you for merely doing whatever you can to survive. Many students today think socialism is fair and equitable. Without hearing about experiences like mine, they will never have the chance to know about the true horrors until it’s too late. Freedom is very precious in the United States, so we are responsible for protecting it for the future. Dissident Project speakers know how to connect our experiences to the principles that have made America prosperous and why we must defend them. We've spoken to 27 so far. But we’re not even close to done - we have 50 engagements in total this year. Your generous gift provides this once-in-a-lifetime experience to schools for no charge. Can I count on you to help me share my story?Click any link below to donate. Thank you, Grace Jo The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. Your America News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle!

| |
---
| | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still **INACTIVE** - and we're running out of membership cards! **[Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zivqgapgnivbc6233cdc1fuekk1pfbakn9o0v77o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj62or6chh2bs "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?")**

**Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us.**

---
| | [RENEW GOP MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcnp2jidr1i2bhfuipf4a5ha571cugg6gbelr8f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj62or6chh2bs)
---

Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda.

This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party.

**[Confirm you're with me. Use my special Speaker's link to active your membership at 50% OFF:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrn16mk2v405v9msbo5g770ru5mov9cst85lrv28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj62or6chh2bs "Confirm you’re with me, %%First_Name__c%%. I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name.

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,

subject: Tucker Carlson reaches a new low. Demand his advertisers drop him
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Demand Tucker Carlson’s Advertisers Dump Him after his Disgusting Use of the January 6th Videos](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcd16e81d-63ae-4190-96dc-0c5f251134b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a1a523f-ae99-4898-b934-cac69f008d39/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **[Tucker Carlson has reached a new low, and his advertisers need to dump him NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8955af68-58f9-4583-8f30-8343a9442275/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**

After being given exclusive access to 41,000 hours of surveillance video footage from the January 6th attack, Carlson [cherry-picked](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3fd3ebb0-6c16-4300-b189-4103e37b2ad2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) out of context snippets to try to make it look like a normal tourist visit. And disgustingly, he even showed footage of a Capitol police officer who was violently assaulted and later died, and tried to argue his death had nothing to do with the events of that day.

Carlson has been [condemned](https://default.salsalabs.org/T264fd15e-b797-44c5-8f92-dfadf090ec57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) by the chief of the Capitol Police, and by people across the political spectrum.

**And his advertisers need to do this as well. They need to stop bankrolling his lies NOW.**

[**Add your name: Demand Tucker Carlson's Advertisers Dump Him.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5dd1fe9-18e9-4414-8d8e-c6e783f4e697/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action P.S. Already took this action? Take these ones too!
* [Tell Biden to kick Fox News out of the White House press pool!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2739081e-ab30-462e-9396-ab00c8fa96e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Demand Congress pass an assault weapons ban NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td7a3a480-dcd1-44c9-8a16-e4ddc435c9a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Tell Republicans: Hands off our Social Security and Medicare!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2139d615-d4dc-4f88-9e06-62d16fa0cbdd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Demand Congress pass paid family leave](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc73ae82-b259-414e-9743-1e9a975f7fd5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

_[P. P. S. - if you no longer with to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Konnech, Australia, Yu … and You
body:
Join us tonight on Locals 3/27 @ 7p et to hear all the latest | | | | | |
---
| | Hi Friend,
Last week was a great one for the cause of Liberty - excited to fill you in!
But first, let’s start where we seem to start every week ... the Los Angeles County v. (Konnech CEO) Eugene Yu hearing that has been repeatedly rescheduled since last October ... has again been rescheduled. The new hearing is set for Wednesday, March 29th.
Despite the repeated reschedulings in L.A., our own lawsuit continues to advance and with each advancement we’re dropping more revelations.
[**You can read Friday’s filing here.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b299322f3d&e=ad8cba7e98)
It’s purpose was to respond to Plaintiff’s (Konnech’s) objection to our request to inspect the evidence (200+ electronic devices seized in the Michigan raid of Konnech facilities) currently being held in L.A. County. This request had already been granted by the Court, but nonetheless Plaintiff objected, so we had an opportunity to respond.
The entire brief is worth reading, but the last attachment in the filing is particularly important. It is the Affidavit of Peter McAllister, the former manager of Konnech-Australia.
In his Affidavit, Mr. McAllister describes his concerns about Konnech CEO Eugene Yu’s attempts to cover up their China-based elections operations. Further, he describes the affiliations and attachments to the Chinese Communist Party. I’ll highlight excerpts below.
(Confused? [**Here’s a quick primer** ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b927610491&e=ad8cba7e98)on Konnech).
While we consider that filing to be a great victory in exposing truth and defending liberty, greater still was seeing the potential indictment of President Trump fail in the most spectacular of ways. Not only was he not indicted, NY DA Alvin Bragg, who’d been so blinded by his desire to arrest President Trump, was himself found to have withheld exculpatory evidence from the Grand Jury, so the whole thing fell apart.
Using the justice system as a weapon to target a former president and front-running candidate would have taken our Country to a new low. We are so grateful that didn’t come to pass. No doubt they’ll continue to try, but for now - score another point for Liberty and Justice!
**Tonight on Locals** (Monday, 3/27 @ 7p et [**live podcast**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1d69abb211&e=ad8cba7e98)****) we’ll talk about **all the above,** plus **more on ERIC**(Electronic Registration Information Center), and l’ll share my thoughts about why I believe **the Republican Party’s endorsement of ballot harvesting is an AWFUL idea.**
Please join us tonight if you can - and read on 👇 for some eye opening excerpts.
Friends, we’re winning. Keep the faith.
Ever onward -
---
_PS I know I wrote this last week, but it’s still true - in addition to the training, research, and support we provide on a daily basis, we are working hard to bear the weight of six lawsuits.[**If you can help us with a financial contribution, please do. We need your support. Quitting is not an option.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=77fc74e7a1&e=ad8cba7e98)_
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=648672a491&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=83b9e7b430&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
| | **Excerpts from Exhibit G:****Affidavit of former Konnech-Australia Manager, Mr. Peter McAllister****** 4b) “Despite Mr. Yu’s instruction to me to tell ECQ that Konnech Inc. had shuttered its Chinese subsidiary and no longer employed Chinese nationals to work on its elections software, I was aware that the work continued to be done by the same China-based teams but under a different contractual arrangement**. As far as I am aware neither Konnech, Inc. nor Konnech Australia Pty Ltd ever had any development staff and instead always drew on the more than 100 developer resources available to them in China.** I believe these developers to be employees of JinHuaHongZheng Technology, an affiliated Chinese company.”
16) “During our discussion Mr. Nabergoi and I agreed that the most likely explanation was that somebody in China was undertaking these deletions at Konnech’s direction, probably from Mr. Yu. We also discussed the issue of possible Chinese government connections with Konnech. **My research had shown me that JinHuaHongZheng Technology (which I believed to be associated with Konnech and which I believe provided the IT development engineers for Konnech) was the main supplier of election software products to the Communist Party of China.”**
17) ”Mr Nabergoi told me, in return, that the current owner of JinHuaHongZheng Technology was Mr. Yu’s older brother, who was based in China, and that the two frequently spoke.** Mr Nabergoi’s view was that Mr. Yu’s older brother is the brains behind Konnech.... “ “From this discussion I concluded that my assertions of an absolute disconnect between Konnech Australia and the Chinese Communist Party were no longer sustainable.”**
**To read the whole document**[**click here**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=353eb8fa5c&e=ad8cba7e98)**.**
Much more to come in this case.
God Bless America.
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3c53462a6a&e=ad8cba7e98)
| | |
---
_Copyright © 2023 True the Vote, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in for updates via the True the Vote website.

**Our mailing address is:**
True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=a514f5d04a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=a514f5d04a).
|
---

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We hope this message will reach you before it’s too late
#

Peter -
**January 23, 2023**
That was the day we launched this Senate campaign. Truthfully, Ruben had zero idea of what to expect. He knew we’d get a bunch of donations, but the idea that he would raise more than $1 million in 24-hours mostly from small-dollar donations was absolutely humbling.
**31,868** That’s how many people have given 1 donation to our campaign so far.
**March 31, 2023** That’s when our FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end. We’re humbly asking if you can make your first contribution to our campaign before it ends. Only 31,868 people have given 1 donation so far — it’s an unbelievably small percentage of our supporters.
Please join them at this link before it’s too late:
[**Can Ruben please count on you to make a $3 donation before our FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few days. Time is running out and Ruben needs you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230327-1-30&t=1&akid=499%2E734936%2E31pxnP)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-mar23.68dfDh&amount=3&refcode=em230327-1-30&t=2&akid=499%2E734936%2E31pxnP)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-mar23.68dfDh&refcode=em230327-1-30&t=3&akid=499%2E734936%2E31pxnP)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in. This is a big one.
Ruben Gallego for AZ

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=499%2E734936%2E31pxnP). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=499_734936_31pxnP&akid=499%2E734936%2E31pxnP)

clean_body: Help me send a message to Biden and the radical Left. | Peter, After next Friday's FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, we're going to have to go public with our fundraising numbers. As the Democrats prepare to move forward with an unprecedented, politically motivated prosecution of President Trump, I want to send them a message... ... no matter WHAT they do to President Trump, House conservatives and the patriots who back us will NEVER waver in our support for the America First movement. The swamp's latest phony witch hunt against President Trump is the very definition of irony. While they weaponize America 's justice system to come after him, they're ignoring - and in some cases, even working to cover up - evidence of Joe Biden's corruption. House conservatives have PROOF that Biden's family received more than $1 MILLION after a Chinese company wired money to a Biden family associate. Source: Fox News According to bank records, the money was transferred to Hunter Biden, James Biden, Hallie Biden, and a fourth, unknown bank account identified simply as "Biden". Wonder who that could be? Of course, the corrupt establishment in Washington doesn't want us to find out. They're hoping that this bogus indictment of President Trump distracts the American people from the very real national security implications of Biden's family taking money from foreign nationals. But House conservatives won't rest until we get to the bottom of this and uncover the TRUTH. Biden's days of profiting off America are over. Accountability is coming. Thank you, Rep. name: John Pierce
subject: What the FBI is doing to innocent January 6 protesters is VICIOUS and ILLEGAL.
body:
The FBI admitted that in electronic documents they thought had been erased.
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486552:JcJ_z9GWN:m:1:3391001263:82D467FBDFB9CC9F43927A55C4004D6F:r)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486552:JcJ_z9GWN:m:1:3391001263:82D467FBDFB9CC9F43927A55C4004D6F:r) [ **If you 're sick of the FBI treating Americans' Constitutional rights like _trash_ , it's absolutely crucial for you to give a critical donation immediately. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486552:JcJ_z9GWN:m:1:3391001263:82D467FBDFB9CC9F43927A55C4004D6F:r)

My associate, attorney Roger Roots, has filed a motion to dismiss the government's bogus case against innocent American Dominic Pezzola.

In fact, he's filed for a mistrial.

Not only because Tucker Carlson revealed videos that prove the government suppressed video evidence that can clear January 6 defendants of their alleged crimes.

**But because the government illegally monitored communications between at least one attorney and his January 6 defendant ...and the FBI DESTROYED EVIDENCE AND FABRICATED EVIDENCE to railroad innocent patriots! **

The FBI admitted that in electronic documents they thought had been erased.

Patriot, this is a critically important, breaking story. Very few Americans know what you just read.

Expect to see much more about this on cable news and hear much more about on conservative talk radio.

**What the FBI is doing to innocent January 6 protesters is VICIOUS and ILLEGAL.**

And I'm not going to let them get away with it.

I'm going to fight tooth and nail in court for each of the 30 patriots who desperately depend on you and me to defend them.

As you know, they face years, even decades, in prison for crimes they didn't commit.

They need all the help they can get.

And to be frank, so does NCLU. We need lawyers, paralegals, investigators, and more to help build our cases and to fight for our clients in the courtroom.

**We 're stretched to the breaking point.**

[ **Patriot, please help NCLU fully fund each of these critical cases with your very best gift of at least a vital donation immediately.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486552:JcJ_z9GWN:m:1:3391001263:82D467FBDFB9CC9F43927A55C4004D6F:r)

These court cases are underway as you read this urgent email.

[**So please don 't delay - give what you can right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486552:JcJ_z9GWN:m:1:3391001263:82D467FBDFB9CC9F43927A55C4004D6F:r)

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Founder and General Counsel
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI is destroying evidence that can clear January 6 defendants ...and making up fake evidence to railroad them. ** This is a crisis for our country and our Constitution.

[ **Please help NCLU defend our innocent clients against the FBI and DOJ with your best gift now.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486552:JcJ_z9GWN:m:1:3391001263:82D467FBDFB9CC9F43927A55C4004D6F:r)

body:
| | Derek,

Last November, we overperformed expectations, shut down the “red wave”, and handed Republicans one of the smallest majorities in history. But our work isn’t over. Right now, the GOP is coming after everything we hold dear.

**That’s why I started the Stop MAGA PAC. We MUST fight back against extreme MAGA Republicans and stop them from attacking our values. The road to taking back the House begins right here in New York. Together, we can stop the far-right in their tracks.**

We’re preparing to defend our progress and take back the House. We’re ready to put in the work – but first, I need to hear from YOU. Your input will help determine our strategy and set the agenda for the fight ahead.

[_**Will you take a few minutes to complete our Priorities Survey? name: Jim Jordan
subject: It's ALWAYS worse than we thought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=cdb79b495f3c4fe686e827d5bc1951d1&_t=OOdSRkOZMbiZliwR2kJgo1RY_0z1f7b3uAL46PzP2rlCCeuNgUr215j3llLNsWJ37dj9YhphucdYj8ecvhFWzBABwGeKGIaeGyHt2wKLtNA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=cdb79b495f3c4fe686e827d5bc1951d1&_t=OOdSRkOZMbiZliwR2kJgo1RY_0z1f7b3uAL46PzP2rlCCeuNgUr215j3llLNsWJ37dj9YhphucdYj8ecvhFWzBABwGeKGIaeGyHt2wKLtNA%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=cdb79b495f3c4fe686e827d5bc1951d1&_e=dGfrFrISl4nUvLJwKpTN6bHivZ7Pvl0p5ZuZj0JlEJya4AM-h7SPNhQt4dbEk7ATOCPjAAUgh3uPDex3epe4nvmKVEwtuPuOsI9bJewV6oDltOpadV0D5dpDRNSXvED2pqHyN39yR2quz1c47DrHQbWlus-FRvvTo0rMHlVeComSsUqdyb3COjCe7Xolz7EEVqxVyCBRF_Ksl2uoON3ktiVtxvfoLsbZ78KH9LTPblDhMzXhZw7Gi17o2l67GF1qODsHM_CINnIrk4-frd-gpMeuTyUtbqx-7sv-0RZrso09BefLp3-cD9eb6WzvsaOuamtRJvjm1WWNZuBahu-u9-ujLULvKDoqv_ftcP9QVLWYVuEX_35FQJ7UrmAXHY9XbUAx8ei_h-P-tgNcoWo0b_gPZJ12t8nouglAqorGFf_kdgcWkAt_R1xEj9KNTQ3n)
|

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed last week that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Greenhalgh for Delegate- Cutting taxes for Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate**
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends, As a member of the House of Delegates, I was proud to sponsor [legislation](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/2c8dd8bc61f614e3/abc4f083eee20f3cc3d6b838967d376c/37923) that would give tax relief to our veterans when they retire, instead of having to wait until age 55. Our military personnel sacrifice much for our country, and it's our duty to ensure that they are taken care of when they return home. One way to do this is _by not taxing hard-earned military retirement benefits_. Many of our veterans retire before they are 55 years old, and they deserve every penny of their retirement. That money should be available for starting a business, honing skills to re-enter civilian work force, or just taking care of family! We want our veterans to stay in Virginia to live, work, and raise their families. Veterans are critical to our community; for those who continue in the workforce, their skills contribute to our economy. My legislation would help Virginia compete with neighboring states for highly skilled veterans to relocate here. Removing the state income tax from military retirement benefits is not only fair, but also a matter of national security. We need to incentivize our best and brightest to join the military and stay in the military, and cutting taxes on retirement benefits is a key way to do this. I am committed to fighting for our military personnel and their families, will continue to work on their behalf, and I am asking for your help in this endeavor. Your donation will allow me to continue to advocate for cutting taxes for our military personnel and to work towards legislation that supports their needs. Please consider a contribution of [$500, $250, $100, or $50](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/2c8dd8bc61f614e3/cdef1efe066e8d35c3d6b838967d376c/37923) to support this important cause. Together, we can ensure that our military personnel are treated with the honor they deserve and that our country remains safe and strong. Thank you for your support, Karen Greenhalgh
---

| | You've seen the headlines:

In Missouri, school districts remove books about the Holocaust because of a new law that subjects teachers to possible jail time for teaching allegedly "explicit" material.

In Ohio, the author of a children's book called _It's OK to be a Unicorn_ is accused of trying to “turn kids gay” and banned from reading it in schools.

In Florida, math textbooks with sidebar biographies of African American mathematicians and books about Hank Aaron and Roberto Clemente are pulled from libraries.

[It’s clear that MAGA extremists have an agenda when it comes to our schools and our children. Our Districts for Democracy initiative is gearing up to fight back, but first, we need to hear from you: What issues do you want to see us prioritize? Click the button below to fill out a short survey and let us know →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60792849/398230644/38500329?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230324_SV_IntroSV_0_WL_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_IntroSV&refcode2=baf02730-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWYwMjczMC1hNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG-A5X2BThuY0css1K3zZe6II_j6BDYYtZA_vWUuD1k=&emci=5bdc0214-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=baf02730-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=19214294) | | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60792854/398230648/38500329?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230324_SV_IntroSV_0_WL_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_IntroSV&refcode2=baf02730-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWYwMjczMC1hNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG-A5X2BThuY0css1K3zZe6II_j6BDYYtZA_vWUuD1k=&emci=5bdc0214-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=baf02730-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=19214294)

This kind of censorship isn’t limited to states where the MAGA crowd have won control. In multiple New Jersey school districts, extremists are trying to ban books, and drive out teachers and librarians who stand up for freedom of expression. They’ve even demanded that their adult members get to sit in classrooms to monitor what teachers say and teach.

Districts for Democracy will promote freedom of expression and educational excellence in New Jersey and beyond by encouraging reasoned public debate on these issues, holding school board members and elected officials accountable, recruiting and supporting candidates committed to democratic values, and working to keep partisan culture wars out of schools.

[That’s what we’re all about here at Districts for Democracy, but we want to hear what’s on your mind. Please let us know where you’d like us to focus our efforts by filling out a brief survey:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60792858/398230654/38500329?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230324_SV_IntroSV_0_WL_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_IntroSV&refcode2=baf02730-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWYwMjczMC1hNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lG-A5X2BThuY0css1K3zZe6II_j6BDYYtZA_vWUuD1k=&emci=5bdc0214-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=baf02730-a4cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=19214294)

* * *
| Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. clean_body: | | You've seen the headlines: In Missouri, school districts remove books about the Holocaust because of a new law that subjects teachers to possible jail time for teaching allegedly "explicit" material. In Ohio, the author of a children's book called It's OK to be a Unicorn is accused of trying to “turn kids gay” and banned from reading it in schools. In Florida, math textbooks with sidebar biographies of African American mathematicians and books about Hank Aaron and Roberto Clemente are pulled from libraries. | | This kind of censorship isn’t limited to states where the MAGA crowd have won control. In multiple New Jersey school districts, extremists are trying to ban books, and drive out teachers and librarians who stand up for freedom of expression. They’ve even demanded that their adult members get to sit in classrooms to monitor what teachers say and teach. Districts for Democracy will promote freedom of expression and educational excellence in New Jersey and beyond by encouraging reasoned public debate on these issues, holding school board members and elected officials accountable, recruiting and supporting candidates committed to democratic values, and working to keep partisan culture wars out of schools. | — Districts for Democracy * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03512%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=exp7cZlhNeBmXY%2fNP21Q8Q&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

There is an important runoff election for the Phoenix City Council District 6 on March 14. Conservative Sal DiCiccio (R) is term limited and will be replaced by the winner of this race. The two candidates are Republican Sam Stone and Democrat Kevin Robinson. **If you live in District 6 (**[check here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/e889e43038d29d2d/abd03868eaa9aa0fc3d6b838967d376c/35693)**), you either received a mail-in ballot or you must vote in person (see below).

****This is a very important race that will determine the balance of power on the City Council.** Phoenix, like many large cities in conservative states, has tended blue with the consequences many cites suffer from with progressive governance. Have you noticed the growing homeless problem in our city?

**Conservative Sam Stone is the strong choice of The Prickly Pear** and we urge our readers in District 6 to mail your ballots in immediately and cast your vote for Sam Stone. [Learn about Sam Stone here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e697e9619fc2752f16f79d307c796b93/35693/e889e43038d29d2d/24c163fccaf9ad79c3d6b838967d376c/35693).

name: David Horowitz
subject: Banned on YouTube
body:
You can’t watch this video because YouTube is censoring my explosive new book: “Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last.”

| |

---
You can’t watch this video because YouTube is censoring my explosive new book: “ _Final Battle: The Next Election Could be the Last_.”They say my interview with Dr. Anthony Harper violates YouTube’s “misinformation” policy.Remember, this is the same “misinformation” policy that censored anyone who tried to expose Dr. Fauci’s Covid cover-up. And these are the same tech companies that have been caught red-handed colluding with federal government to control the information you have access to.The truth is that when American patriots like you are informed with the truth, the left loses their iron grip on power. That’s why the Freedom Center’s mission to uncover their manipulative plots and deliver the truth to you and the American people is so important. [**So, today, I’m asking you to join me in this fight by donating $35 or more to help me stand against my radical Leftist censors, and to make sure you’re equipped with the truth.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlugdfdk7sb1rf7l7b57ulshe5cki1pi2ou3psjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb4c9h2bs)**Are you able to stand with me today?** My name is David Horowitz. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary determined to bring America as we know it to its end – **_I was one of them... before I saw the truth..._** That’s how I know the radical Left inside and out— because I was deeply involved. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – the largest magazine for radical Marxists.But after the Black Panthers murdered my friend and aided the Communists in Vietnam, I finally opened my eyes to their lies. I cast my vote for Ronald Reagan, and never looked back.And ever since, I’ve dedicated my life to exposing and destroying their radical plans for our country.
---

---
| | “ _Final Battle_ ” lays out how the left plans to influence our elections to destroy the very freedoms America was founded on. Friend, I need you to read this book. The only way to stop the radical left from overtaking our country is to share this information with American patriots all across our country.The radical left fights so hard to censor and clean sweep the internet of any messages of truth from Conservative sources. Just like my book and my YouTube interview. Friend, that’s why the David Horowitz Freedom Center fights every day to expose the radical left, inform American patriots of the truth, and empower folks like you. We want you to join us to fight for the beliefs so many of us have and don’t want to see ripped away during our lifetime.You’ve probably seen the buzz on networks like Fox and Newsmax.
---
| |
---
| **"David Horowitz exposes the outrages perpetrated by the Biden administration and the Democratic left."**** **

| **_"Final Battle_ may be the most devastating book-length indictment of the Democratic Party yet written. This is nothing less than a handbook for the salvation of the United States of America.”**
---
**\-- Dennis Prager**
---
**Nationally Syndicated Radio Talk Show Host**
---
| | Thousands of patriotic Americans who felt disenfranchised after the 2020 elections are reading my book, “ _Final Battle_.” They’re learning about the damage the radical left has done to the integrity of our elections and what you and I need to do to fight back and restore America. [**That’s why I’m asking you to join me and thousands of other Americans in this fight, through a donation of $35 or more today. With your $35 donation I’ll send you a complimentary copy of Final Battle so you can read the truth the Left is fighting so hard to keep out of your hands.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpouk0ghht6n4gp8jcr79b3manrccdj805ll36lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb4c9h2bs) I know with patriots like you the radical left can never win.
---

David Horowitz

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Help TVP Support Our Next Candidate for Working Families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
March 27, 2023
Dear friend,
TVP is in the business of supporting candidates whose top priority is serving YOU. There are more than enough organizations who throw their money behind folks who protect the status quo and preserve special interests. We're laser-focused on lifting up the community leaders who are in touch with the needs of everyday people--working families and those who have been left behind by those in power.
Next week, we start our endorsement process for the 2023 elections and we could really use your help. Every election season, we work to turn out voters through candidate support, mail, TV, and more.
This year, we want to bolster our efforts big time.
HELP TVP TAKE OUR EFFORTS TO THE NEXT LEVEL [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
We're asking candidates the important questions and driving conversations on our community's top priorities. Do they believe Joe Biden is President (i.e. do they trust in our Democracy)? What will they do to address climate change? How do they plan to make our criminal justice system more fair?
Please consider contributing any amount today to help us come into the 2023 election season strong. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Creating a Tennessee where opportunities are available to every person takes all of us. We all have a part to play. Join us in this crucial work.
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Obscene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding $12.3 million from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.
#
[](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18917?t=1&akid=3096%2E346206%2EQTricJ)
Peter,
In a single night last month, Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding **$12.3 million** from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.
It just goes to show everything that’s broken in Washington.
We have a terrible system of campaign finance that has allowed the rich and powerful to buy off our elections ever since the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in _Citizens United v. FEC_.
I’m not accepting corporate PAC money in this race, but if we’re going to reach every voter in California and compete with McCarthy and the MAGA Republican Party’s millions, then I’m going to need your help right now:
[**Please, before our FEC fundraising deadline, can you pitch in $15 or any amount to support our campaign and Charles Booker today and reject the corrupting influence of money in politics that allows Kevin McCarthy to raise $12.3 million in a single night?**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18917?t=2&akid=3096%2E346206%2EQTricJ)
Thanks team,
— Adam
**[CHIP IN →](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18917?t=3&akid=3096%2E346206%2EQTricJ)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230327-3096-footer&t=4&refcode2=3096_346206_QTricJ&akid=3096%2E346206%2EQTricJ)**

name: Giffords.org
subject: Will you add your name to our petition and call on Congress to pass universal background checks?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Universal background checks legislation will be most effective if it’s passed by Congress at the federal level.
#

Friends -
We were proud to stand with President Biden earlier this month as he unveiled a series of gun safety executive actions, including steps towards achieving universal background checks in our country.
However, universal background checks legislation will be most effective if it’s passed by Congress at the federal level.
Last year, Congress showed that they had the courage to act by passing the most transformative gun safety legislation package in nearly 30 years. But we still are waiting for them to take action and pass universal background checks.
Saving lives from senseless acts of gun violence starts with making sure people who should not be allowed to have guns aren’t able to buy them.
The only place this idea is controversial is Congress.
[**So we’re asking today if you’ll add your name to our petition calling on Congress to pass universal background checks.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_mar23/?source=em230327-1-30-nor&refcode2=4793.3935704.NyHada&akid=4793%2E3935704%2ENyHada)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_mar23/?source=em230327-1-30-nor&refcode2=4793.3935704.NyHada&akid=4793%2E3935704%2ENyHada)**
Passing universal background checks is a simple action, but it speaks volumes about the size of the movement to change our gun laws.
That’s why we must keep the pressure on and let our elected officials in Congress know that we’re not backing down in our demands to pass universal background checks.
[**Please, use this link to say you want Congress to pass universal background checks for gun purchases in the United States.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_mar23/?source=em230327-1-30-nor&refcode2=4793.3935704.NyHada&akid=4793%2E3935704%2ENyHada)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_mar23/?source=em230327-1-30-nor&refcode2=4793.3935704.NyHada&akid=4793%2E3935704%2ENyHada)**
Thank you for standing with us,
The Giffords Team

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=4793%2E3935704%2ENyHada) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: 6 easy commitments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
EVERY GOP Candidate Should Make These EASY Commitments. Do you agree?

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9tgevviutk8rtiuts9udd7eps61aa7239eumshg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb2c3h2bs)
Fellow American -

I'm running on a vision to answer the question of what it means to be an American in the year 2023. Merit. Truth. Free speech. Accountability. I believe deep in my bones these ideals still exist.

I am running for President to **revive** the conservative ideals that put this country into motion 250 years ago, and to create an alternative to the failed, woke leftist policies - not just complain about them.

How do we get this done? _**I challenge every GOP candidate to join me in some easy commitments:**_
1. End affirmative action
2. Abandon the climate cult
3. Total decoupling from China
4. 8-year limits for all federal bureaucrats
5. Say NO to central bank digital currencies
6. Release the "state action" files

Fellow American, Republicans can't be asleep at the wheel any longer, I need you on my team. **[Chip in $1 or more if you agree that our next president should commit to these 6 things!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3dfal2hit0jancaueeg2sv5r4g0p7r0166khtho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb2c3h2bs)**

Let's stop just complaining about the Left and DO something about it.

Stand with me today,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0177p2dpn3ei1v6db5b8s505qan66hnfkh3m5i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb2c3h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjb8muhc0csn3bnb6c5cf6nq4vn4h7ga3qlkats8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb2c3h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2u7q1u32s0bp7d7jqkc4mfepg9uq1iqarjthhho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb2c3h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeejln34a41g74btus266vppujb0av14nfajvr5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb2c3h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6bdvdga04j8dse878ltv5nv6mu1pichfiigd4u0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb2c3h2bs)| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfko0sf19nc7u6ocnskvdclo02hi9qqflv8qogs0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjj6apb2c3h2bs)
---|---|---

This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. name: Anthony Figliola
subject: Reminder: Peter, Read My Latest Op-ed
body:
Weak Bail Laws are Fueling the Fentanyl Crisis
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015CgX3-ju32UJQKXbJlNcxUw-XuWS553iCu7PRqi4WsV5ISq2QKHDsdDg0DDP9QsFqmeRBsU13Nv8bDiw-XGA9gOvfKf392yIc6GSf6CnuGrRMIX7jUerudowz19VbA1cgfC6yo_UK2fH8sTTv8V39A==&c=q1a52PWdLIp95OUOK1pQAqws7c5jfTGMC-L4n54ZMFKeBBX0rgclZg==&ch=yEaXNO1X7j43uc__diYPT_K05cDr6rRfTs8HBskOl7Sk5l18cgQO4A==)

---
| |
---
| | | |
---|---
|
### Dear Peter,

As a candidate for the Suffolk County Legislature, I vow to make protecting our community from the deadly scourge of fentanyl-laced drugs a top priority. The fight against drugs and addiction is a multifaceted battle.

We must not only work to prosecute drug dealers and intercept the influx of drugs into our communities, but also provide meaningful support and treatment options for those struggling with addiction. As a society, we cannot turn a blind eye to this crisis and leave our most vulnerable citizens to suffer in silence.

Join me in this fight and read my latest op-ed in The Messenger Papers. Together, we can make a difference and save lives.

[Link to My Latest Op-ed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015CgX3-ju32UJQKXbJlNcxUw-XuWS553iCu7PRqi4WsV5ISq2QKHDsdTxe4XiytFjkZKhZe9VLio9EoCxwHewPebowrnpi3dx0R1iDraAHFtStmC6iL-yibxKy-dKHU5ia5CMCD5H9s_D-OoT8JxKaXgnA_Gul3_WyaJpkJkby1VGlJPUGda708h2cJUh7JTZHBuSLIdcOq5aFIaLo4kICA==&c=q1a52PWdLIp95OUOK1pQAqws7c5jfTGMC-L4n54ZMFKeBBX0rgclZg==&ch=yEaXNO1X7j43uc__diYPT_K05cDr6rRfTs8HBskOl7Sk5l18cgQO4A==)

name: Kash Patel
subject: What else are they lying about?
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79559%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d6IMgF8N%2byZ1BsY9%2fRw2Pw&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79550%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ywNjaiEniriKw5RPkjsojA&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79567%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Co4QYCJGtqQmiFeWj4KK8w&sysid=1)

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _“insurrectionists,”_ then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

[_**Friend, I am raising $33,000 to fund our legal battles to support the January 6th defendants in court. Will you send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79561%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LHFQXxSuoWpwsCf%2b5aLcZQ&sysid=1)

I know all about this firsthand. I’ve seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I’ve even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

| | **I can't believe we only have 8 days until Election Day.**
Our opponent is starting to spend big $$$ against us and outside groups are taking notice. That means right now is a great time to make a contribution if you have been thinking about it or have an outstanding pledge. [_**Friend, **__**can you help us finish strong with a $25 contribution today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60811426/398295370/-3148201?refcode=20230327_BC&amount=25&refcode2=e1e1a5a4-cecc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWUxYTVhNC1jZWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2rYBdKmOfpdxuO-PXXA2nB1dVs3yFfXEcX9PeEVUzao=) Because of your continued and generous support we have been able to increase our outreach with radio, mailers, and a robust tv buy. clean_body: Election Day is quickly approaching. Right now is a great time to support our campaign. = | | I can't believe we only have 8 days until Election Day. Our opponent is starting to spend big $$$ against us and outside groups are taking notice. That means right now is a great time to make a contribution if you have been thinking about it or have an outstanding pledge. = Because of your continued and generous support we have been able to increase our outreach with radio, mailers, and a robust tv buy. We are getting our message out to every corner of the county, a message that you can fully fund key services like women's health, infrastructure, broadband expansion and job creation and still have balanced budgets with declining tax rates. We can't let up now. Elections statewide are counting on voter turnout in the Fox Valley. That's why we need your help to protect democracy and re-elect an executive with a track record of getting things done for his county. = Let's finish strong! Yours, Tom Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson is running for re-election for Outagamie County Executive. He is honored to have had your support over the years and hopes to earn it again. We have accomplished a lot — a declining tax rate, AAA bond rating, fully-funded services — but much work lies ahead. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Friends of Nelson Friends of Nelson PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

name: Birch Gold Group
subject: “Worse Than The SVB Collapse” – Dr. Ron Paul
body:
But as bad as it was, there is something far worse.

| | | |
# **Forget The Banking Collapse, This Is Worse!**
---
### **Forget The Banking Collapse, This Is Worse!**
| | | The collapse of Silicon Valley Bank (America's 16th largest lender) was _**one of the most severe bank failures in American history!**_

But as bad as it was, there is **something far worse.**

Something with much more fallout and damage! I'm talking about **the collapse of the U.S. Dollar!**

We are in the death throes of this happening right before our eyes. It started when Nixon took America off the gold standard in the 1970s. And continues today with the debt ceiling being raised every year. Which allows the government to print infinite amounts of money.

When this finally comes to a head, Americans will face a rapidly deteriorating financial situation:

* The average American lifestyle **_will cost more and more every month_** _._ And this will push many people below the poverty line.
* Retirement account values will suddenly crash as companies lose massive amounts of income and business _(because their customers are cutting back on expenses)_.

Is there something you can do to protect yourself? YES! And...
