name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on Trial
body:
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653332%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F8JlJZ8Q%2fFD0wlaoxsqa%2bg&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653333%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mvFoWVdqZ7bz2z77gBB%2bDg&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653332%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F8JlJZ8Q%2fFD0wlaoxsqa%2bg&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653334%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HGS1oR%2bf5XLf24wBAUxFRQ&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653332%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F8JlJZ8Q%2fFD0wlaoxsqa%2bg&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653345%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vpuy2Ud0UTTDNmElMlrGqA&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653346%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U%2f4QKEGThzKKXfV6XO6WWg&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653347%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yqm46tPp5TNJfCmciGRBUw&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
body:
Counting on you.

Friend, my team and I just set our first end-of-quarter goal of the year – and before I ask you to help us reach it, I need to explain why this is so important.
Experts at CNN are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country – and I am a top GOP target for defeat. We can defy the odds and win this race – but not without critical grassroots support from folks like you.
Please, friend, will you chip in any amount – split between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester’s – right now to help us hit our ambitious end-of-quarter goal, win in Ohio, and defend the Senate for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023_lbr4sb?refcode=EM_FR_20230327_LBR4SB]
I’m determined to keep up the fight for workers and families in Ohio – and to defend our Senate majority so we can continue making desperately needed progress for the American people. But I simply cannot defend my battleground seat and deliver this progress without you by my side.
So please, before midnight tonight, can I count on you to make a critically important donation – split between my campaign and Lisa Blunt Rochester’s – so we can hit our crucial end-of-quarter fundraising goal and power our reelection campaign to victory? Every dollar counts as we work to combat dangerous GOP extremism and defend our Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023_lbr4sb?refcode=EM_FR_20230327_LBR4SB]
It means so much to have you on this team, friend. Thanks for chipping in.
With gratitude,
Sherrod Brown
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2023_lbr4sb?refcode=EM_FR_20230327_LBR4SB]
Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for CongressLisa Blunt Rochester for Congress
PO BOX 9767
Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

name: Kash Patel
subject: January 6th committee lied to you
body:
I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo566n2pqlts1vs53ni558mb2qb1emqp82mp8c0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjgm9o36cph2bs)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: I'm personally reaching out to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, it's Jacky Rosen. I wanted to take a moment to share how grateful I am for this grassroots team.
Without people like you, I never would have been able to flip this battleground seat blue back in 2018 – or made history as the first former computer programmer and synagogue president ever elected to the Senate.
Thank you for standing by my side in the crucial fight to uphold our democracy and make a real difference for working families. You inspire me every day to be tireless in our efforts to defend reproductive freedom, secure commonsense gun safety reform, protect Social Security and Medicare, and so much more.
**And finally, thank you for fueling my very first reelection campaign as we fight to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue. Because the fact of the matter is that Senate control hinges on whether we win this race.**
It won't be easy, friend. After _The Washington Post_ called me one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, the GOP made me a top target for defeat – and they're already launching attack ads against me.

In the last Senate race here, Mitch McConnell and his allies flooded Nevada with over $55 MILLION and came within less than 8,000 votes of winning – a fraction of a percentage point. Our race could be just as close.
**So the only way I'll be able to fight back and defend this must-win seat is with overwhelming grassroots support, friend. ****That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask:

[Can I count on you to pitch in what you can – whether it's $5, $25 or more – to help me win in Nevada, defend our razor-thin Democratic Senate majority, and continue fighting for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60827254/398315790/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2429-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDQ1YTY4Ny1kZmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LVRu9TrTv0LXSI6L2ndnj-ZVAtuCzdIGxKLc6l3ZwN4=)**
Thank you again for all you do. With your support, I know we can – and _will_ – win.
Humbly,

Sen. Jacky Rosen
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=6QOnwrGUpYyqWbN%2Fzyad0RBSO38ln4S%2FGhzC%2FcCZ4p%2B9K7Xr74rysgDn8TGRocqoX6CWWaZY4S3D5ddszh%2Bp81sMqCTUI1CXsbCzrorQZtZiYad7v3nesGjWVTcj3ZG1Bk6ihcpspwVfVvEc8GOwyIf9xa9Yk2HWM4SbR9CTacMLT11FupEqwEAcPa7Idc1tr9zIcKXpRIL2OIJJu4TxlmeP%2Bmo7O0FkfgKi%2BIGionPUBguGO15Ok2bbPWIbea2dp5zOALx%2BZVffmYbKozPj7q%2FrEoEgTcmNsxqAtNxzilsSgwmgMlMkr9gY2Mb4SZ4TB3r8Gis0Y3lDcYk9aXyYYp8zMVIDA4zLY0pE0WEd6ZTUriRvNqOxPQKcXJECO0C1O0qGKOm7PvTOC0vk5B%2BuKjcosLt%2BUSeHs0tANS2uFX4%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

While Republicans were able to take the House by a thin margin, Eric managed to fend them off from this battleground district. And now the GOP will double down here in 2024 to solidify their weak grip in Congress. **As you read this email, political pundits are calling IL-17 “the most competitive House race in Illinois,” and Republicans have explicitly called Eric out as a top target for this election cycle.** What I appreciate most about Eric is that even though he’s made it to Washington, he's still that hometown meteorologist who made the decision to run a people-powered campaign that depended on individual donors – his neighbors. Running for Congress was a risk, but ultimately, his belief and values won over the people of Northwest and Central Illinois. Right now, we are in the homestretch of Eric’s first FEC deadline as an elected member of Congress. Your support will be critical in his and his team’s strategy to keep the GOP at bay and IL-17 blue: **[Will you please make a donation today? Every dollar given will go toward re-electing Eric and helping Democrats win back the House in 2024.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqAQfDazIGQL5RUyCDnnnxJDfdyJUN2xzGyF7QBCnK1ZesfrGnDrBoenzgwWZMMxcs8EnR9O1FrK9AJ-UrRgCLBAtkV7cpDM9hWasH5EkRIWlvJ2Mez3wBYf7CwySMgsYk5i5M81op6S24tqiZX91jiNvOnsoTzdOABNRrImnq1C8Mv1GpxdgHYe2jLQNTHEt6f_iiFl6ihSQFR12bZFR-wbNkPAiVS_PNOjGbp9iOm-bKo517Rc1GWoa8JSLsr_KfGX223yG9i3bN3m_K-xCVrubPD1G8v0pe7GCv0F3BWXM_EhIiXK5-eFt2fE-pLgUSwG4WhuP6S-4qCkPMDL5RMf72_Z8doUYJeu-gMwvsZz1M/3uu/taqMGVW5R2KrqHYffARDPA/h3/bf7bzbv51nC6Z2De0MQJBsNgZ_HjtcQk3uzRveGroys)** Thank you so much for your support, Peter. clean_body: | | Hi Peter, it’s Senator Tammy Duckworth. I have a special request today—one I don't make very often. I'm asking you to join me in supporting Eric Sorensen's campaign to keep Illinois' 17th Congressional District blue. While Republicans were able to take the House by a thin margin, Eric managed to fend them off from this battleground district. And now the GOP will double down here in 2024 to solidify their weak grip in Congress. As you read this email, political pundits are calling IL-17 “the most competitive House race in Illinois,” and Republicans have explicitly called Eric out as a top target for this election cycle. What I appreciate most about Eric is that even though he’s made it to Washington, he's still that hometown meteorologist who made the decision to run a people-powered campaign that depended on individual donors – his neighbors. Running for Congress was a risk, but ultimately, his belief and values won over the people of Northwest and Central Illinois. Right now, we are in the homestretch of Eric’s first FEC deadline as an elected member of Congress. Your support will be critical in his and his team’s strategy to keep the GOP at bay and IL-17 blue: Thank you so much for your support, Peter. Tammy Duckworth | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. Dear Friend,
Although most of our brackets are in shambles after this tournament, I’m hoping to salvage the last few days of March and raise a final few thousand dollars to end the first fundraising quarter strong.
As the youngest candidate and still somewhat of a political outsider compared to others in the race, I need to raise a significant amount of money before the end of the month to show that we can win this thing. We still have about $60,000 to go and we have under five days to raise it.
[**Can you help us close the gap with a contribution of $100 today?**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=d98d7505f2&e=1012843e9c)
While we all love the drama of March Madness, we want to ensure that the madness ends on the basketball court and doesn't extend to the political arena. With your generous contribution, we can focus on fighting for the issues that matter most to our community instead of spending countless hours chasing dollars.
| [Chip in $100](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=39a428a8e3&e=1012843e9c)
---
Thanks for giving what you can today and for being a part of our team. Let's win this together!
|

I need a historic response — 5,117 gifts before midnight — to jump on this massive swing in our direction, build an unprecedented foundation of grassroots donors, and rush resources to our most critical races. We don’t have long before Republicans catch wind of our momentum and launch expensive attacks to sabotage it. I would be so grateful for any generous gift you can spare to reclaim our Majority. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60804386/398275536/1694452237?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY5YmE5ZC1iY2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfOjPhRA9OPWFzhcf9BnSZ85arPr3vmN2xIcinkx5QY=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60804387/398275537/1694452237?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY5YmE5ZC1iY2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfOjPhRA9OPWFzhcf9BnSZ85arPr3vmN2xIcinkx5QY=)

name: Team Lizzie
subject: #TeamLizzie Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230327 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230327]
It’s hard to believe that it’s almost the end of the first quarter of the 2024 election cycle. Over the last three months, Lizzie and the team have been going to events around the district — connecting with voters and volunteers who have worked so hard to get us where we are today!
From catching up with friends and supporters at home to connecting with national leaders, from Rodeo to Roe v. Wade , we’ve been connecting with #TeamLizzie and talking about what is next for us, and what is at stake in the 2024 election.
Here are just a few highlights for you, including pics from visits with Oak Forest Democrats, Meyerland Democrats, Run Sister Run, RODEO Houston, and NARAL Pro-Choice America.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230327 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230327]
Lizzie isn’t just focused on campaigning, she’s focused on governing. We’ve all witnessed the chaos that the new Republican House majority has brought — from the dangerous bills they have brought to the House floor in Washington to the important work they are leaving behind or trying to undo. Lizzie is there to keep us moving forward.
As we close Women’s History Month, with all the good we have to celebrate, we are also reminded of how much work we have left to do.
It’s worth noting that #TeamLizzie made history in 2018 by electing the first woman to Congress from #TX07. Now she is working to restore and protect access to reproductive care for women in Texas and across the country, she’s supporting the Paycheck Fairness Act to ensure equal pay for equal work, she’s continuing the work to expand health care access, and so much more.
Through it all, Lizzie has stayed focused on bringing the voice to #TX07 to Washington, D.C. and delivering for her constituents at home.
https://cw39.com/traffic/congresswoman-lizzie-fletcher-secures-5-million-for-houston-metros-westheimer-boost-project-for-route-with-highest-ridership-in-texas/ [https://cw39.com/traffic/congresswoman-lizzie-fletcher-secures-5-million-for-houston-metros-westheimer-boost-project-for-route-with-highest-ridership-in-texas/]
https://cw39.com/traffic/congresswoman-lizzie-fletcher-secures-5-million-for-houston-metros-westheimer-boost-project-for-route-with-highest-ridership-in-texas/ [https://cw39.com/traffic/congresswoman-lizzie-fletcher-secures-5-million-for-houston-metros-westheimer-boost-project-for-route-with-highest-ridership-in-texas/]
In case you missed it, Lizzie secured funding to improve Houston METRO’s Westheimer bus route — which runs through the heart of TX-07 and has the highest ridership in all of Texas — including bus stop enhancements, new bus shelters, and easier boarding platforms. Lizzie’s efforts will help ensure Houston commuters have accessible, affordable, and efficient transit options.
READ MORE [https://cw39.com/traffic/congresswoman-lizzie-fletcher-secures-5-million-for-houston-metros-westheimer-boost-project-for-route-with-highest-ridership-in-texas/]
This first quarter has kept us all busy! We are so glad to have Collin Steele back on the team again, and to have such engaged and dedicated supporters across the district, the state, and the country. It’s crucial that we continue our work together as a team to elect leaders in Texas and across our country who will support equality, freedom, and justice for all.
Before the quarter is over on March 31, you will hear from us a few more times because these milestones are also deadlines — and it would be a great finish to the quarter if you can help us make our fundraising goal, too! You can help us by donating here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230327]
Thanks for being a part of the team,
Team Lizzie
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230327]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636

clean_body: [] It’s hard to believe that it’s almost the end of the first quarter of the 2024 election cycle. Over the last three months, Lizzie and the team have been going to events around the district — connecting with voters and volunteers who have worked so hard to get us where we are today! From catching up with friends and supporters at home to connecting with national leaders, from Rodeo to Roe v. Wade , we’ve been connecting with #TeamLizzie and talking about what is next for us, and what is at stake in the 2024 election. Here are just a few highlights for you, including pics from visits with Oak Forest Democrats, Meyerland Democrats, Run Sister Run, RODEO Houston, and NARAL Pro-Choice America. [] Lizzie isn’t just focused on campaigning, she’s focused on governing. We’ve all witnessed the chaos that the new Republican House majority has brought — from the dangerous bills they have brought to the House floor in Washington to the important work they are leaving behind or trying to undo. Lizzie is there to keep us moving forward. As we close Women’s History Month, with all the good we have to celebrate, we are also reminded of how much work we have left to do. It’s worth noting that #TeamLizzie made history in 2018 by electing the first woman to Congress from #TX07. Now she is working to restore and protect access to reproductive care for women in Texas and across the country, she’s supporting the Paycheck Fairness Act to ensure equal pay for equal work, she’s continuing the work to expand health care access, and so much more. Through it all, Lizzie has stayed focused on bringing the voice to #TX07 to Washington, D.C. and delivering for her constituents at home. [] [] In case you missed it, Lizzie secured funding to improve Houston METRO’s Westheimer bus route — which runs through the heart of TX-07 and has the highest ridership in all of Texas — including bus stop enhancements, new bus shelters, and easier boarding platforms. Lizzie’s efforts will help ensure Houston commuters have accessible, affordable, and efficient transit options. READ MORE [] This first quarter has kept us all busy! We are so glad to have Collin Steele back on the team again, and to have such engaged and dedicated supporters across the district, the state, and the country. It’s crucial that we continue our work together as a team to elect leaders in Texas and across our country who will support equality, freedom, and justice for all. Before the quarter is over on March 31, you will hear from us a few more times because these milestones are also deadlines — and it would be a great finish to the quarter if you can help us make our fundraising goal, too! You can help us by donating here. [] Thanks for being a part of the team, Team Lizzie DONATE [] PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Lizzie Fletcher for Congress 3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636 Houston, TX 77098 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

clean_body: Only days left until our Q1 DEADLINE | Peter, It was great patriots like YOU who stood by me last week as the radical Left swarmed my district with false television ads and billboards attacking my conservative leadership. But we’re not out of the woods yet, as we’re still $37,923 behind our Q1 fundraising goal with just DAYS LEFT until the deadline. This is EXACTLY what the Democrats wanted when they began their recent Ad assault against me. And if we lack the resources we need to win next year, the Left will DESTROY our conservative House majority and impose their will on the American people. Thank you, Scott Fitzgerald Congressman (WI-05) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

name: Aurora Regino
subject: They tried to "transition" my daughter without telling me
body:
I never thought it would be me.

| |
---
| | My Fellow concerned American,I never thought it would be me. I’d seen the news headlines and the crazy videos of activist teachers talking about how they indoctrinated students with ideas about sexuality and gender, against parents' wishes and behind their backs...But I never thought in a million years it would happen to my family._And then it did._ My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss.In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school.She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy’s name asking to be called a “he.” It took just minutes.All of this was done without my knowledge – and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. [**So, I’m suing Chico Unified School District with the help of the Center for American Liberty – not for damages, or for emotional distress, but to put an end to its “Parental Secrecy Policy” that directs teachers and staff to hide a child’s “social transition” from parents.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr7ogn23anlh3c5v80i5edna12r1ua436uj30vt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjim0o72cdh2bs) Because when we win this lawsuit, we’ll set a precedent nationwide.My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her “new identity” right away – because I’m her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally.**_But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it._** She encouraged her to “come out” to her teachers, her peers – everyone but me.It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn’t because the school notified me or because my daughter told me.It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me.And thankfully we were able to put an end to this.My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl.But I know we were the lucky ones.I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. And in my state, they could’ve done all of it behind my back.But I’m not moving; I’m fighting back!Because the truth is, what starts in California never stays here.But I don’t stand a chance without you. [**Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my lawsuit today, and take a stand for American children and parental rights?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znaf2bv6k75pgcs44dbp57qdcb1fuocdqa15k8vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjim0o72cdh2bs) We’re up against an evil unlike anything I’ve seen in my life – and it grows more powerful by the day. But the truth is on our side.When patriotic Americans come together, it doesn’t matter who stands against us.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | Aurora Regino
---

My 11-year-old daughter went to the guidance counselor, after a death in our family, for help processing that loss.In a meeting that was supposed to help my daughter manage her grief, her guidance counselor convinced her to begin identifying as a boy at school.She went into that office as my daughter and left with a boy’s name asking to be called a “he.” It took just minutes.All of this was done without my knowledge – and even worse, the school told her to hide all of this from me. Because when we win this lawsuit, we’ll set a precedent nationwide.My daughter might have wanted to tell me about her “new identity” right away – because I’m her mother, she trusts me, and she knows I love her unconditionally.But her guidance counselor discouraged her from talking to me about it. She encouraged her to “come out” to her teachers, her peers – everyone but me.It was two months after the initial meeting by the time I found out what was going on, and it wasn’t because the school notified me or because my daughter told me.It was because my daughter told my mother who then told me.And thankfully we were able to put an end to this.My daughter is doing well. She goes by the name I gave her, and knows she is a girl.But I know we were the lucky ones.I know that if the school had its way, my daughter might be on medications and thinking about dangerous surgeries, changing her body forever, putting her own health at risk. name: John Pierce
subject: BREAKING: FBI destroyed January 6 evidence, committed felonies
body:
The FBI admitted that in electronic documents they thought had been erased.
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486612:JXvlx9GNC:m:1:3365131770:1C80FDF46515F7042227BE14C30ED4C4:r)
Dear Patriot,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486612:JXvlx9GNC:m:1:3365131770:1C80FDF46515F7042227BE14C30ED4C4:r) [ **If you 're sick of the FBI treating Americans' Constitutional rights like _trash_ , it's absolutely crucial for you to give a critical donation immediately. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486612:JXvlx9GNC:m:1:3365131770:1C80FDF46515F7042227BE14C30ED4C4:r)

My associate, attorney Roger Roots, has filed a motion to dismiss the government's bogus case against innocent American Dominic Pezzola.

In fact, he's filed for a mistrial.

Not only because Tucker Carlson revealed videos that prove the government suppressed video evidence that can clear January 6 defendants of their alleged crimes.

**But because the government illegally monitored communications between at least one attorney and his January 6 defendant ...and the FBI DESTROYED EVIDENCE AND FABRICATED EVIDENCE to railroad innocent patriots! **

The FBI admitted that in electronic documents they thought had been erased.

Patriot, this is a critically important, breaking story. Very few Americans know what you just read.

Expect to see much more about this on cable news and hear much more about on conservative talk radio.

**What the FBI is doing to innocent January 6 protesters is VICIOUS and ILLEGAL.**

And I'm not going to let them get away with it.

I'm going to fight tooth and nail in court for each of the 30 patriots who desperately depend on you and me to defend them.

As you know, they face years, even decades, in prison for crimes they didn't commit.

They need all the help they can get.

And to be frank, so does NCLU. We need lawyers, paralegals, investigators, and more to help build our cases and to fight for our clients in the courtroom.

**We 're stretched to the breaking point.**

[ **Patriot, please help NCLU fully fund each of these critical cases with your very best gift of at least a vital donation immediately.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486612:JXvlx9GNC:m:1:3365131770:1C80FDF46515F7042227BE14C30ED4C4:r)

These court cases are underway as you read this urgent email.

[**So please don 't delay - give what you can right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486612:JXvlx9GNC:m:1:3365131770:1C80FDF46515F7042227BE14C30ED4C4:r)

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Founder and General Counsel
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, the FBI is destroying evidence that can clear January 6 defendants ...and making up fake evidence to railroad them. ** This is a crisis for our country and our Constitution.

[ **Please help NCLU defend our innocent clients against the FBI and DOJ with your best gift now.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62486612:JXvlx9GNC:m:1:3365131770:1C80FDF46515F7042227BE14C30ED4C4:r)

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE
THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS.

These court cases are underway as you read this urgent email. In Vigilance, John M. Pierce Founder and General Counsel National Constitutional Law Union P.S. Patriot, the FBI is destroying evidence that can clear January 6 defendants ...and making up fake evidence to railroad them. This is a crisis for our country and our Constitution. DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS. Hey friend, it’s Greg.

Over the next week, you may notice more emails than usual from me and my team – _and I wanted to take a moment to explain why._

**Friday, March 31st marks our first end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline of the 2024 campaign cycle.** This means, after the end of the month, all of our _internal fundraising data will become public._

Look, extremist Washington Republicans are _already_ attacking me and targeting our district – so we know they’re going to scrutinize our fundraising report looking for signs of weakness to exploit. Posting a strong first quarter total could not be more important.

**This will be a defining moment for our campaign, and I need your help.[To ensure we finish the quarter strong, my team set a goal of raising $8,000 online before Friday night. Can I count on you to pitch in to help us reach our first end-of-quarter goal of the new election cycle?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60806517/398283646/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.27_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNTM5OS1jM2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCUMF9sR1gm5Nk4tZF9DDcv2BkVj6jQG3SxuQR3fo2k=)**

**It’s impossible to overstate the importance of this next election.** Kevin McCarthy and his MAGA Republican allies have wasted no time using their House Majority to chip away at our fundamental freedoms and reverse the progress we’ve made. And they’ve made it clear they’ll stop at nothing to hold on to power.

I know the 2024 election may seem far off, but to take back the House, defend our district, and deliver for Southwest Ohioans, we have to start building our campaign infrastructure and showcasing the strength of our grassroots team now. _And reaching our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal allows us to do just that._

[**You know I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t absolutely critical to our success. Please, is there any amount you can donate before our first end-of-quarter deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60806519/398283648/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.27_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjRiNTM5OS1jM2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vCUMF9sR1gm5Nk4tZF9DDcv2BkVj6jQG3SxuQR3fo2k=)

| | Derek, As your Senator and a proud Democrat, I know firsthand the importance of electing strong Democratic leaders who will fight for our values and make a real difference in people's lives. That's why I'm reaching out to you today to ask for your support in helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Virginia. We have a crucial election coming up, and the stakes have never been higher. We need to elect leaders who will work tirelessly to create good-paying jobs, invest in education and infrastructure, and ensure access to affordable healthcare for all Virginians. But we can't do it without your help. The Republican opposition is already gearing up to pour millions of dollars into their campaigns, backed by big corporate donors and special interests. We need to fight back with the power of grassroots donations from people like you. **_[**Can you make a contribution today to help elect Democrats in Virginia, split between DPVA and my team?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60806587/398283994/150936960?refcode=dpva-em-230327-warner&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM0ZjdlMi1jM2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTFpFPMW9sJ-yRNW6lEYe8UewqCPutEP2pruAL4mKIY=)_** Your support will go directly towards helping our candidates get their message out to voters, mobilizing volunteers, and ensuring we have the resources we need to win in November. We have a chance to make real progress for Virginia families, but we can only do it if we stand together and fight for our values. **_[**Please join me in supporting Democrats up and down the ballot by splitting a contribution between my team and the Democratic Party of Virginia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60806588/398283995/150936960?refcode=dpva-em-230327-warner&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM0ZjdlMi1jM2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTFpFPMW9sJ-yRNW6lEYe8UewqCPutEP2pruAL4mKIY=)_** Thank you for your continued support, Senator Mark Warner ** ** ** ** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60806589/398283996/150936960?refcode=dpva-em-230327-warner&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODM0ZjdlMi1jM2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTFpFPMW9sJ-yRNW6lEYe8UewqCPutEP2pruAL4mKIY=)**** ** **

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A big announcement from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
I’m making it official today and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.**
Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One:
[**Can you split a $5 donation right now to support my re-election campaign and the critical work that Mandela Barnes’ Long Run PAC is doing? I’d be deeply grateful to have your support as I take on this new righteous fight alongside other bold candidates across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em230327-1-t2&t=1&akid=4292%2E196590%2EYcls9q)
I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else.
I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including:
* Getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk
* Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits
* Lowering the cost of hearing aids
* Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal
* Even making billionaires cry on national TV

Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.
**We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change.**
[**Please make a contribution to support my re-election campaign and the Long Run PAC today, if you can. Every contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up and helps show that there’s strong support for our plans and our values.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-warren-split.-45zWj&refcode=em230327-1-t2&t=2&akid=4292%2E196590%2EYcls9q)
Side by side, let’s rebuild the middle class, root corruption out of our government, and strengthen our democracy.
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4292%2E196590%2EYcls9q). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=4292%2E196590%2EYcls9q)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=4292_196590_Ycls9q&akid=4292%2E196590%2EYcls9q)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=4292%2E196590%2EYcls9q)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03627%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IgQS1npbfCt1utySE%2boC7Q&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03628%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kxEnPQy2yh%2fy6KbI5FmNDw&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03628%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kxEnPQy2yh%2fy6KbI5FmNDw&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Your America News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7387%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2fLx2h1PpL4idt%2bivzEjwVQ&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03629%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M2Smq05ZJpyJ5RDkFpQk5g&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c03620%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=La%2bQ%2bjhIdDa52ZsJXFjEWw&sysid=1)_
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7387%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=%2fLx2h1PpL4idt%2bivzEjwVQ&sysid=1)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A big announcement from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | I’m making it official today, Peter, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.** Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One: **[Peter, can you split a donation right now to support my re-election campaign and the critical work that the Working Families Party is doing? I’d be deeply grateful to have your support as I take on this new righteous fight alongside other progressive champions across the country.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUSWbSvqc_UcghfheLxaD68BLZFViPaOOqf8AbP-woGIg0Y5qAapz5L_7QDKxRBWvreHoFMxQWux-GVNuB4p6g5o1Bk8b6TgV9Iynhp_hLuW-d1ijIOvgpI2dPRli5w2O2vuqvIQ4WXGU58Kvj9bA2291Y3WXvzP8gF2CxZAT8J3guBGF23pcJflRdBpp2sgyAJj8Rfy1HRoir6nxHah1u3dbsyLL569JGs6ASS0sg0PbIq0-jC-rmOayr6u_lc0XlGP82fcqpXheAS3Bq1ESZTn8OxgyGePr3c6b3uiOPK9p9TwJCoFvp-3AjUzTWbPKtPNMJ5FcBRyM36jN6zFAobw/3uu/dJ0zSoPkSDi79xb45znCAg/h0/nnYkwk2S4KfmOh3zVKPIfADPgkpJBUkOSmwFMje5UtQ)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUSWbSvqc_UcghfheLxaD68BLZFViPaOOqf8AbP-woGIg0Y5qAapz5L_7QDKxRBWvr62lYwGTnfpJm5jJ3tTZ0cDrgy_If_twSeTE2HrKcamHQDOrAU6sTFuCiz4GULcJhLng-BvRINRca7-BYrlXeNSAQNLqZX0c4-99sUgbWFcGLTsymoGqksXHhozNArioYU249pANZV8C0BBnxFbqgOQ5VF7_VNvF8JGlRDXYjFCTIJpQbuRwHZsrDXkToQAy29ViXAwMAZE6kcRpFVYPyGSdj1r0duJzCzPayUORWaOJ16D0age_eY6mjb9kjPe2bphbCD24PUYIBXrQpocEDrw/3uu/dJ0zSoPkSDi79xb45znCAg/h1/7bGpqRUnv0uUdEtcvbDERj5SVLVCLeNaWq7yfl96cS0)** I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else.
I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including:
* Getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk
* Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits
* Lowering the cost of hearing aids
* Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal
* Even making billionaires cry on national TV

Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top. **We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change.** **[Please make a contribution to support my re-election campaign and the Working Families Party before Friday’s critical end-of-quarter deadline, if you can. Every contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up and helps show that there’s strong support for our plans and our values. Side by side, let’s rebuild the middle class, root corruption out of our government, and strengthen our democracy.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUSWbSvqc_UcghfheLxaD68BLZFViPaOOqf8AbP-woGIg0Y5qAapz5L_7QDKxRBWvrIMTa-TAelLWfI6g_GbUquveH9HBc1AV2QoCqrWvYlkaSER9ymnUKEwSIX_yTnBN4d0OcDGG2-ZOWcoCLtD-K_-oLCOPik9C3wFnySLix2YXhsIp68aroiaWjo1SOUrZ1LcKg0kYxc59sl7fDtdY70ZMS9h9IZ5n7DwbMWMRQwFsUnCWLA_91Vq8upAYjl4AlCtwadwxt7WAQhlhzCZKf5LT_DFsWtHjgM-1fqegNYzaWkhsBqtL7IIhYf1aBLK9htEIs-_uMxJC8rrssMFIMIg/3uu/dJ0zSoPkSDi79xb45znCAg/h2/hobgFVTRu3XwjzjrhJUaLmMuS9polyIJyYtRmxJZ3DA)** **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUSWbSvqc_UcghfheLxaD68BLZFViPaOOqf8AbP-woGIg0Y5qAapz5L_7QDKxRBWvrnfXwF24i6ZnM7acRwNg35UV0XgRXwPwphcf4557leZ897SBOTH5UMDw5xTkp8vSn_w5eBlC6uKudoisSPyAtRDOfA9haAWrAV2B77Q-qg4VjwXoc6sFj1Go6uk4w4GIGaM3_UHkK_vsLdZd-0xDT5JaLOgktIIGQoCFQSFu6S59tloDpXbjNniHrBmGb33VporCU8tfBpCPaB6RI8N8odq7n6zYAqeLiaoz0u-bi_x8WopUkHd8RMDEutL1pEKVqP3w5Lg8gVCGz48TO8mW62w/3uu/dJ0zSoPkSDi79xb45znCAg/h3/rGc_yWnwh2Q0s327R4weRHTNq8DHnuNOHF0hXqlnwIA)** Thanks for being a part of this,

clean_body: | | | I’m making it official today, Peter, and I wanted you to hear it from me: I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year. Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One: I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including: Getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits Lowering the cost of hearing aids Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal Even making billionaires cry on national TV Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top. We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Rand Paul
subject: my question for Moderna’s CEO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
I recently went toe-to-toe with Moderna CEO Stéphane Bancel

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zca6ihb8reuk4ba95njmo37me4r4odmm3cuai8kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjim4or2c1h2bs)
---
Friend, I recently**_[went toe-to-toe](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z14tr74kr4dtd33ucsk8skrbgobibpv0te5tff3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjim4or2c1h2bs)_** with Moderna CEO Stéphane Bancel over his continual push to force parents into vaccinating their teenage sons, even after a kid suffers from myocarditis after getting the jab. And I asked him one simple question: **_Have YOU vaccinated your children?_** _[**See his response**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcgvjna8i71ihnplsir6esbnv93ccajnl7m6rgao_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjim4or2c1h2bs)_ ⬇️
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp451uvhs2mgis1oios263r2ospnpt2fngac4g10_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjim4or2c1h2bs)
---
[**WATCH THE CLIP**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqiuvhl0c512erhfnh192in0sija2i15d1ul0upo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjim4or2c1h2bs)
---
Friend, it’s a conflict of interest for people like Mr. Bancel and government officials to advocate and “recommend” the vaccine when they’re profiting off it – especially when our teenage sons are developing inflammation around their hearts. _[**_Help me fight against government bureaucrats and Big Pharma companies that continually push their vaccines at the expense of our children._**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6enkcs4m5pp1m3ae3dboa56hr95hc707s077fh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sjim4or2c1h2bs)_

**→ 3. Which is why I need your help to close out my first End of Quarter Deadline as Leader with a historic showing of Democratic strength.**

name: Grace Jo
subject: How I escaped North Korea
body:
The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80c33423ae8f4d379c93dcce57abc661&_e=eD9GXgUh_aSUM7yUF8GNwgzD1dr-0DVE_-IH86JYHgcGnMjiuAL12D_foitkjWJAaOSX0bFv4QCSx9AiWUF5PPvahWcH5p4Pd9ljO3N0ThEg-mjx0fqTp0Zkj9QtnPPQkaQgAVtTVFLhOJ5Xe2Bb1BSZP9Iwsf-QhBZOeHTLgFCIYV2HN23TftSx3g3mJEZfZz3iWtXjnv57ENWvUuVEb3WbY818SWFZUE3QqifBHx2Ovbk_A-DYUHNv5Vsv1dYUc7M99Uc_tTUIOc_uSEwChQ%3D%3D)
Hello Friend,

Fox News recently invited me to appear and speak with Rachel Campos-Duffy about how I escaped North Korea.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80c33423ae8f4d379c93dcce57abc661&_e=eD9GXgUh_aSUM7yUF8GNwgzD1dr-0DVE_-IH86JYHgcGnMjiuAL12D_foitkjWJAaOSX0bFv4QCSx9AiWUF5PPvahWcH5p4Pd9ljO3N0ThEg-mjx0fqTp0Zkj9QtnPPQX3TjauHLkLr64FGrlTlVXIWsB9009AOHGsaWK52fgAU1HooAew36b-IeqANkA5yCywF-pqwoa5ERQ93GeWRe99Bn_y38PcNwyPp8OwJufZtponTgmmAhHc8CBfCLo1kbWwaByMfrBCDtlfcxcd7Vwg%3D%3D)

_The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.**My mother even had to carry me in her backpack as she held my sister 's hand and swum across a river into China.**

But we were caught and sent back. This happened several times...

In North Korea, it is easy for the government to control everyone through starvation. From the moment I woke up to the moment I went to sleep, all I could think about was my next meal. That's all anyone could think about. _

That's only a small part of my story.

Thanks to the Dissident Project, I can share my story with students across the country. The Dissident Project provides high schools with informed, intelligent speakers with firsthand experience with authoritarianism, like me.

We provide this at no cost to the schools or students, which is why I am working to raise $5,000 this month.

[_**Friend, will you help fight authoritarianism with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to rush your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80c33423ae8f4d379c93dcce57abc661&_e=eD9GXgUh_aSUM7yUF8GNwgzD1dr-0DVE_-IH86JYHgcGnMjiuAL12D_foitkjWJAaOSX0bFv4QCSx9AiWUF5PPvahWcH5p4Pd9ljO3N0ThEg-mjx0fqTp0Zkj9QtnPPQ6vQsiOhm8UgnJBa_FBpmp8IeNYbHYt5Lg3OazyJLiTjaI6uZoM1Vfa8fuVxq4_jT9YOqwmGeZ2CHHpbZQQYNmrF92sMsnka2hZiO-tMsIFxBOvJCEqyKWzj8nJox1G29cvDw92ggGWxtSoDUstEDiw%3D%3D)

**Socialism is the worse government in the world. It kills people.**

High school students need to hear about the horrors of socialism and how it takes away everything and everyone you love. They don't know what it feels like to lay there, starving. Or how the government will punish you for merely doing whatever you can to survive.

Many students today think socialism is fair and equitable. Without hearing about experiences like mine, they will never have the chance to know about the true horrors until it's too late.

**Freedom is very precious in the United States, so we are responsible for protecting it for the future.**

Dissident Project speakers know how to connect our experiences to the principles that have made America prosperous and why we must defend them.

[_**Will you help us turn our experiences into a powerful warning for high school students? Then click here to send $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80c33423ae8f4d379c93dcce57abc661&_e=eD9GXgUh_aSUM7yUF8GNwgzD1dr-0DVE_-IH86JYHgcGnMjiuAL12D_foitkjWJAaOSX0bFv4QCSx9AiWUF5PPvahWcH5p4Pd9ljO3N0ThEg-mjx0fqTp0Zkj9QtnPPQTE1UvXPbQXnc3iI0idrZ_spGKsT5QVCtSKRakP-rwbMQqtKGXmj84lde4xxoDJ9re0l39er1bR_QCygCDO9VMlAIXibyUzyX-xzuZn5DldOW8He4W-3kse7cMfqSyUJ5yP41Ue9j-3W8VFWFE9jz2A%3D%3D)

We've spoken to 27 so far. But we're not even close to done - we have 50 engagements in total this year.

**Your generous gift provides this once-in-a-lifetime experience to schools for no charge.**

Can I count on you to help me share my story?**Click any link below to donate.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=80c33423ae8f4d379c93dcce57abc661&_e=eD9GXgUh_aSUM7yUF8GNwgzD1dr-0DVE_-IH86JYHgcGnMjiuAL12D_foitkjWJAaOSX0bFv4QCSx9AiWUF5PPvahWcH5p4Pd9ljO3N0ThH0T3lUpJkMkTgov5oS4HSv4oy6UyKM3wcJbwSMUNurB1AZnqnhP0Lt34L1NK1Nlqr4jE9meo119iZOT1uguZ83DgAi2h1zDGQjqJWf010dSQe9QIjIVRkFX_LI4EvDgMXlTZa361m2C1KqWUmugCJETeTjU_3JSi1N0iMUviqHZ-kQUPTCv0kvcEAQjK-tTOM%3D)

clean_body: The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain. Hello Friend, Fox News recently invited me to appear and speak with Rachel Campos-Duffy about how I escaped North Korea. The first time I tried to escape the regime, I was only 6 years old as we fled over a mountain.My mother even had to carry me in her backpack as she held my sister 's hand and swum across a river into China. But we were caught and sent back. This happened several times... In North Korea, it is easy for the government to control everyone through starvation. From the moment I woke up to the moment I went to sleep, all I could think about was my next meal. That's all anyone could think about. That's only a small part of my story. Thanks to the Dissident Project, I can share my story with students across the country. The Dissident Project provides high schools with informed, intelligent speakers with firsthand experience with authoritarianism, like me. We provide this at no cost to the schools or students, which is why I am working to raise $5,000 this month. Socialism is the worse government in the world. It kills people. High school students need to hear about the horrors of socialism and how it takes away everything and everyone you love. They don't know what it feels like to lay there, starving. Or how the government will punish you for merely doing whatever you can to survive. Many students today think socialism is fair and equitable. Without hearing about experiences like mine, they will never have the chance to know about the true horrors until it's too late. Freedom is very precious in the United States, so we are responsible for protecting it for the future. Dissident Project speakers know how to connect our experiences to the principles that have made America prosperous and why we must defend them. We've spoken to 27 so far. But we're not even close to done - we have 50 engagements in total this year. Your generous gift provides this once-in-a-lifetime experience to schools for no charge. Can I count on you to help me share my story?Click any link below to donate. Thank you, Grace Jo The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

---
| Dear Peter,

My first few months in Congress have been an exciting journey. I've learned a lot in Washington D.C., but one thing I have always known is that our community here on the San Francisco Peninsula is unique. [We have a strong sense of community that supports each other](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=f28ff5d91c&e=292fde286a).

I am so proud to represent you in Congress, but we need to make sure that I can continue to represent our strong, vibrant communities of San Mateo County and San Francisco and that I can deliver for my district. Our March 31st fundraising deadline is almost here. It's critical that we end the quarter with a strong showing, Peter. [Can you help me sustain my efforts on behalf of my district by supporting my campaign before our upcoming deadline?](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=138703998e&e=292fde286a)
---
| Sincerely,
Kevin Mullin

---
| | **Team, the first end-of-quarter deadline of the 2024 cycle is just days away.**

All campaigns submit fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission —** _and the numbers go public at the end of each quarter._** And the NRCC really does use them to gauge their chances of flipping seats and holding on to their majority in 2024.

That’s why I need to raise **$15,000 before this week’s deadline.** Meeting this goal is critical . New Jersey will be a battleground state in 2024, and if we don’t send a strong and clear message about the strength of our bipartisan movement, the NRCC might decide to come after NJ-05.

**[We need to show our strength from day 1 of this campaign, which means we have to go full-speed ahead NOW to prepare for what’s to come. Pitch in $10 ASAP to help us meet our $15,000 end-of-quarter goal and show the NRCC I’m not going anywhere →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60807627/398286815/-1358749296?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230327_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_JG_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzhkZTQ3Yi1jN2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=na0zimqxPOAPC0ywz2eUrkSP_HLviRfbziNrgxO_nqg=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

There has never been a more important time to fight for our House majority.

Finishing this quarter stronger than ever means we will have the resources necessary to expand voter outreach, defend NJ-05 from continued attacks by the NRCC, and continue to spread our message of bipartisan problem solving.

It’s only going to get more intense from here. Laying the groundwork _right now_ is critical. How we finish this quarter will set the tone for the rest of the race — let’s get to work!

clean_body: | | Team, the first end-of-quarter deadline of the 2024 cycle is just days away. All campaigns submit fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and the numbers go public at the end of each quarter. And the NRCC really does use them to gauge their chances of flipping seats and holding on to their majority in 2024. That’s why I need to raise $15,000 before this week’s deadline. Meeting this goal is critical . New Jersey will be a battleground state in 2024, and if we don’t send a strong and clear message about the strength of our bipartisan movement, the NRCC might decide to come after NJ-05. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = There has never been a more important time to fight for our House majority. Finishing this quarter stronger than ever means we will have the resources necessary to expand voter outreach, defend NJ-05 from continued attacks by the NRCC, and continue to spread our message of bipartisan problem solving. It’s only going to get more intense from here. Laying the groundwork right now is critical. How we finish this quarter will set the tone for the rest of the race — let’s get to work! = = Thank you, Josh Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: the first month of a Senate campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=79%2E135344%2ExZ59fe)
Friend —
It’s hard to believe it, but it’s been 1 month since I launched my campaign for the U.S. Senate.
In that time I’ve started my statewide listening tour with stops in Detroit, Flint, Grand Rapids, Lansing and back to Detroit. I’ve celebrated with my fellow Michiganders as our state continues to put our new Democratic majorities in the state House and Senate to good use with meaningful legislation. And, I’ve stood on the steps of the Michigan Capitol with lawmakers, activists, and brave MSU and Oxford students and survivors to demand action to prevent gun violence.
My main priority has been meeting as many Michiganders as I can to learn what they *actually* want from their next U.S. Senator. So far, I’ve heard about equality of opportunity for our kids, lowering the costs of healthcare and childcare, making it easier for small businesses to succeed, keeping our kids safe in their classrooms and communities, and bringing good-paying jobs back to Michigan from overseas.
This will be the largest operation Team Slotkin has ever run. We’re going from running in 7 counties to running in 83 counties. But we are going to run this campaign the way we’ve always done it: by listening to what the voters want, making a strategic plan, and implementing that plan effectively.
**But, in order to pull it off, we’re going to need your help. Michigan is a notoriously swingy state, and our elections are expensive. In honor of our one month anniversary, I’d love it if you’d chip in today to help us continue to put in the early work and keep this seat blue!**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Brian Lemek
subject: Will you join me?
body:
The absolute most important thing we can do right now is build a strong foundation to elect gun violence prevention champions.

| Peter,

My name is Brian Lemek, and I’m the Treasurer of the Stop Gun Violence PAC, a movement dedicated to recruiting and investing in candidates who understand the urgent need for gun violence prevention legislation.

As a responsible gun owner and veteran of the gun violence prevention movement, I’ve spent years working with legislators, volunteers, and survivors to find comprehensive solutions to this very complex problem.

We’ve made significant legislative gains in the last Congress, but the NRA and MAGA Republicans continue to push a “more guns everywhere” agenda that is making us all less safe.

**For that reason, leaders of the gun violence prevention space have partnered to create the Stop Gun Violence PAC –[ _and we’re asking you to join us today by signing your name to demand an end to gun violence._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60808110/398288460/867049791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgzZGZkMmMtYzljYy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k2YO6iEEZoLYCF5-ANEAl_9i21JIh8ATs-z2Ct3o_8o=&emci=3d3f9ba0-b0cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c83dfd2c-c9cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7937656)**

Hey, Fellow American it's Nancy Mace – the Congressman who dropped out of high school at age 17, worked at Waffle House to put food on the table and ended up being the first female to graduate from the Corps of Cadets program at the Citadel. [**I need a moment of your time.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=88d8c206f8b941d098c2a6d6428e0ace&_e=F1gIh52IX0pKbAtsRTCMN3aWNGUYQQIFppEvwTWhY2Lw7_n5MqOQwA8ldH1k2Xnx5vIdnyyVPzQq23gtdhDkZDB1BT0pxjG1-P9E_A3YREniqQ-quBATV9x8uwYk_5G0xw8OtLHs697fJhE6eZZGjWDxG9YaB8T6VAgyalpF6W2iaBGN9WPtr8g0f3r_t8OdcvORa3f_nZ7nOKZdz4SLiTGjPnJj04N_iweGtRYqvpemDn6yanLk0njAW19qhLNoJUCXpYmBDB8zhWKtWNPJXximnf5u8HrmBgs0SktjaUa2DbJFJ3vBkO8he6gi7_m83oyOUibSUogLrdj68hwIXejG_f7qU4qLe9Znpfex0yg2nYb3InkffwjmsFJ5LxVrNWF0XBe3T0Wb2oQ7-MEQ4Ak3aY9XewELBtviWSoM4ZQ%3D)

**_The short version:_**
I'm up against my first quarterly goal of the cycle and I'm short of my fundraising goal. [**I'm desperate and need to know if I can count on you before the hour is up.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=88d8c206f8b941d098c2a6d6428e0ace&_e=F1gIh52IX0pKbAtsRTCMN3aWNGUYQQIFppEvwTWhY2Lw7_n5MqOQwA8ldH1k2Xnx5vIdnyyVPzQq23gtdhDkZDB1BT0pxjG1-P9E_A3YREniqQ-quBATV9x8uwYk_5G0xw8OtLHs697fJhE6eZZGjWDxG9YaB8T6VAgyalpF6W2iaBGN9WPtr8g0f3r_t8OdcvORa3f_nZ7nOKZdz4SLiTGjPnJj04N_iweGtRYqvpemDn6yanLk0njAW19qhLNoJUCXpYmBDB8zhWKtWNPJX6mkAk5zCQAoMY8Kiz5_pDAIWZTnPGnfJLwHJb1X-AV7m4I7ML7C5ZoQjFm3yp2lKYx_CxSJ8Ce65dgy7awIPOIVIkVvyMJCwpJUwkncam0epf7yra4dwDAqxXbDA834yly_KoC9L464mYQdhgoOMEY%3D)

**_The long version:_**
This is what I didn't want to have to share with you, but I have nowhere else to turn. My team just let me know we are still more than 37% short of our first publicly accessible fundraising deadline, and if we don't meet it, we will be in a _very_ vulnerable position.

Keep in mind this seat was held by a Democrat in 2020, and they've been gunning to flip it back since then. **But I'm a fighter and I won't go down without a battle.**

You know how bad things are now... _but imagine how much worse they'll get if Democrats flip every purple seat like mine._

What's happening in America right now is _horrifying._ Kids are being used as political pawns, radical liberal ideas are becoming mainstream, the woke media is prioritizing clicks and views over the truth, and our so-called 'leaders' have sold themselves out for fame and fortune.

As Americans, we deserve __so much better than this.__ It's time to restore our economy, secure the southern border, put parents back in charge, support our military, and reestablish pride in our country.

So now you see why I **had** to reach out to you today and ask for your immediate help. [**Can I rely on you to make a secure donation today and help me keep this seat Republican?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=88d8c206f8b941d098c2a6d6428e0ace&_e=F1gIh52IX0pKbAtsRTCMN3aWNGUYQQIFppEvwTWhY2Lw7_n5MqOQwA8ldH1k2Xnx5vIdnyyVPzQq23gtdhDkZDB1BT0pxjG1-P9E_A3YREniqQ-quBATV9x8uwYk_5G0xw8OtLHs697fJhE6eZZGjWDxG9YaB8T6VAgyalpF6W2iaBGN9WPtr8g0f3r_t8OdcvORa3f_nZ7nOKZdz4SLiTGjPnJj04N_iweGtRYqvpemDn6yanLk0njAW19qhLNoJUCXpYmBDB8zhWKtWNPJX7jCOZ-48jjLkYAL9u0RO-PgT64ZXrcld_KqTLgti41Be4sbdbIt7oqe1C6eu4QH23cwqkANsDqTMvEsDoEd7KnZpkgzAPwTswaBjiuM_eHW2p9w9k-T_UbX2VjtZxy16P4_l5aNviY5tQanUQL6LE4%3D)

| [**_SECURE DONATE HERE_**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=88d8c206f8b941d098c2a6d6428e0ace&_e=F1gIh52IX0pKbAtsRTCMN3aWNGUYQQIFppEvwTWhY2Lw7_n5MqOQwA8ldH1k2Xnx5vIdnyyVPzQq23gtdhDkZDB1BT0pxjG1-P9E_A3YREniqQ-quBATV9x8uwYk_5G0xw8OtLHs697fJhE6eZZGjWDxG9YaB8T6VAgyalpF6W2iaBGN9WPtr8g0f3r_t8OdcvORa3f_nZ7nOKZdz4SLiTGjPnJj04N_iweGtRYqvpemDn6yanLk0njAW19qhLNoJUCXpYmBDB8zhWKtWNPJX026UNIwIGOuW9-1LYXS70sdnMG4rm-coPfvk8tJNQ3TJxPlE1GdEmS_qU9BTsbCecXFSLqLTgfM4EWGBxvPGPXOZUgXyHykBvWT3U1acoMM3RNLztnbGuMtjWLViEzNJs0e177XzOItvXb4r11EtcY%3D)
---

This race is shaping up to be _one of the most competitive seats next cycle,_ and we can't take any chances. Democrats are all in to take this back - we can't afford to fall short of any goals.

[**It's time to stand up and say enough is enough! I'm running for re-election because I believe I'm the woman who can help save our country.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=88d8c206f8b941d098c2a6d6428e0ace&_e=F1gIh52IX0pKbAtsRTCMN3aWNGUYQQIFppEvwTWhY2Lw7_n5MqOQwA8ldH1k2Xnx5vIdnyyVPzQq23gtdhDkZDB1BT0pxjG1-P9E_A3YREniqQ-quBATV9x8uwYk_5G0xw8OtLHs697fJhE6eZZGjWDxG9YaB8T6VAgyalpF6W2iaBGN9WPtr8g0f3r_t8OdcvORa3f_nZ7nOKZdz4SLiTGjPnJj04N_iweGtRYqvpemDn6yanLk0njAW19qhLNoJUCXpYmBDB8zhWKtWNPJX1ny9FBOlxCKGeSlD7pdVpSfEfjQ8mC8qzuZlIzL5bOYfSHp8ghlQLvusEdBrbiwxIqCMMk3xQrkykWDWr1-pSztbi9o6pV1uzCaLUGjxrog9_nsxfWq5E-QGdqiQZkS3uM5CNkMQT6O35tNv-SAqJA%3D) I'm in Washington week in and week out, fighting for you and your family – I have a 100% record of voting to lower taxes and a 100% lifetime rating with Conservation Voters of South Carolina!

[**I need to know if you'll have my back in this critical moment.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=88d8c206f8b941d098c2a6d6428e0ace&_e=F1gIh52IX0pKbAtsRTCMN3aWNGUYQQIFppEvwTWhY2Lw7_n5MqOQwA8ldH1k2Xnx5vIdnyyVPzQq23gtdhDkZDB1BT0pxjG1-P9E_A3YREniqQ-quBATV9x8uwYk_5G0xw8OtLHs697fJhE6eZZGjWDxG9YaB8T6VAgyalpF6W2iaBGN9WPtr8g0f3r_t8OdcvORa3f_nZ7nOKZdz4SLiTGjPnJj04N_iweGtRYqvpemDn6yanLk0njAW19qhLNoJUCXpYmBDB8zhWKtWNPJXywW0_Rh0FE8qUMXEaJ9e8uhYaVYZ1Pz-i0Sz75Hi0ayLMDCCQrgoc9ePKDTDyBMWlYFTHMZl3nC2MAt_Br5M21dWqL6EkMs4thIWUNEzlqjpVjm-gh7nCSbWAlimT9EmNrDDceMPvxGHjXctW137vw%3D)

For the First,

Nancy Mace
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=88d8c206f8b941d098c2a6d6428e0ace&_e=F1gIh52IX0pKbAtsRTCMN3aWNGUYQQIFppEvwTWhY2Lw7_n5MqOQwA8ldH1k2Xnx5vIdnyyVPzQq23gtdhDkZDB1BT0pxjG1-P9E_A3YREniqQ-quBATV9x8uwYk_5G0xw8OtLHs697fJhE6eZZGjWDxG9YaB8T6VAgyalpF6W2iaBGN9WPtr8g0f3r_t8OdcvORa3f_nZ7nOKZdz4SLiTGjPnJj04N_iweGtRYqvpemDn6yanLk0njAW19qhLNoJUCXpYmBDB8zhWKtWNPJX2BrWNhK7XIZrk6KGDJ7Uqg2QGQq33lUwzptogoY1iWNFaxKv9v3lpahTJkcX8kyCfAErzGsfqg3J1qEEz1UPydvoDaEP9SVfR7UuDBe-uHOV18laDakRjJG3-IB3kSsAAFhI9U3EpqhpoveowH7MWM%3D)

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

name: Britainy Beshear
subject: We tend to undervalue kindness.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Kentuckians deserve a governor that supports families. Hey Peter,

I've never doubted my husband's leadership skills — as a father, a community member, and as our governor.

I am constantly moved by his ability to continuously show up for the great people of Kentucky and still come home every day to our family with plenty of love and kindness in his heart.

Andy brings that kindness, authenticity, and strong leadership into the governor's office and it's proven through his track record. As governor, he vetoed the dangerous legislation labeled as the “worst anti-trans bill in the nation," he's supported Kentuckians who have been impacted by tornadoes and flooding, called for investments in public education to help every child reach their full potential, and he continues to put Kentucky families first at every turn.

Despite our progress, Andy knows too many Kentucky families are still struggling to get by. That's why he's putting people over politics and fighting for our families every single day.

Andy is the kind and compassionate leader Kentuckians deserve, but he needs our help to win this tough re-election race and keep making progress for our Commonwealth.

[**Will you help Andy keep fighting for Kentucky families?
