clean_body: Kentuckians deserve a governor that supports families. Hey Peter, I've never doubted my husband's leadership skills — as a father, a community member, and as our governor. I am constantly moved by his ability to continuously show up for the great people of Kentucky and still come home every day to our family with plenty of love and kindness in his heart. Andy brings that kindness, authenticity, and strong leadership into the governor's office and it's proven through his track record. As governor, he vetoed the dangerous legislation labeled as the “worst anti-trans bill in the nation," he's supported Kentuckians who have been impacted by tornadoes and flooding, called for investments in public education to help every child reach their full potential, and he continues to put Kentucky families first at every turn. Despite our progress, Andy knows too many Kentucky families are still struggling to get by. That's why he's putting people over politics and fighting for our families every single day. Andy is the kind and compassionate leader Kentuckians deserve, but he needs our help to win this tough re-election race and keep making progress for our Commonwealth. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = Thank you for your time, Britainy Beshear = | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60809216/398292196/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjBjOWM5NS1jYWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r13RuY2E5bn3LzEuh7CND0g_NJ53E1PSQ8nrIZj4zq0=)
Friend,
I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.
I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:
[**Can you please split a $5 contribution between Congressman Robert Garcia and my United States Senate campaign today before our FEC deadline? I would not ask if this was not so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60809217/398292198/92788824?refcode2=c60c9c95-cacc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230327-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjBjOWM5NS1jYWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r13RuY2E5bn3LzEuh7CND0g_NJ53E1PSQ8nrIZj4zq0=)
The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe the support I have received so far. I’m not sure I do yet, either.
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben
**[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60809222/398292199/92788824?refcode2=c60c9c95-cacc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&refcode=em230327-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjBjOWM5NS1jYWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r13RuY2E5bn3LzEuh7CND0g_NJ53E1PSQ8nrIZj4zq0=)**

clean_body: The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left. = Friend, I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left. Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that. Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name just two. Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress. The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals. As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone. I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please: = The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe the support I have received so far. I’m not sure I do yet, either. Thank you, and adiós, Ruben = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A big announcement from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
I’m making it official today, Derek, and I wanted you to hear it from me: I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.
Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One:
**[Derek, can you split a donation right now to support my re-election campaign and John Fetterman? I’d be deeply grateful to have your support as I take on this new righteous fight alongside him in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230327-1?refcode=em20230327-1-8306&refcode2=8306_434096_Yrc0Uy&akid=8306%2E434096%2EYrc0Uy)**
I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else.
I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including:
* Getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk
* Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits
* Lowering the cost of hearing aids
* Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal
* Even making billionaires cry on national TV

Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.
**We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change.**
**[Please make a contribution to support my re-election campaign and John Fetterman today, if you can. Every contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up and helps show that there’s strong support for our plans and our values. Side by side, let’s rebuild the middle class, root corruption out of our government, and strengthen our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230327-1?refcode=em20230327-1-8306&refcode2=8306_434096_Yrc0Uy&akid=8306%2E434096%2EYrc0Uy)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230327-1?refcode=em20230327-8306&refcode2=8306_434096_Yrc0Uy&akid=8306%2E434096%2EYrc0Uy)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230327-8306-footer&t=1&refcode2=8306_434096_Yrc0Uy&akid=8306%2E434096%2EYrc0Uy)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8306%2E434096%2EYrc0Uy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8306%2E434096%2EYrc0Uy)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Kimberly Guilfoyle
subject: They’re ripe for the taking!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |

---
| | | There's no time to sugarcoat this:

I spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he informed me House Republicans JUST listed 37 vulnerable Democrat-held seats. _They 're ripe for the taking BUT our plan depends on one thing, and one thing only:_

_**[We can't win these seats unless we hit our first budgetary goal of the year. And right now, we're trailing behind. I'm personally asking you to pitch in to help flip every last one of these seats and expand our Majority in the House.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484874:6Eu0F9GNB:m:1:3331421248:B2E3210D6CCD4290EA911ACE241CC2E4:r "We can’t win
these seats unless we hit our first budgetary goal of the year. And right now, we’re trailing behind. I’m personally asking you to pitch
in $37.00 – $1.00 to help flip every last one of these seats and expand our Majority in the House. ")**_

No one expected the midterms to go the way that they did. We hoped for a red wave but it never came - one of the single biggest determining factors was slow fundraising on our side of the aisle.

Republicans were outraised in the VAST MAJORITY of key races and too many vulnerable Democrats hung on. We're rushing to change that this time around.

**That 's why we're going on offense in these 37 races.**

But if we miss deadlines or come up short, we'll be forced to cut our budgets in these races or trim down our list of targets. If we want to win, we must not pull back. _**[So many top Conservatives have reached out because we need our grassroots team coming out in FULL FORCE!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484874:6Eu0F9GNB:m:1:3331421248:B2E3210D6CCD4290EA911ACE241CC2E4:r "So many top
Conservatives have reached out because we need our grassroots team coming out in FULL FORCE! ")**_

- Speaker Kevin McCarthy emailed you
- Majority Leader Scalise emailed you
- GOP Chair Elise Stefanik emailed you
- NRCC Chairman Richard Hudson emailed you
- Congresswoman Harriett Hageman emailed you
- Congressman Mike Gallagher emailed you
- Congressman Zach Nunn emailed you
- Congressman Don Bacon emailed you
- Secretary Mike Pompeo emailed you
- Donald Trump Jr. emailed you

The truth is, Democrats have a built-in advantage in competitive seats like these 37.

They have scores of Democrat megadonors bankrolling their campaigns, the Liberal Media running interference for them, and an army of radical activists ready to spring into action at the drop of a hat.

Luckily, we have something much more honorable in our corner...

**We have a movement powered by strong Conservatives who love their country standing up for what we believe in. I have a hunch you fall into that category. We need more folks like you in Congress, not more out-of-touch Liberal elites.**

We're targeting these key races because we can WIN THEM ALL and expand our Majority by more than three dozen seats. The only piece we're missing is your support. _**[If you can add your donation before midnight, I would be truly grateful.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484874:6Eu0F9GNB:m:1:3331421248:B2E3210D6CCD4290EA911ACE241CC2E4:r "If you can add
your $37.00 before midnight, I would be truly grateful. ")**_
---
| | | [ADD YOUR DONATION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62484874:6Eu0F9GNB:m:1:3331421248:B2E3210D6CCD4290EA911ACE241CC2E4:r "button")
---
For America,
Kimberly Guilfoyle
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ryan=20Chamberlin=20for=20State=20Representative?=
subject: Let's Finish this Race Strong
body:
✅ Vote for Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-325519?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **WE'RE COMING DOWN THE HOME STRETCH!**
---
| **Friends,**

**Thank you so much for your support and votes during the primary election. I was overwhelmed by the outcome and was so grateful for the turnout.** One leg of the race is done, and now it's on to the general election on May 16th!**I want you all to know I couldn't have done it without YOU!

This last leg of the campaign is our final journey to Tallahassee.** __The Leftist, WOKE mob is going to do anything it can to make sure that I am not elected to office.__ They know that I will be the stalwart force who stands with Governor DeSantis and his agenda for the Free State of Florida. **So even though I have just one more candidate to face in the May general election, I am also running against the radical media, the corporate elitists, and a liberal establishment that has turned its back on America!**
---
| | **THE WOKE MOB AND POLITICAL ELITISTS ARE MY TRUE OPPONENTS**
---
| **Florida has become a target for the WOKE and the Political establishment in Washington, DC.** Each day I am harassed online by Democratic trolls and leftist news media. **They spread their false narratives and lies because they know what I stand for and that I won't back down from a fight.**

** But I CAN'T be bought or intimidated. I stand for FAITH, FAMILY, AND FREEDOM! **

**These last weeks leading up to the election are essential for spreading the truth and securing a seat in the Florida House that will reflect the family values and freedoms District 24 cherishes.**
---
| | **LET'S SHOW MY TRUE OPPONENTS THAT WE WON'T BOW DOWN TO THEIR PRESSURE!**
---
|
---
| **You can send a strong message to all my opponents and prove to them that Florida will remain free!** Your support, volunteer work, and prayers fuel this campaign.

**Here is where I need your support again...**

_They will be pouring money into digital, TV, radio, and print to try to do anything to stop Florida's momentum as the leading state in the country._ **Can you help our cause by helping me win this race?** If you could canvas our neighborhoods, put up a yard sign, or make calls to your friends and neighbors, it would go a long way. **[Click here and contact me if you can volunteer.](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=1977fd7f7f&e=d1c1b9864f)**

**Of course, it will take money to win, also.** _You can help secure Florida with a win in this special election by contributing to our campaign!_**Every dollar is appreciated!**

---
| [DONATE TODAY!](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=9cd6341900&e=d1c1b9864f "DONATE TODAY!")
---
| Thank you so much for your support!

_**God Bless America!**_
---
|
---
| Candidate for Florida House District 24
---
| [YES, I WILL STAND WITH RYAN!](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=6dbe3f97b8&e=d1c1b9864f "YES, I WILL STAND WITH RYAN!")
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=dade9fbdc8&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._
Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568
[Add us to your address book](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/vcard?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea)

You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=17c87577d1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=17c87577d1).

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Do you make more than $4M per year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
The GOP budget might not be for you.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20101%2E3422442%2EyxitZ5)
Congressional Republicans have proposed a new budget, and here’s who would benefit:
* Households making more than $4 million per year
* Corporations with over $1 billion in profits
* Wealthy people who cheat on their taxes

Under the GOP’s plan, working people would be left to pick up the slack. While Republicans’ plans would add trillions to our nation's debt, they’d still manage to raise taxes on Americans who are already struggling to make ends meet.
When politicians try to line the pockets of their corporate backers and billionaire donors, Katie will always fight back. [**Add your name to show your support for a fair budget that puts working people first.**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_gop_budget/?source=EMAF27_1_ACT_20230327_V1_F&t=2&akid=20101%2E3422442%2EyxitZ5)
**[Add your name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s_em_gop_budget/?source=EMAF27_1_ACT_20230327_V1_F&t=3&akid=20101%2E3422442%2EyxitZ5)**
--Katie Porter HQ

**Don’t click away just yet! On March 31 we have a federal fundraising deadline and we need your help.** Katie is the only Democrat in this race who doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs. And while this will likely be the country’s most expensive primary, we’re going to win because of supporters like you.**[Can you chip in $8 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230327-1?refcode=EMAF27_1_ACT_20230327_V1_F&refcode2=20101_3422442_yxitZ5&akid=20101%2E3422442%2EyxitZ5)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=4&akid=20101%2E3422442%2EyxitZ5)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=20101%2E3422442%2EyxitZ5)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

body:

SCHOOL BOARD RACE SPECIAL EDITION

Last night, our Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas interviewed 7 more school board candidates on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer. Mark has interviewed more than 28 school and library board candidates this election cycle.

Illinois' school board races are shaping up to be some of the most important, and no one else is covering them!

Watch these highlights and learn more about these candidates, who are investing more than just their time, talent, and treasure - they are being attacked by the radical left that is being funded by Gov. Pritzker!
Kevin Johnson, Joanne Anastasia Johnson,
Tricia Tabor & Theresa "Tammy" Hayes
District 308 (Oswego) & District 92 (Will County)
https://youtu.be/9vyK_tjIwJM?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5d513a05fc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Learn more about the Dist. 308 candidates at WeTheParentsOswego308.com (https://wetheparentsoswego308.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5d513a05fc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and the Dist. 92 candidates at WeTheParentsIllinois.com (https://wetheparentsillinois.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5d513a05fc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Dist. 92 (Will County) candidate Tricia Tabor and Dist. 308 (Oswego) candidate Kevin Johnson join Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer to discuss the attacks that Democrats have waged against them as they campaign for their local school boards.

Gabrielle Fender, Kris Rayman & Jeff Ekstrom
District 101 (Batavia)
https://youtu.be/hARx6YKc-_Y?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=5d513a05fc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Dist. 101 (Batavia) candidates Gabrielle Fender, Kris Rayman, and Jeff Ekstrom join Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer to discuss the failing test scores in the district and their plans for improving education.

| Friend
The first financial deadline of 2023 is this Friday at midnight, and to be frank, we're not where we need to be to hit our first end-of-quarter goal.
Unlike the Left, Kat relies on hardworking American patriots like you to fund her fight! Here are a few reasons your donation today can make a huge impact:
Reason 1: We rely entirely on you!
Unlike the Left, Kat doesn't take donations from corrupt billionaires; she turns to you to fund her fight!
Reason 2: Bringing solutions is Kat's top priority!
Kat's seen the damage of Biden's policies firsthand. She's seen thousands of Americans lose everything due to Biden's agenda. Now, she's counting on you to support her fight against high prices and END Biden's reckless spending.
Reason 3: Since taking office, the Left has done nothing but attack American values!
In just three years, we've seen dozens of harmful policies aimed at forcing through Biden and the Left's agenda. They didn't bat an eye when they passed their restrictive mandates and lockdowns, and now they're only continuing the trend by spending trillions and putting it on your tab!

name: Hartley Duckworth Godlewski (via Women Win Wisconsin)
subject: Will you help me surprise my mom, Peter? 💟
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Women Win Wisconsin PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O]
Peter,
My name is Hartley and Sarah Godlewski is my mom. I don’t usually write emails because I’m busy having fun and learning at school (and because I still need someone to help me 😅), but I really wanted to give it a try for my mom. She works so hard every day to make Wisconsin better for women and kids that I couldn’t miss out on the chance to surprise her!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O]
My mom is my favorite person in the entire world and it’s not just because she takes me to get pączkis. She is the nicest, most caring person I know. I see her work hard every day to make sure all of our neighbors can feel as safe and loved and supported as I do.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O]
She’s been worried about the elections happening in April and I can tell it’s because they’re really important. She’s been working a lot on a new project to help elect pro-choice women all across Wisconsin and I reaaaaaally wanted to help – that’s why I’m sending this message!
I’m only three years and three months old, but my mom has made sure those three years were the best EVER! I want to make sure my mom and her friends on the ballot have the best time ever on Election Day. Can you help me, Peter?
Peter, I need your help to surprise my mom today. Can you donate whatever you can to help her support pro-choice women all across Wisconsin? It would make my day! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O]
HELP ME SURPRISE MY MOM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O]
Thank you for your help! I had so much fun working with my mom’s team to send this email and I can’t wait to send the biggest thank-you message for your help later!
- Hartley 😊
The power to win elections now and in the foreseeable future is with pro-choice Wisconsinites and our fight for our rights.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O]
With the future of our democracy and reproductive freedom at stake, former Wisconsin State Treasurer Sarah Godlewski launched an initiative building on the power of pro-choice women.
The fall of Roe v. Wade reinstated Wisconsin’s cruel abortion ban from 1849 that provides no exceptions for rape or incest and could jail or fine doctors. But we know the right-wing won’t stop there. Governor Evers has already vetoed nine anti-abortion bills that passed the GOP-controlled legislature, and when he called for a special special to repeal the 1849 law, Republicans gaveled in and out in less than a minute.
At Women Win Wisconsin, we believe the key to stopping the GOP is to activate the overwhelming majority of voters who support reproductive freedom. A recent Marquette University Law School poll showed 80% of Wisconsin voters are concerned with the change in abortion policy now that abortion is illegal in the state. These voters can make the difference in Wisconsin races that are often decided by only a few hundred votes.
Women Win Wisconsin will make sure pro-choice voters know exactly who’s going to fight for their reproductive rights and freedoms. We back pro-choice women running in Wisconsin’s most competitive races, and we’re excited to support Democratic victories up and down the ballot.
There are critical spring elections on Tuesday, April 4, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Please address a check to:
Women Win Wisconsin
PO Box 576
Madison, WI 53701
This solicitation of funds is made by the registered PAC “Women Win Wisconsin,” not by Sarah Godlewski herself.
SUPPORT WOMEN WIN WISCONSIN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/women-win-wi-email?refcode=20230327_em_fr_b1_HDG_1_YR_O]
Paid for by Women Win Wisconsin PAC
PO Box 576
Madison, WI 53701
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://action.sarahforwisconsin.com/p/wOJhy22a702osU_Np8KOBw2?unsubscribedata=l%2FGW9mDyq3blCGTM8qF9FtmNldPGgAlVoUofPVdIB9pd7FFzuVggsTt8pxDx10dwZE%2BuB9H9pHu7f9DscI51icH1J%2Fa7bTHEHrPQMI3rmVKg43aRFt6el9ZqU6QmtKOg4Yien0il%2B1a3Q%2FXhFFtWSpuCr2CuZCPOoDXQR5hNpzMK69bH1TlU3Inuu8ETrJ80ciIdW2rdTorCbHhd4q1iV%2BExOLX0BuYvRpyPQmispeuACJpPbvQNquYDVMURP6%2BdAmQQnfAeWX80ERNUHDNrvHqDm%2B9XoiaHXVbjSzBJFrixsNklKnuHctEX7%2BUTe3slAcdozWqqW6fZF36KNC8XvUvy%2Fy5%2BR%2F6bf9gSEEHDVKaGh8KGV4EbnGOMQGCGYi3Lr2wYvQP6iPSW6jq14cukZL1nax0jo96jEsKOhK1lcg8Z%2BBEX0BIvYY0vl0du1tdf .

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: It's been a busy three months

body:
I'm working hard every day to deliver results for the people of Washington's 8th District, and I need your support. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60816180/398298265/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmM4ZTc5My1kMWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JERNyZM_0XDNXtpKRfW16Qy4laNCffRDl9zYmLsdqq8=&emci=756310df-accc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=dfc8e793-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

It's been a busy first three months of the 118th Congress. I was elected Vice Ranking Member of the Energy and Commerce Committee, had my 16th bill signed into law, held my 100th town hall, and I was appointed to chair a task force on the upcoming national Farm Bill!

**But while I'm working hard every day to deliver results for the people of Washington's 8th District, Republicans already have their sights set on 2024.** I already have a Republican opponent, and the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) once again named me a top target.

We're quickly approaching our most important deadline so far this year – our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. After that, our fundraising numbers will be made public for the first time this cycle. We know that the Republicans targeting WA-08 will look at what we raise to judge the strength of this grassroots team.

We need to end the quarter strong to show my opponent and national Republicans that this grassroots team has what it takes to defend this seat and retake the House majority in 2024. But I can't do it without your support, Peter.

**[Will you chip in before my first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year to help me defend this seat so I can continue fighting for Washingtonians in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60816181/398298266/2140579660?refcode=em23_230327_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230327_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=dfc8e793-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmM4ZTc5My1kMWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JERNyZM_0XDNXtpKRfW16Qy4laNCffRDl9zYmLsdqq8=)**

body:
|

| | The next generation of women are depending on us now. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60815727/398297215/27957066?sourceid=1048817&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3MTAyNi1kMWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=se-RBeo2RbhCL-BZ9nCHjiX_4QZj2iaDe4UwijbiRfY=&emci=5f771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=61771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter: I'm reaching out to personally ask you to [**donate to EMILYs List before our End-of-Quarter deadline this Friday**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60815729/398297216/27957066?sourceid=1048817&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3MTAyNi1kMWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=se-RBeo2RbhCL-BZ9nCHjiX_4QZj2iaDe4UwijbiRfY=&emci=5f771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=61771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) — but first, I want to explain why your contribution is so important.

Our mission to elect Democratic pro-choice women is _personal_ for me. In addition to being the president of EMILYs List, I'm Nylah's mom, and I can't stand the thought of my daughter growing up in a world where she has _less_ freedom than I did at her age.

That's what motivates me day in and day out: **I want my daughter to grow up in a world where no one — especially not anti-choice extremist politicians — can tell her what to do with her body.** I want her to live in a country where she sees women like her in political office standing up for our rights. And, one day, I want my daughter to see firsthand that no dream is out of reach for women like us — not even winning the presidency.

I know that you want the same thing for the next generation of women, Peter. Supporters like you have helped EMILYs List elect a record number of women to office — and I know that if we have the resources to make early investments in our candidates, we CAN elect enough Democratic pro-choice women in 2024 to successfully block state and federal abortion bans.

**That's why it's so critical that we reach our $175,000 goal before our End-of-Quarter deadline this Friday. The next generation of women — our daughters — are depending on us. But we can't keep up our work unless we have the resources to train, recruit, and support Democratic pro-choice candidates all year long.** ****So please, Peter, before our End-of-Quarter deadline this Friday: Donate $15 or more to help EMILYs List recruit and elect the next generation of Democratic pro-choice women. Every dollar helps women win:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Women-Win-Q1](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60815746/398297223/27957066?sourceid=1048817&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3MTAyNi1kMWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=se-RBeo2RbhCL-BZ9nCHjiX_4QZj2iaDe4UwijbiRfY=&emci=5f771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=61771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you for your commitment to the fight of our life. Laphonza Butler
President, EMILYs List
** ** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60815752/398297225/27957066?sourceid=1048817&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3MTAyNi1kMWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=se-RBeo2RbhCL-BZ9nCHjiX_4QZj2iaDe4UwijbiRfY=&emci=5f771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=61771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** **** ****[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60815755/398297226/210412955?sourceid=1048817&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTc3MTAyNi1kMWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=se-RBeo2RbhCL-BZ9nCHjiX_4QZj2iaDe4UwijbiRfY=&emci=5f771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=61771026-d1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** ********

clean_body: | | | The next generation of women are depending on us now. Peter: I'm reaching out to personally ask you to — but first, I want to explain why your contribution is so important. Our mission to elect Democratic pro-choice women is personal for me. In addition to being the president of EMILYs List, I'm Nylah's mom, and I can't stand the thought of my daughter growing up in a world where she has less freedom than I did at her age. That's what motivates me day in and day out: I want my daughter to grow up in a world where no one — especially not anti-choice extremist politicians — can tell her what to do with her body. I want her to live in a country where she sees women like her in political office standing up for our rights. And, one day, I want my daughter to see firsthand that no dream is out of reach for women like us — not even winning the presidency. I know that you want the same thing for the next generation of women, Peter. Supporters like you have helped EMILYs List elect a record number of women to office — and I know that if we have the resources to make early investments in our candidates, we CAN elect enough Democratic pro-choice women in 2024 to successfully block state and federal abortion bans. That's why it's so critical that we reach our $175,000 goal before our End-of-Quarter deadline this Friday. The next generation of women — our daughters — are depending on us. But we can't keep up our work unless we have the resources to train, recruit, and support Democratic pro-choice candidates all year long. **So please, Peter, before our End-of-Quarter deadline this Friday: Donate $15 or more to help EMILYs List recruit and elect the next generation of Democratic pro-choice women. Every dollar helps women win: Thank you for your commitment to the fight of our life. Laphonza Butler President, EMILYs List ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Delegate Jazz Lewis
subject: Friends - MD House Majority Whip Jazz Lewis Sent You His Newsletter!
body:
Find out what is coming next & what Delegate Lewis (LD- 24) has been up to!
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
|

Delegate Jazz Lewis Newsletter
Reviewing the Start of Spring & What Is Coming Next
News & updates From Delegate Jazz Lewis 3/27
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
Spring Highlights What has Majority Whip Jazz Lewis up to this Spring?
---
Headline Item: Tomorrow morning, The Prince George's County Liquor Board will be meeting on Zoom at 10 am to vote on the liquor license transfer to Woodmore Town Centre. Please see sidebar for details.
---
| |
---
Glenarden City Council Meeting
---
| |
---|---
|
Last month, Delegate Lewis spoke at Glenarden City Council's public meeting. He opposed a liquor license transfer that would create a concentration of liquor stores. Additionally, Delegate Lewis expressed his concern about a new liquor store in the area. He expanded on the negative impacts which result from creating a concentration of liquor stores, such as increased crime.
| |
---
Blue Line Corridor Community Briefing
---
| |
---|---
|
In February, Delegate Lewis spoke at the Blue Line Corridor Community Leadership Briefing by the Prince George's County Executive's staff. The County executive's office shared the planned development projects along the Blue Line Corridor. Additionally, Delegate Lewis spoke about the Blue Line Corridor Coalition's work, in partnership with the county executive's office, to encourage equity and support residents as development along the corridor begins.
| |
---
Ready 2 Read Storytime Event
---
| |
---|---
|
Delegate Lewis also visited Prince George's County Memorial Library System for a Ready 2 Read Storytime in honor of Black History Month. He read "insert book title" to a group of kids from the community.
| |
---
Black Wealth Matters Discussion
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h7xEnx7hTTqV_kOLU0gLgney7cJf1nKz6mSkvjPNouH-c8lXlsoGkeqy6BLjTGVzdl6MtxsR-A9X0WJaPgrowPMmnDyBoZV3-seMfwH5kU3S2BTc3mG6X5XAVKMwzoiqnVd7S3qE2ssLHt0rvrBy99TFLWP32EMDf8p9UznxW4EJFMwElM5Z6A==&c=Pauqa4dp92s9Gw4aTczKFZJwTVb__Y3q_hHvHLCV371twj2kI0vamw==&ch=NjFhUrAQIr6Hc6pjxJ1rn7-OxusUaD2uVEJq9msvAd3FrkU1qrnwOQ==) |
---|---
|
Delegate Lewis attended a virtual discussion hosted by the Prince George's County PG Changemakers entitled Black Wealth Matters, as part of their Black history month programming. Delegate Lewis discussed social safety nets and wealth building tools.
| |
---
PTA Visits With District 24
---
| |
---|---
|
In March, Delegate Lewis joined the Bowie High School PTA and the Perrywood Elementary School PTA to discuss the many ways in which our schools, students, teachers, and parents will be impacted.
| |
---
Blue Line Corridor Coalition Meeting
---
| |
---|---
|
On Saturday March 25th, Delegate Lewis met with the Blue Line Corridor Coalition to discuss plans for developing the Blue Line Corridor and what role community stakeholders and businesses must play in supporting current residents of the corridor.
| |
---
---
| |
---
Update: March 28th Liquor Board Hearing
---
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h7xEnx7hTTqV_kOLU0gLgney7cJf1nKz6mSkvjPNouH-c8lXlsoGkQQKjeFnWtfSAODN4nA7BHpZv5APN9Yxw2dnmKbV10IxBgVYHxWI_tmNaKwAOt2lric9NVTSZDdnDciOyNgYQfBCzETLFThnq_VzMGzyRxvkGOTYF9ohdEQrmPgvLqAw79eHx5fHVKw6rMnOhnHee3CDu3HrrLx6cwOm72_jmETeCRGOD9zx46o=&c=Pauqa4dp92s9Gw4aTczKFZJwTVb__Y3q_hHvHLCV371twj2kI0vamw==&ch=NjFhUrAQIr6Hc6pjxJ1rn7-OxusUaD2uVEJq9msvAd3FrkU1qrnwOQ==) for the Prince George's County Liquor Board's agenda for tomorrow's meeting. The Zoom information is at the bottom of the document. If the time changes, we will reach out and respond to emails. It is important for our community to show up and make our position clear.
---
| |
---
Tools for you:
---
If you have casework for the office of Delegate Jazz Lewis. Please fill out the form below.
---
| | [Click here for our form](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h7xEnx7hTTqV_kOLU0gLgney7cJf1nKz6mSkvjPNouH-c8lXlsoGkccnwzOzlnve5q3KacScVRqecDw4yWk4a7a645G27NdZcDS86VCNMZgpmPMeROoeg3SkqwxucE168JoqaWXW_8-FFhEtuEm_NZoWnaRlNFt96Jot0y_xzmGW62mpCmHacSqQtFPIBIQpZr-6H-kpQLxl816mDPD2ZS0-j5qq4NeS7yb7MZlnof1zKOhO1EC5xUFNrRl-hHYS5cFrpmdiLOWo1rJXXrU3Qw==&c=Pauqa4dp92s9Gw4aTczKFZJwTVb__Y3q_hHvHLCV371twj2kI0vamw==&ch=NjFhUrAQIr6Hc6pjxJ1rn7-OxusUaD2uVEJq9msvAd3FrkU1qrnwOQ==)
---
One of Delegate Lewis's top priorities is to make our government work for Marylanders. Our casework team is ready to assist constituents with problems relating to the state or county government. We will make every effort to answer in a timely manner.
---
| |
---
Join our Newsletter:
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h7xEnx7hTTqV_kOLU0gLgney7cJf1nKz6mSkvjPNouH-c8lXlsoGkQQKjeFnWtfSVwKYRYDdAcHZ8ZnqHpUnAFw0Gb4NFE4dijoH8wgx3M-bnOBL-kiX02qyg0huzUVlD0qHF2qm5z-SqkguXv4baXLDeT_2jKMcbu5yLY-cAiGOhu4EVQpJgPaE4T76wYo6ov72_OkqsFOlFh5RxHNCBoA9ZbpB7YRb4yOCeVumcw5Jda0eTOaDGh5j2jFPapegnRSueQFuyv_M9riTphJ9ksy39E16ME168jXhEbJ1QS-5jAj3z-4o7z6BFJIqWx-crXVCw5YtHlw=&c=Pauqa4dp92s9Gw4aTczKFZJwTVb__Y3q_hHvHLCV371twj2kI0vamw==&ch=NjFhUrAQIr6Hc6pjxJ1rn7-OxusUaD2uVEJq9msvAd3FrkU1qrnwOQ==) for our email sign up form to share with friends or community members who want to hear the latest news from Delegate Jazz Lewis.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Looking forward to April & Summer What's coming next for Delegate Lewis and District 24?
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Liquor Board Hearing on March 28th
---
On March 28th 21st at 10 am, Delegate Lewis will attend the Prince George's County Liquor Board's rescheduled public hearing addressing the liquor license transfer that would create a density of liquor stores in Woodmore Town Centre, which has been proven to have adverse safety and financial effects on communities. Please see the first sidebar item above for further details.
---
| |
---
| Speaking at Union Night in Annapolis
---
Delegate Lewis will be speaking at the union night at Lawyers Mall with Metro Baltimore Council AFL CIO and Baltimore DC Metro Building Trades Council, on March 27th at 7:30 pm.
---
| | |
---
| Capital Market and Neighborhood Design Center Neighborhood Walk
---
On Saturday April 1st, 10 am - 5 pm, at Creative Suitland, Delegate Lewis will join the Capitol Market team and Neighborhood Design Center for a community walk in the Blue Line Corridor for asset mapping along with an emphasis on healthy food access. The walk will specifically be conducted along routes starting at Branch Avenue Metro Station, Suitland Road Metro Station, and Addison Road Metro. For more information, please contact info@capitolmarketmd.
---
| | |
---
| District 24 Public Safety Roundtable
---
On April 29th at 3 pm, Delegate Lewis will be hosting a public safety roundtable with our public health officials, police chiefs, and fire chiefs to discuss a coordinated approach to public safety in Prince George's County as well as in District 24. Press will be invited to relay the key takeaways from the roundtable to our community.
---
| | |
---
Black History Month Art Exhibition: Black Resistance! Stories from Prince George's County or public safety round table.
---
In honor of Black History Month, the Montpelier Arts Center is featuring an exhibition highlighting stories of Black resistance in Prince George's County from the era of enslavement to the Black Lives Matter movement of the present. The exhibition is available until March 26th. [Click here to register for a free group tour](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h7xEnx7hTTqV_kOLU0gLgney7cJf1nKz6mSkvjPNouH-c8lXlsoGkeqy6BLjTGVzMBrmwxhEwv_9W5OooH36AoXmsfJ8tY3LOmHf1OEg_AmLiINLA3zLS_V-09V8rB82j4Rwyr9olLl-Ir4OlfdTSu6q5vfws-7qPZWQTECQVWs=&c=Pauqa4dp92s9Gw4aTczKFZJwTVb__Y3q_hHvHLCV371twj2kI0vamw==&ch=NjFhUrAQIr6Hc6pjxJ1rn7-OxusUaD2uVEJq9msvAd3FrkU1qrnwOQ==).
---
| |
---
| |
---
Visit Delegate Lewis on Social Media to Stay Updated
---
| |
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
After Friday at midnight, our first quarterly fundraising report will go live. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60817156/398299710/-820256091?refcode=EM_FR_230327FR_N_TK_45DA_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTkwZmI0My1kMmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DPzxySEFBl5AC77th9oPpQA3HWJlcuA9L5pjrKkeRJI=)

We can’t emphasize enough how important it is that we meet our March 31 end-of-quarter goal. **After Friday at midnight, our first quarterly fundraising report will go live and the strength of our effort to fight back against Kevin McCarthy’s attacks will be measured. We must show we have what it takes early on to win this toss-up race.**

Marcy Kaptur is already being targeted by National Republicans, and fighting back is going to take great strength and early grassroots investments.

If our numbers don’t outperform McCarthy’s assumptions about this race, the NRCC and extreme Republicans will see that as a sign of weakness, think this race is more competitive than ever, and double down on their attacks.

**[We know it’s early, but early investments in races like ours help us plan a winning strategy. Can you donate $5 today to ensure our campaign has the resources we need to defend Marcy Kaptur’s seat in Congress and take back the House name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A big announcement from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
I’m making it official today, friend, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.**
Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One:
[**Friend, can you split a donation right now to support my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen’s? I’d be deeply grateful to have your support as I take on this new righteous fight alongside other Democrats like her — and it’s critical for our Senate Majority that Jacky wins her race. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60831678/398332264/250738360?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2457-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTI5NTk4MC1mNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBWqix0PKrhds2DCzCOdGQcQfd4e8U5wrRHUxtnC1PE=)
I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else.
I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change.
Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top.
**We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change.**
[**Please make a contribution to support Jacky Rosen and my re-election campaign today, if you can. Every contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up and helps show that there’s strong support for our plans and our values. Side by side, let’s rebuild the middle class, root corruption out of our government, and strengthen our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60831679/398332265/250738360?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2457-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTI5NTk4MC1mNGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hBWqix0PKrhds2DCzCOdGQcQfd4e8U5wrRHUxtnC1PE=)

clean_body: | | | I’m making it official today, friend, and I wanted you to hear it from me: I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year. Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One: = I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change. Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top. We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change. = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hey, Fellow American it's Nancy Mace – the Congressman who dropped out of high school at age 17, worked at Waffle House to put food on the table and ended up being the first female to graduate from the Corps of Cadets program at the Citadel. [**I need a moment of your time.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c29bceb50ab4b089a4adb87568545f2&_e=rKRv-Z3Js84B4lyYVNCGjwnzriwARwhAnwRuTOUHoFkylVpQMCl2JiSkSzM44nyt5hog_z0uiwnxgxUVdkVWe9xwsGCcbFd6h58GdvEi9RIs8C-XEsNYOVRVuU9MjLol2eztS5JbaFhakezbi-zMs7--BXS1jPdco2_IudJFpPppPl24CjX1HQkOP0TsFMZckxVarM-BsXGV2Ta8jpbVr6jYstZeg4SFm_MQlBPwn-lbmZdYXbAwreSdabADJENzXIPNmviRIbuvJYIjr6yeMmvB9t_gthdcR2Bgz96evc9WYH1TJ5NpbSNLdAglZds2pEfCnHbfbDWJRAhxx8Kfh0rsvTXPeqw8mBggPuve7M8ovcNhJTKS6TMLJj0DCerlP_giBNJqCLs7ADpT7U0iPHLuuHTixkxIh7AXtnn9vOk%3D)

**_The short version:_**
I'm up against my first quarterly goal of the cycle and I'm short of my fundraising goal. [**I'm desperate and need to know if I can count on you before the hour is up.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c29bceb50ab4b089a4adb87568545f2&_e=rKRv-Z3Js84B4lyYVNCGjwnzriwARwhAnwRuTOUHoFkylVpQMCl2JiSkSzM44nyt5hog_z0uiwnxgxUVdkVWe9xwsGCcbFd6h58GdvEi9RIs8C-XEsNYOVRVuU9MjLol2eztS5JbaFhakezbi-zMs7--BXS1jPdco2_IudJFpPppPl24CjX1HQkOP0TsFMZckxVarM-BsXGV2Ta8jpbVr6jYstZeg4SFm_MQlBPwn-lbmZdYXbAwreSdabADJENzXIPNmviRIbuvJYIjr6yeMqaPw6t5ZMx-lWZX9FRFDCGlaNHRLqFzqCNaqi4rqndysDosiENXKusNdwEPF9c_Du2aNGxisS8L7_YKCYoI-YCunMILdsrPIQTKMMovD9X5I9NaLtZD8Y6f4pO9NTAT8hqBYXbhJ8dYMTcUk6DUoT0%3D)

**_The long version:_**
This is what I didn't want to have to share with you, but I have nowhere else to turn. My team just let me know we are still more than 37% short of our first publicly accessible fundraising deadline, and if we don't meet it, we will be in a _very_ vulnerable position.

Keep in mind this seat was held by a Democrat in 2020, and they've been gunning to flip it back since then. **But I'm a fighter and I won't go down without a battle.**

You know how bad things are now... _but imagine how much worse they'll get if Democrats flip every purple seat like mine._

What's happening in America right now is _horrifying._ Kids are being used as political pawns, radical liberal ideas are becoming mainstream, the woke media is prioritizing clicks and views over the truth, and our so-called 'leaders' have sold themselves out for fame and fortune.

As Americans, we deserve __so much better than this.__ It's time to restore our economy, secure the southern border, put parents back in charge, support our military, and reestablish pride in our country.

So now you see why I **had** to reach out to you today and ask for your immediate help. [**Can I rely on you to make a secure donation today and help me keep this seat Republican?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c29bceb50ab4b089a4adb87568545f2&_e=rKRv-Z3Js84B4lyYVNCGjwnzriwARwhAnwRuTOUHoFkylVpQMCl2JiSkSzM44nyt5hog_z0uiwnxgxUVdkVWe9xwsGCcbFd6h58GdvEi9RIs8C-XEsNYOVRVuU9MjLol2eztS5JbaFhakezbi-zMs7--BXS1jPdco2_IudJFpPppPl24CjX1HQkOP0TsFMZckxVarM-BsXGV2Ta8jpbVr6jYstZeg4SFm_MQlBPwn-lbmZdYXbAwreSdabADJENzXIPNmviRIbuvJYIjr6yeMuQuJQRSxdDQiKoJduhOJK04DPcbAXRjvmfUwGXMTDBKnIPfEGVrM2mPH727Ado9BkuEUk578RQlAORMLYTw6cDcURCqbZ33Aqh6GrhfK_5bOxcODzgW4sFqHPhiRh7m4unKXIrkizn1sQiNOq65YNE%3D)

| [**_SECURE DONATE HERE_**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c29bceb50ab4b089a4adb87568545f2&_e=rKRv-Z3Js84B4lyYVNCGjwnzriwARwhAnwRuTOUHoFkylVpQMCl2JiSkSzM44nyt5hog_z0uiwnxgxUVdkVWe9xwsGCcbFd6h58GdvEi9RIs8C-XEsNYOVRVuU9MjLol2eztS5JbaFhakezbi-zMs7--BXS1jPdco2_IudJFpPppPl24CjX1HQkOP0TsFMZckxVarM-BsXGV2Ta8jpbVr6jYstZeg4SFm_MQlBPwn-lbmZdYXbAwreSdabADJENzXIPNmviRIbuvJYIjr6yeMtois9bO4nfm9Vz0Op9ZzN4s7Rj1aWFV6ZnEQwqo04bYX0q55dbhfKevqjxFqqvRtddSkSJeEEz5HYi4XtN_P4jkP9z_lwMvoaBFTJZxvAMEX6XumT-RsYgXAbPecfmwu1_f1mLIgudNolikhE0o3wY%3D)

This race is shaping up to be _one of the most competitive seats next cycle,_ and we can't take any chances. Democrats are all in to take this back - we can't afford to fall short of any goals.

[**It's time to stand up and say enough is enough! I'm running for re-election because I believe I'm the woman who can help save our country.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c29bceb50ab4b089a4adb87568545f2&_e=rKRv-Z3Js84B4lyYVNCGjwnzriwARwhAnwRuTOUHoFkylVpQMCl2JiSkSzM44nyt5hog_z0uiwnxgxUVdkVWe9xwsGCcbFd6h58GdvEi9RIs8C-XEsNYOVRVuU9MjLol2eztS5JbaFhakezbi-zMs7--BXS1jPdco2_IudJFpPppPl24CjX1HQkOP0TsFMZckxVarM-BsXGV2Ta8jpbVr6jYstZeg4SFm_MQlBPwn-lbmZdYXbAwreSdabADJENzXIPNmviRIbuvJYIjr6yeMq77p-JRQX2DCDMC9qfklMCkLDLLORhvPPssZdx4bTU7uITWHp0a0IiodjC9kwf0bK67mu_dVk3Irpuw0ecFjrHYJrmwFZv6xHg5fc12fc5zRG3gv0YsoTSnsdMhiJG772vz1pXyx8yUS7pmlbKhUnI%3D) I'm in Washington week in and week out, fighting for you and your family – I have a 100% record of voting to lower taxes and a 100% lifetime rating with Conservation Voters of South Carolina!

[**I need to know if you'll have my back in this critical moment.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0c29bceb50ab4b089a4adb87568545f2&_e=rKRv-Z3Js84B4lyYVNCGjwnzriwARwhAnwRuTOUHoFkylVpQMCl2JiSkSzM44nyt5hog_z0uiwnxgxUVdkVWe9xwsGCcbFd6h58GdvEi9RIs8C-XEsNYOVRVuU9MjLol2eztS5JbaFhakezbi-zMs7--BXS1jPdco2_IudJFpPppPl24CjX1HQkOP0TsFMZckxVarM-BsXGV2Ta8jpbVr6jYstZeg4SFm_MQlBPwn-lbmZdYXbAwreSdabADJENzXIPNmviRIbuvJYIjr6yeMsbdlGq1Puyw0y4MMVjBQLxnzuPIyRcTmQCvs5_EjT2RDHUuwrksKJ-7Lx8oAPe3FmM-By33fc9UdW5qqPPsgK6u1xakNvzfc-LBmdCS6I8_zr0nVcrMXwva70LnGiHL2fgj30nZP8AXtEaGQInZ2m4%3D)

Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It’s official: I’m running for re-election.
body:
I’m making it official today, and I wanted you to hear it from me: | | |
---
| | I’m making it official today, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.** Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One: [Can you split a donation right now to support my re-election campaign and the critical work that the DLCC’s Grassroots Victory PAC is doing to elect Democrats to state legislatures? I’d be deeply grateful to have your support again as I take on this new righteous fight alongside other state Democrats across the country. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEVSTbAez4yPhJS5XcJ6FPSK143ggSAWToaPCL4B59fJ4pzPe8WRd1ENs4DmMIA1GwNOIicmMPcHfzGwYZDk4OK96GPLQmaTcYmSgmGldR2M_zF0wKxN7qUurfxFW0IOrRuVO3KTfZ8mNyTb3gMzxGKZS93gVRG9JsE12Qi-w7ZSEQ-ZBR6DGWPNSnpr2bZsfvL-4uefP6gFnO5kCvHdMX7QTwLRJtBepsJcGnhjjFco8zhJxGjZJSVZx7mC0PCzoeuEyy70ThOJPZqjMW4jN4v5lF7hgoBEiCN84nvSfDz6OXa5rBx5vgvJXx4kZnz73vHwaxG1Qa2vzT_k9evkAtm7oEoA4BBBAHOY3JbdQKs-m5wlN_kLhJs72qhj2EH5i4eIplUxA_dtB_45jsjzLv/3uu/AJo1OmZySKe2eZP3BpUw3Q/h0/_1TFGWUCTqKgKQmEbDVRo7oVHW56zyl7h24PPgB7EkQ) I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including:
* Getting student loan debt cancelation to President Biden’s desk
* Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits
* Lowering the cost of hearing aids
* Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal
* Even making billionaires cry on national TV

Now I’m running for re-election because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Pass a wealth tax. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top. **We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change.** **[Please make a contribution to support my re-election campaign and the DLCC’s Grassroots Victory PAC today, if you can. Every contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up and helps show that there’s strong support for our plans and our values. Side by side, let’s rebuild the middle class, root corruption out of our government, and strengthen our democracy. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEVSTbAez4yPhJS5XcJ6FPSK143ggSAWToaPCL4B59fJ4pzPe8WRd1ENs4DmMIA1GwNOIicmMPcHfzGwYZDk4OK96GPLQmaTcYmSgmGldR2M_zF0wKxN7qUurfxFW0IOrRuVO3KTfZ8mNyTb3gMzxGKZS93gVRG9JsE12Qi-w7Zf-GcAkF14-lwKFCnioU9OjCcgWwYfJDFJl7A1T7pCyYZRtWNSQG5nQ3nCcUlQIIC_3a42fKIDesj3TS4h1RyTPRHydB3WzwEO1o6ua-cN8QvQ2F3HDLn_bC-8ML_ILhEjvKOAvGuvF0bM0A7hVUYP_8D_7UJGW-IX2-cJk9fB5C0iZ0ehghhm2cv77dvv_5zKfngwcRXO9enXI_4HH7JRSMyDcJGbu4lmle9FwpWj-t/3uu/AJo1OmZySKe2eZP3BpUw3Q/h1/O6DVva6SISQdeLSMHU6iLnFnaZTOmsNTLBceS7euDFE) ** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Senator Elizabeth Warren and the DLCC's Grassroots Victory PAC.

All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=93a8caf89b3c464e89f1947172bfaa6d&_e=PmUwld6U6qlPSC6RRJoq9B5FSwkwEKBNoH0DgkppPZGOPFyEc3jifhHDNbS6yy4JBNkzYwQoPbExJhlmtAvHqx7h-h4RC5aBt_y23xFYweGcSLA3a4LIiNdiPT9pUbBavtPqzoFTseqrDevGPapHkhSclR0uQvQMbGDQKYDIb1blCS6bxg9jMvCeqn7CgLDLDizy3tTELPCmerYs5hK4vrIDo3kx2OcV8zRnaD4AVr46vzbnFjTgJdCh8J8ttyqFI5kLO-6N-R1P0gWHc4IXKxoLquBZMuDBNm_dnmvc9x0%3D)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Get them before they're canceled
body:
Homer and the legendary Odysseus are just the latest casualties in a systematic purge of classic literature

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24894338da974f68a73f9ea843374435&_e=IHe-YzWrtJpKIXRyRtt6hT4SZvhM-_CGUFxLhyo1qeZpNEOQQj4-Sc-FTpkgkz7G7G8hhOxQHq99TkX0CfoE9VF_BsSWKRCR8fz024pMi9hkJDBFh9cHQar7P7xaRn1Upl6Wyqnx0vOa-vx-LO69psWyiNpnGLhRMf1lJ4fki1xsyoO5PYOwdWu0YXwa1ZAXMhF_KEf3E8NGqgTTzr1TvKPNhU21piOIZDP_L6whgHB2enVUaQdVGOvPjAd4fWe3cR7KjM4FjYwtGrRryhwcC6UtihAZEonICJ-kJgKVSA-IaCCraSUMXTbPJFL1gbtUl7xg8co6jK6vtAMlFjly4k6vRgnJQOFsxfs-MHrJCJbGvhdBiudaCtqYYtgK7hDCPJyZm3dfStLBmElFYGNAUgjoqMVgnUIrvkMj02rWpTQuxGy8JC8Vuk8r3FoJtCMQI99B-J4149BkGk8V5-rb2Vq1qbidCOMx3SZieSnJ7bI%3D) Dear Fellow American, Recently, I read about a Massachusetts high school teacher who posted on social media that she's: "Very proud to say we got the _Odyssey_ removed from the curriculum this year!" Homer and the legendary Odysseus are just the latest casualties in a systematic purge of classic literature and stories from school curriculums. These cancelations rob our young of classic tales of adventure and friendship, where young people can learn timeless truths about the world and how best to live--something many Americans cannot agree on in the first place. Books like these are rare, and the best of them are revised, ignored, or removed in most of today's schools. In response, Hillsdale College launched a new free online course entitled **" Classic Children's Literature."** Perhaps you've had a chance to watch a few lectures. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24894338da974f68a73f9ea843374435&_e=IHe-YzWrtJpKIXRyRtt6hT4SZvhM-_CGUFxLhyo1qeZpNEOQQj4-Sc-FTpkgkz7G7G8hhOxQHq99TkX0CfoE9VF_BsSWKRCR8fz024pMi9hkJDBFh9cHQar7P7xaRn1Upl6Wyqnx0vOa-vx-LO69psWyiNpnGLhRMf1lJ4fki1xsyoO5PYOwdWu0YXwa1ZAXMhF_KEf3E8NGqgTTzr1TvKPNhU21piOIZDP_L6whgHB2enVUaQdVGOvPjAd4fWe3cR7KjM4FjYwtGrRryhwcC6UtihAZEonICJ-kJgKVSA-IaCCraSUMXTbPJFL1gbtUl7xg8co6jK6vtAMlFjly4kmtElrhJ1pW3vKJINrGLYriCh1F4lorUTPJjKmqVzaDubIEaIDfVTxjEOtqrkzilhCGPf80AG_MT9RtRuKpWKpjn6AlDa-MH-GczCpamOS7C_WlMpOkksgh9pjZZ6p7CK0R9kB-55PtxAnTEO2F1wA%3D) **Today, I 'm excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can reserve your copy today.** The box-set is an excellent gift for parents, homeschool families, and anyone who cherishes an exciting and profound story. **" Classic Children's Literature"** explores some of the greatest works of children's literature from Aesop and the classic fairy tale stories through the works of A.A. Milne, Robert Louis Stevenson, and more. In this course, you'll learn how these great books delight audiences of all ages, produce a sense of wonder, and teach timeless lessons to the young and old alike. The DVD box-set includes lessons on _Beauty and the Beast, The Snow Queen, Alice 's Adventures in Wonderland, Treasure Island_, and more. This course has brought great joy to my family, as it has inspired us to read through the classic works covered in this course together. I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box-set of "Classic Children's Literature" by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=24894338da974f68a73f9ea843374435&_e=IHe-YzWrtJpKIXRyRtt6hT4SZvhM-_CGUFxLhyo1qeZpNEOQQj4-Sc-FTpkgkz7G7G8hhOxQHq99TkX0CfoE9VF_BsSWKRCR8fz024pMi9hkJDBFh9cHQar7P7xaRn1Upl6Wyqnx0vOa-vx-LO69psWyiNpnGLhRMf1lJ4fki1xsyoO5PYOwdWu0YXwa1ZAXMhF_KEf3E8NGqgTTzr1TvKPNhU21piOIZDP_L6whgHB2enVUaQdVGOvPjAd4fWe3cR7KjM4FjYwtGrRryhwcC6UtihAZEonICJ-kJgKVSA-IaCCraSUMXTbPJFL1gbtUl7xg8co6jK6vtAMlFjly4oEeDEzjoEgv3geyqioX7-FbA3DTQLCacz3gE87ihOCrzo39Wl9wUeXXBVDY6-eKF7R56kDWGapsianL20rXeiiajrxfd1iyzTCq-Q34na-ho27pnNGbd02gxv7bXo9Yp-CB3mmWelRWo2EtrIDWZz8%3D)** Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. Without you, Hillsdale could not offer these courses free of charge to any person willing to learn. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

| Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: DLCC top target

Friend,
The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee (DLCC) just announced their top targets for 2024 [https://dlcc.org/press/dlcc-announces-top-targets-for-the-2024-cycle/] , and the Minnesota House is one of them!
We know protecting and expanding our House DFL majority is key to building a Minnesota that works better for everyone. While we work to protect reproductive freedom, make health care more affordable, take climate action, and fund strong public schools, extreme MAGA Republicans want to pass dangerous legislation that limits reproductive care, gives tax cuts to the wealthy and big corporations, and damages our democratic institutions. We need your help to protect our House DFL majority, friend. Will you show your support and make a contribution today?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Melissa Hortman

name: Rachel Hamm
subject: Update From Mar A Lago Trip and The Fight To Get Republicans Elected In 2024
body:
It's now or never...
| | |
---
|
---
| Update From Mar A Lago Trip and The Fight To Get Republicans Elected In 2024
---
| Dear fellow Patriots,
I hope this email finds you well and ready to continue our fight for our country! As you may know, I've recently traveled to Mar A Lago and met with President Trump himself. I am thrilled to report that he is just as committed as ever to the cause of putting America First and getting Republicans elected in 2024.
As the Chairwoman of Rethink! GOP here in California, I know firsthand how important this fight is. Our biggest challenge is reaching out to voters in Democrat strongholds and turning the tide in our favor. That's why Rethink! GOP will be dominating in ballot harvesting and early voter programs that will help us increase our voter turnout in these areas by 10%.
[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to publicly stand with us in our fight to help elect Republicans!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AJ4Rxh8mQ6tqgdTQKN2bTC9faKIfgF5LHkfhpIZhTpJ3yU0SFtVeXd47AF25jpVzjCr7Siij7J3V5jczLXr0uYqfEi4Yo-9iU_kW4gKUcCmh2oRliJcIsNX3wXtxPfrQlWOPMxGFKuTZnPZKeNNwVCpDZi89C12_312-IeRwAeE2y6MthmHCeg==&c=OskZETKx067uER6N1jTeUtaPORX94kxx0qHDKhqAnkmDJyN93CWA6w==&ch=SKXfv8NuA50UiJIbOTY4uSV0k-o17WCluM0XyGzVWq68OICR8AzoCw==)

---
---
We are in the midst of a battle for the soul of our nation, and we cannot afford to lose. The Democrats are coming at us with everything they've got, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. That's why I'm asking for your support today.
Please consider making a generous donation to Rethink! GOP. Your contribution will help us fund these important voter outreach programs and ensure that we have the resources we need to get Republicans elected in 2024.
Together, we can make sure that our voices are heard, and that our country remains the beacon of hope and freedom that it has always been. Thank you for your continued support, and may God bless America.
[Please contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to publicly stand with us in our fight to help elect Republicans!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AJ4Rxh8mQ6tqgdTQKN2bTC9faKIfgF5LHkfhpIZhTpJ3yU0SFtVeXd47AF25jpVzjCr7Siij7J3V5jczLXr0uYqfEi4Yo-9iU_kW4gKUcCmh2oRliJcIsNX3wXtxPfrQlWOPMxGFKuTZnPZKeNNwVCpDZi89C12_312-IeRwAeE2y6MthmHCeg==&c=OskZETKx067uER6N1jTeUtaPORX94kxx0qHDKhqAnkmDJyN93CWA6w==&ch=SKXfv8NuA50UiJIbOTY4uSV0k-o17WCluM0XyGzVWq68OICR8AzoCw==)
Sincerely,
Rachel Hamm California Chairwoman of Rethink! GOP

subject: Just four days from now...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
After our FEC deadline, the GOP will have a clear picture of both our strengths and our weaknesses

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60825350/398307469/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230327EOQ_EOQ_HQ_FULL_9_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzUwYzhjZC1kOWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upcPJEQl4vaEy7EQ4Z4FeePAw700V7HocPARqCWSXwU=)
---
Hi, In just four days, we'll face our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline of the year. Political pundits, special interest groups, and prospective GOP opponents will have a clear picture of our strengths and our weaknesses after March 31.

[**Will you chip in $10 or any amount now to help us prove our strength?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60825351/398307492/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230327EOQ_EOQ_HQ_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzUwYzhjZC1kOWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upcPJEQl4vaEy7EQ4Z4FeePAw700V7HocPARqCWSXwU=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60825352/398307502/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230327EOQ_EOQ_HQ_FULL_9_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzUwYzhjZC1kOWNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=upcPJEQl4vaEy7EQ4Z4FeePAw700V7HocPARqCWSXwU=) National Republicans are likely to make VA-10 a top target this cycle, and if they see that our grassroots enthusiasm has waned, they’ll move even faster to flood the district with negative attacks and money aimed at taking Jennifer down. We'd be facing a major setback in a swing seat that Democrats absolutely need to win in order to re-take the majority.

**So we have to pull out all the stops now before the GOP gets any momentum, and we've got an ambitious goal to raise $20,000 by midnight on March 31.**

[**Can you make a grassroots donation of $10 or more for Jennifer? Jennifer's been fearless in standing up for women's reproductive choice, voting rights, and our federal workers. She's helped pass bills that expand broadband access, fix our roads, reduce prescription drug prices, strengthen our efforts to stop climate change, and lower the cost of living for families all across Northern Virginia.

**Jennifer's gotten results, and she hopes to deliver even more for her constituents.** But if she loses her seat and Republicans secure their narrow House majority, further progress will be impossible and we'll continue to be faced with a Congress full of anti-democracy, pro-Trump extremists.

Kevin McCarthy has shown that he'll do whatever it takes to hold on to power, and it's only a matter of time before he uses his massive financial operation to target competitive districts like VA-10. **We need to be fully prepared — and that means meeting all of our fundraising goals.**

[**So please show your support for Jennifer at this critical moment.
