name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24042337396c43fd86e1d4bfb6da2446&_e=TWpv5jQDOQ3AgikEwCAKEwYm0AK1LO9q0cumKXwREs9NpjatkwM4gfZ0dW4rrINnpN36r2SFXDmozlsVvwCXJuVe59LyNXy-n0d224rq0reiIk4PXxZIL1E9mvVtmMuacqqJ_6Kln5vR1UlT7nGj0-aAZH8RFt0aIvG2cN9fRZqRdoskghrEA92IEXH52jL0VaCievWQmQc5-ZO0KbhTi1QUSS-GrPhDybOFSglPJHJ51ORk_eD_TQMXNKBU0WjDq8akg4h5mqx6o-CUP6S-hGidOk0OJRk6qAThxYWSpxB4fLJY661GKmaUnTiRTgsadn8kd4WxX1axnaV32qIH-NV_nvuM_tGsbv2DxWLT8jmkDph3h8Z2b8sxXnwT_fasuBI0uXNjsEz3XaCG-w7kjA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24042337396c43fd86e1d4bfb6da2446&_e=TWpv5jQDOQ3AgikEwCAKEwYm0AK1LO9q0cumKXwREs9NpjatkwM4gfZ0dW4rrINnpN36r2SFXDmozlsVvwCXJuVe59LyNXy-n0d224rq0reiIk4PXxZIL1E9mvVtmMuacqqJ_6Kln5vR1UlT7nGj0-aAZH8RFt0aIvG2cN9fRZqRdoskghrEA92IEXH52jL0VaCievWQmQc5-ZO0KbhTi1QUSS-GrPhDybOFSglPJHJ51ORk_eD_TQMXNKBU0WjDNuiY23kN9OUpUJYIQGNAFw4YBhUG2K7wb3yuWi-7Edbs8LH-6Etbw7R1DUcbf-fyZRDKLfvKmX9ylzc_r59suuQ8zTJU72AbOLuM7tQfiw3U8rLZAsMLgYcsqPPvhmnBlVrhDQj1xeRJ15d2_eSo7w%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24042337396c43fd86e1d4bfb6da2446&_e=TWpv5jQDOQ3AgikEwCAKEwYm0AK1LO9q0cumKXwREs9NpjatkwM4gfZ0dW4rrINnpN36r2SFXDmozlsVvwCXJuVe59LyNXy-n0d224rq0reiIk4PXxZIL1E9mvVtmMuacqqJ_6Kln5vR1UlT7nGj0-aAZH8RFt0aIvG2cN9fRZqRdoskghrEA92IEXH52jL0VaCievWQmQc5-ZO0KbhTi1QUSS-GrPhDybOFSglPJHJ51ORk_eD_TQMXNKBU0WjDzpNXTv1n4M6zvN5fbsuF4MSRVZR70S8ojWVcja9Z9IchP6hcBKCsHj68yPTfxrTaa7ho5M8749M8YNmQMZ6eXa0t-E5PDG7Tq3UcK7P26Hs6GyN2cDw03sFyFhl4OMQ1MIyg4kAl7wOOz4dMPnNjfw%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=24042337396c43fd86e1d4bfb6da2446&_t=vgrTM70CeVLS_VAB0yK9NmcJq5jiqj76uPr0leoBE2CjNv9uHRBUnEAqW62QYEaUnGUscL4utdUuAWz2o4drhiKpxGLw7DKfgKmyawnV-326DMNs3VaW40sF02gcXkNCIvWox6VtvhN8xAe5-1V0_PYsHmgl9o-dev7UD75eVjk%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24042337396c43fd86e1d4bfb6da2446&_e=jp3vBoXJiK2Iz882oQNgreRWko_LH0q2ahEjS9A5oOk1-9gGjvIr8trocU5i8k-skeKOR2kPqXQ-iKuxlYEzHDFQj0LvEFfXCT8mltv8-NxCQEFQQEUKWlkHbAOusDqsRdh-XwyaGog3uutBdLytQ9X2EwsWaac_WZ3d33qEKgrsuEW28Op5VH-hmmqiS8I61Lo7eRdKeQRMozoEBnJ6CCtoQ983AK0npeTBVaAE_-ThfsjP63IeemKredllLT1p_8PsGChYzwraobKA5x38m4efHmaA23xA30XykrZcni0%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24042337396c43fd86e1d4bfb6da2446&_e=TWpv5jQDOQ3AgikEwCAKEwY-z0Rs-AV9gZtXwseMCs0cC8LbMtyx4C7g54wXtmyu0sWR8DGboI7pQAMYV6DcFrsYabpXVJO5c6U_UYeLJhprrz53tTHqvafCIS86usQcbUociZv5xSS0GyJiAgYKznSW331KEwGjkdG4WLN2j_V2DGQWg8l222GJxYuobmM7JQT0BjU17_0gh79a03Nx-r3NtALkcbuzmXUEnQwra1U%3D)_

name: Team Salud
subject: Our numbers are about to go public!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
This is a big week for us.

On Friday, our books close for the first time this cycle, and our fundraising numbers will go public.

Republican campaign managers and analysts will be paying close attention to these numbers as they determine which districts to try to flip next year.

Chip in today to help us have a strong showing this quarter! Please visit https://secure.ngpvan.com/50cEwJ7_TE-rOzbdtMEoPA2 to donate.

Republicans are already on the offensive and airing attack ads in vulnerable Democratic districts. We need a strong financial showing this quarter so we don’t end up on their list.
Please help us start off this election cycle strong and visit https://secure.ngpvan.com/50cEwJ7_TE-rOzbdtMEoPA2 to chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today.

Thank you for your support!

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

Chip in today to help us have a strong showing this quarter! Please visit to donate. Republicans are already on the offensive and airing attack ads in vulnerable Democratic districts. We need a strong financial showing this quarter so we don’t end up on their list. Please help us start off this election cycle strong and visit to chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today. Thank you for your support! If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We need to revitalize our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]Adam Schiff for Senate

California is the least represented state in the U.S. Senate,
Derek.

No, that’s not a hyperbole or some sort of myth — with our state’s
population of 39.2 million people, California’s two Senators sometimes
represent five, ten, or even forty times as many people as some smaller
states. Folks from all walks of life, all backgrounds, all with their own
stories and vision for our state’s future.

Is that fair? No, it’s not.

And it underscores the larger challenge our democracy faces. Thanks to
Republican gerrymandering, the minority party can control the number of
seats they occupy in the House. By overweighting rural areas in the
Senate, a minority of Americans often control the Senate. And because of
the Electoral College, a minority of Americans often control the White
House. On top of all that, our Supreme Court is now the least
representative body in the country.

That’s why it’s so important our next senator be a dedicated fighter who
isn’t afraid to stand up to GOP leaders and who is willing to take the
difficult but necessary steps to protect our democracy.

Steps like abolishing the Senate filibuster. Steps like expanding the
Supreme Court. Steps like overturning Citizens United. Steps like passing
DC statehood.

Our democracy has been tilting dangerously toward authoritarianism and
autocracy. We need to revitalize it for the 21st century.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]If you agree, I hope you’ll pitch in now to support my campaign to
serve California in the U.S. Senate. It’s more important than ever that
our senators fight for our democracy every day — and that’s exactly what
I’ll do.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dZVEvl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=mar2023_abs_em.7h-CrL&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=mar2023_abs_em.o650ZW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=mar2023_abs_em.5OS6KE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

At a certain point we have to say: If the majority of Americans aren’t
helping shape the future of our country because of structural impediments
or lack of representation, how long can our democracy really thrive?

I hope we don’t have to answer that question.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2023_abs_em.pVOgM2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2023_abs_em.4Qw1zC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230327_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2004%2E5257348%2EDjvyYU ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Why this week will be a defining moment for our campaign (please read)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress

March 31st marks the first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the new election cycle. As you may remember from last year, this means our campaign has to publicly report all of our internal fundraising data to the FEC.

Peter, I wanted to take a moment to reach out personally and explain why this week will be a defining moment for our campaign.

**March 31st marks the first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the new election cycle.** As you may remember from last year, this means our campaign has to publicly report all of our internal fundraising data to the FEC.

All eyes will be on Northeast Ohio. And because Washington Republicans and political pundits will try to gauge whether our grassroots team has what it takes to bring home another historic victory next November, falling behind on our end-of-quarter fundraising is not an option.

[**To ensure we can post the strongest possible fundraising report, our team has set an ambitious goal of raising $10,000 before Friday at midnight. Is there any amount you can chip in to help us reach our first end-of-quarter goal of the new cycle?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60826706/398313672/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.27_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGQwM2E3OS1kY2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-ZbV1mmNPnvLe6XvXo1e_BO-hTdEKymDYkFIS3jQHg=)

Last November, it was the continuous support of this grassroots team that enabled us to defy the odds and bring home a win for the Birthplace of Champions.

**Our campaign wasn’t fueled by the right-wing dark-money groups that propped up my opponent – we were powered by hardworking Ohio families who chipped in what they could, when they could, because they believed a better future for Northeast Ohio was possible.**

Even in the face of $7 million of Republican attacks, we proved that our people-powered team was unstoppable.

Now, as MAGA Republicans aim to flip OH-13 to hold on to their fragile Majority, we need to show that we’re up for the challenge once again. _But I can’t do that without your help, Peter._

[**Our first end-of-quarter deadline will be a defining moment for our re-election campaign, so I’m really going to need the support of this team. Will you pitch in $5, $25, or whatever makes sense for you before Friday at midnight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60826708/398313674/-1745762055?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.27_b1_es_all-nd&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGQwM2E3OS1kY2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k-ZbV1mmNPnvLe6XvXo1e_BO-hTdEKymDYkFIS3jQHg=)

_Emilia_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Mark Takano
subject: I was publicly outed as gay by my Republican opponent...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
But in the face of discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60826768/398313859/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJjMDJiZS1kY2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNvJm2UUjBPG7g2dwVwHyETBDqSZ6wLfxZn_PnZQmgY=)
---
Peter,

I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my coming out experience.

**In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet!**

For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed.

**I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012.**

Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans.

But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti‐LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. [**Peter, in 1994 when I was attacked for my identity, I lost because I didn’t have good people like you by my side. But now I do — and I’m hoping that I can count on you to chip in $7 to help me fight back against hateful Republicans and stop their anti‐LGBTQ+ agenda. Will you help me raise $10,000 before our End of Quarter deadline on Friday? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60826769/398313860/299171790?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230327_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJjMDJiZS1kY2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNvJm2UUjBPG7g2dwVwHyETBDqSZ6wLfxZn_PnZQmgY=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60826775/398313866/299171790?amount=7&amounts=7,15,25&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230327_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJjMDJiZS1kY2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNvJm2UUjBPG7g2dwVwHyETBDqSZ6wLfxZn_PnZQmgY=)

clean_body: But in the face of discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. | = Peter, I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet! For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed. I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012. Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans. But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti‐LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you so much — I’m so grateful to have your support. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What your donation would mean today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The amount of grassroots contributions we receive today will help demonstrate the strength of this movement. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60832967/398342977/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ12K_LAU_E_20230327_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzBlZjY5Yi1mZGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-rVXGTFsLP_q5h_83HVFwCMHoiI6msoXeAnQ8ibVto=&emci=0ef3a795-fdcc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5c0ef69b-fdcc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9027908)
---
I just officially announced that I’m running for re-election in 2024. I never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. senator. But my life has had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's. I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family. I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher. I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. The CFPB has already returned more than $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated. After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them — and I beat him. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, and to rein in student loan companies. And guess what? We got it all done. [_**But the fight to make our government work for everyone — not just the wealthy and well-connected — isn’t over. So I’m running for re-election to keep up the fight. Will you make a contribution of $5, $15, or whatever you can today and become a Founding Donor of this campaign so I can keep fighting for working families in the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60832968/398342978/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12K_LAU_E_20230327_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzBlZjY5Yi1mZGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-rVXGTFsLP_q5h_83HVFwCMHoiI6msoXeAnQ8ibVto=) | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60832969/398342979/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12K_LAU_E_20230327_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzBlZjY5Yi1mZGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-rVXGTFsLP_q5h_83HVFwCMHoiI6msoXeAnQ8ibVto=)
---
Throughout my time in Washington, I’ve learned that when you start talking about policies that help working people instead of wealthy people or big corporations, plenty of critics will be quick to tell you what you can’t do and what’s not possible.
It’s like clockwork.
Take student loan cancellation for example. Cynics said we could never put our government on the side of working-class and middle-class people who fought to get an education and are getting crushed by debt. But we got organized, we got in the fight, and we got this policy to the president’s desk.
I’ll stay in the fight to get student debt cancellation over the finish line. Because that’s a case where we still see how the rules work differently for different groups of people: Right now we have a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo, but that same system worked overnight to ensure that billion-dollar crypto firms wouldn’t lose a dime in deposits during the recent bank failures.
The difference between these two scenarios? The willingness to fight for them.
I’m in this fight all the way — and I am going to continue to use my voice to advocate for big, structural changes that help working people. I need you by my side in this fight.
[_**A contribution of $3 or anything you can will help show the naysayers that our plans — like taxing the rich, reining in big banks, and making child care affordable — have strong support. Will you please pitch in today to support my re-election and make these plans possible? The amount of grassroots contributions we receive today will help demonstrate the strength of our movement — and any amount makes a powerful difference.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60832970/398342980/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12K_LAU_E_20230327_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzBlZjY5Yi1mZGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-rVXGTFsLP_q5h_83HVFwCMHoiI6msoXeAnQ8ibVto=)
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60832971/398342981/-551446396?refcode=EMZ12K_LAU_E_20230327_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzBlZjY5Yi1mZGNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-rVXGTFsLP_q5h_83HVFwCMHoiI6msoXeAnQ8ibVto=)
---

Elizabeth

clean_body: The amount of grassroots contributions we receive today will help demonstrate the strength of this movement. | | | I just officially announced that I’m running for re-election in 2024. I never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. senator. But my life has had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's. I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family. I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher. I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. The CFPB has already returned more than $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated. After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them — and I beat him. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, and to rein in student loan companies. And guess what? We got it all done. = | = Throughout my time in Washington, I’ve learned that when you start talking about policies that help working people instead of wealthy people or big corporations, plenty of critics will be quick to tell you what you can’t do and what’s not possible. It’s like clockwork. Take student loan cancellation for example. Cynics said we could never put our government on the side of working-class and middle-class people who fought to get an education and are getting crushed by debt. But we got organized, we got in the fight, and we got this policy to the president’s desk. I’ll stay in the fight to get student debt cancellation over the finish line. Because that’s a case where we still see how the rules work differently for different groups of people: Right now we have a system that holds millions of struggling student loan borrowers in limbo, but that same system worked overnight to ensure that billion-dollar crypto firms wouldn’t lose a dime in deposits during the recent bank failures. The difference between these two scenarios? The willingness to fight for them. I’m in this fight all the way — and I am going to continue to use my voice to advocate for big, structural changes that help working people. I need you by my side in this fight. = = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Delegate Jazz Lewis
subject: CORRECTION: Friends - MD House Majority Whip Jazz Lewis Sent You His Newsletter!
body:
Find out what is coming next & what Delegate Lewis (LD- 24) has been up to!
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
|

Delegate Jazz Lewis Newsletter
Reviewing the Start of Spring & What Is Coming Next
News & updates From Delegate Jazz Lewis 3/27
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
Spring Highlights What has Majority Whip Jazz Lewis up to this Spring?
---
Headline Item: Tomorrow morning, The Prince George's County Liquor Board will be meeting on Zoom at 10 am to vote on the liquor license transfer to Woodmore Town Centre. Please see sidebar for details.
---
| |
---
Glenarden City Council Meeting
---
| |
---|---
|
Last month, Delegate Lewis spoke at Glenarden City Council's public meeting. He opposed a liquor license transfer that would create a concentration of liquor stores. Additionally, Delegate Lewis expressed his concern about a new liquor store in the area. He expanded on the negative impacts which result from creating a concentration of liquor stores, such as increased crime.
| |
---
Blue Line Corridor Community Briefing
---
| |
---|---
|
In February, Delegate Lewis spoke at the Blue Line Corridor Community Leadership Briefing by the Prince George's County Executive's staff. The County executive's office shared the planned development projects along the Blue Line Corridor. Additionally, Delegate Lewis spoke about the Blue Line Corridor Coalition's work, in partnership with the county executive's office, to encourage equity and support residents as development along the corridor begins.
| |
---
Ready 2 Read Storytime Event
---
| |
---|---
|
Delegate Lewis also visited Prince George's County Memorial Library System for a Ready 2 Read Storytime in honor of Black History Month. Delegate Lewis read to a group of children from our community as a special guest.
| |
---
Black Wealth Matters Discussion
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CA2yHY0im-_F0C3qe7nk0ENLpyk28AKpq_CxPTrJyLszCT-QxgREQXSftdxTJ95uw_YRJiAuONBw01E4as-AbLLXIPO1dny4I_7lPfWTsw7PbE16n_3qAQawkyPzR5HMIYKChLfLk1HqwYubT6UrVDEsHZrR5fiv3ep3m-a52tRbw8Ga5L8RVA==&c=DqCGb9uH0-Iaa9E2JtY6uFZZXPL3gfTCWQ7sC0RjgZ0ftAq-hrGmuw==&ch=-Xtlq4UgJCLVmSuYmQVWq4XvPSlnHhxwa_NzOxY_KsWnD-iMwesfqw==) |
---|---
|
Delegate Lewis attended a virtual discussion hosted by the Prince George's County PG Changemakers entitled Black Wealth Matters, as part of their Black history month programming. Delegate Lewis discussed social safety nets and wealth building tools.
| |
---
PTA Visits With District 24
---
| |
---|---
|
In March, Delegate Lewis joined the Bowie High School PTA and the Perrywood Elementary School PTA to discuss the many ways in which our schools, students, teachers, and parents will be impacted.
| |
---
Blue Line Corridor Coalition Meeting
---
| |
---|---
|
On Saturday March 25th, Delegate Lewis met with the Blue Line Corridor Coalition to discuss plans for developing the Blue Line Corridor and what role community stakeholders and businesses must play in supporting current residents of the corridor.
| |
---
---
| |
---
Update: March 28th Liquor Board Hearing
---
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CA2yHY0im-_F0C3qe7nk0ENLpyk28AKpq_CxPTrJyLszCT-QxgREQZGMwqBucNf5gFyMIXwOl1P-_YUbRLiEMW_BFtXldnn3K4V3W4Unfy1IODMfMvSKlEXaeIXC8d-oUMzqNRkm4hR1R9TJkpnt9IhMeM5EqNft5jAKMxFhiVFzlEAGxoaM0Rk80uQh9Eu5ETfMKRskgtRfF-ijJpu8IdDcOuYLsUwuH-fEU5ifyNg=&c=DqCGb9uH0-Iaa9E2JtY6uFZZXPL3gfTCWQ7sC0RjgZ0ftAq-hrGmuw==&ch=-Xtlq4UgJCLVmSuYmQVWq4XvPSlnHhxwa_NzOxY_KsWnD-iMwesfqw==) for the Prince George's County Liquor Board's agenda for tomorrow's meeting. The Zoom information is at the bottom of the document. If the time changes, we will reach out and respond to emails. It is important for our community to show up and make our position clear.
---
| |
---
Tools for you:
---
If you have casework for the office of Delegate Jazz Lewis. Please fill out the form below.
---
| | [Click here for our form](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CA2yHY0im-_F0C3qe7nk0ENLpyk28AKpq_CxPTrJyLszCT-QxgREQcznef4TjHUoGidhoKPb41-rcLPqlUZh_b_AZmubAkm2EfPmbfq6QjFlVjrGeje476I8-oFC1EvWrvX9wzsHjLIml5ZLbd0EwZ1t7Z3QgXuVWPuXA4Bs6CR7RASlzAa04XAjH3o6U5QaSsSPXSNtBBCAAWJxp7YO0WyopPTj8Lbtf7A2G-4xqVwfBjdgFFlA35UZ4OLGTskfXBnQlAfra91xZmXKbfwGww==&c=DqCGb9uH0-Iaa9E2JtY6uFZZXPL3gfTCWQ7sC0RjgZ0ftAq-hrGmuw==&ch=-Xtlq4UgJCLVmSuYmQVWq4XvPSlnHhxwa_NzOxY_KsWnD-iMwesfqw==)
---
One of Delegate Lewis's top priorities is to make our government work for Marylanders. Our casework team is ready to assist constituents with problems relating to the state or county government. We will make every effort to answer in a timely manner.
---
| |
---
Join our Newsletter:
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CA2yHY0im-_F0C3qe7nk0ENLpyk28AKpq_CxPTrJyLszCT-QxgREQaWymH9Bu4uQAnNQYwqoowlweCevOymSIcKxMMW62dxQoWaABpvJggV8xFudOCYWRu6-gvaUUM1L8b3iFJcdeR7SXuGKEnuVYwgICp8M7uEPVpzfrswIEWUP_xrXjqB2QKFGo9u2pzG3B-kb-TlmeWwyFCYza499jJT2b7-SFUQpAdpgDRbpryHZYlf9ij9XcwwoAyISLNr0HrKM_yG0eQLghvJopDi_H7V65RI7n_MqimieDsRSD5bfsl76-LmqgVxoYJzKm8wnO9fe5_-zPVM=&c=DqCGb9uH0-Iaa9E2JtY6uFZZXPL3gfTCWQ7sC0RjgZ0ftAq-hrGmuw==&ch=-Xtlq4UgJCLVmSuYmQVWq4XvPSlnHhxwa_NzOxY_KsWnD-iMwesfqw==) for our email sign up form to share with friends or community members who want to hear the latest news from Delegate Jazz Lewis.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Looking forward to April & Summer What's coming next for Delegate Lewis and District 24?
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Liquor Board Hearing on March 28th
---
On March 28th 21st at 10 am, Delegate Lewis will attend the Prince George's County Liquor Board's rescheduled public hearing addressing the liquor license transfer that would create a density of liquor stores in Woodmore Town Centre, which has been proven to have adverse safety and financial effects on communities. Please see the first sidebar item above for further details.
---
| |
---
| Speaking at Union Night in Annapolis
---
Delegate Lewis will be speaking at the union night at Lawyers Mall with Metro Baltimore Council AFL CIO and Baltimore DC Metro Building Trades Council, on March 27th at 7:30 pm.
---
| | |
---
| Capital Market and Neighborhood Design Center Neighborhood Walk
---
On Saturday April 1st, 10 am - 5 pm, at Creative Suitland, Delegate Lewis will join the Capitol Market team and Neighborhood Design Center for a community walk in the Blue Line Corridor for asset mapping along with an emphasis on healthy food access. The walk will specifically be conducted along routes starting at Branch Avenue Metro Station, Suitland Road Metro Station, and Addison Road Metro. For more information, please contact info@capitolmarketmd.
---
| | |
---
| District 24 Public Safety Roundtable
---
On April 29th at 3 pm, Delegate Lewis will be hosting a public safety roundtable with our public health officials, police chiefs, and fire chiefs to discuss a coordinated approach to public safety in Prince George's County as well as in District 24. Press will be invited to relay the key takeaways from the roundtable to our community.
---
| | |
---
Black History Month Art Exhibition: Black Resistance! Stories from Prince George's County or public safety round table.
---
In honor of Black History Month, the Montpelier Arts Center is featuring an exhibition highlighting stories of Black resistance in Prince George's County from the era of enslavement to the Black Lives Matter movement of the present. The exhibition is available until March 26th. [Click here to register for a free group tour](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CA2yHY0im-_F0C3qe7nk0ENLpyk28AKpq_CxPTrJyLszCT-QxgREQXSftdxTJ95u9YCA04Ecf51tkEh6fqmc2kd8EWiKvbiNDNknmYkUZY0zh6mdbFfXmW0QNb4FVjd88TfW7D0uLL3ZLkbhnQeVXcl2HXbRBkw1ANTfQyWXuQ4=&c=DqCGb9uH0-Iaa9E2JtY6uFZZXPL3gfTCWQ7sC0RjgZ0ftAq-hrGmuw==&ch=-Xtlq4UgJCLVmSuYmQVWq4XvPSlnHhxwa_NzOxY_KsWnD-iMwesfqw==).
---
| |
---
| |
---

---
| |
---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The American response to the Great Reset
body:
Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda

subject: Your RINO State Rep May Be Voting to Take Away Your Financial Freedom
body:

# [Your RINO State Rep May Be Voting to Take Away Your Financial Freedom](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=109407880&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA5NDA3ODgwLCJpYXQiOjE2Nzk5NDkyMDcsImV4cCI6MTY4MjU0MTIwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.aYMuDDfqCF6IK7GhLZyTGyvYSLRfKhMcZ-OTphs0RPA)
### Pay attention to the RINO politicians pushing for CBDCs
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/f8a193c5-ff66-4820-b489-aa478cd85de8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Mar 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f8a193c5-ff66-4820-b489-aa478cd85de8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
|
| | [Save](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=109407880&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&action=save&triggerSave=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA5NDA3ODgwLCJpYXQiOjE2Nzk5NDkyMDcsImV4cCI6MTY4MjU0MTIwNywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJzYXZlLXBvc3QifQ.WjX-etqb6x-GGoxpngrq0bLVoKxEoAcfd9I5kbUlBqg)
---
Friends,
The biggest attack on financial freedom that our country has ever seen may soon be happening in your own backyard. If you've never heard of a Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC), it is when all money is centralized in the federal government. Your bank account would be directly controlled by the Federal Reserve as opposed to a private bank like Wells Fargo or Bank of America.
If that sounds dystopian to you, that's because it is.
And if you think your Republican state legislature will protect you from it, you are also sadly mistaken. Bills that would change the definition of money to only currencies recognized by the government were recently considered in Arizona and South Dakota. The Arizona Freedom Caucus killed it in committee and the South Dakota Freedom Caucus successfully pressured Gov. Kristi Norm to veto it after it sailed through the state's RINO-polluted state legislature.
This fight over financial freedom is coming to all 50 states and Freedom Caucuses will lead the charge to protect your rights. Pay close attention to the politicians who don't.
**Montana:**
The Treasure State is once such place where a CBDC bill is being considered. In a state Donald Trump won by 17 points in the 2020 election, lawmakers are pushing to sign away your financial privacy rights with [SB 370](https://substack.com/redirect/5921dde5-cbca-4113-a18b-7f280042e67d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which recently passed the Senate on a 32-18 vote and is now being considered in the House.
The Montana Freedom Caucus came out strongly against the bill and will fight every single day until it gets put into the trash can. Unlike most Republican politicians, the MT Freedom Caucus actually wants to protect the rights of the voters who elected them.
[Montana Freedom Caucus @MTFreedomCaucus](https://substack.com/redirect/a1069751-5dc2-4d66-b5aa-9f63605f9aa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[11:55 PM ∙ Mar 10, 2023
* * *
6Likes3Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/a1069751-5dc2-4d66-b5aa-9f63605f9aa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Mississippi:**
There's one week left in the Mississippi legislature and it's officially budget time. The MS Freedom Caucus has spent the entire session fighting back against their Republican colleagues who have done nothing but grow government and raise taxes. In fact, the Republican supermajority in the House passed five new taxes in one day over the objections of the MS Freedom Caucus.
That might be a record.
[Steven Utroska @StevenUtroskaIn case you missed the floor action yesterday in the Supermajority "Republican" Mississippi House of Representatives, here is a very short clip to summarize. FIVE new taxes headed to Mississippians. It's not like we're in a recession or anything. #MSLeg https://t.co/Tpo0hm1Nzr ](https://substack.com/redirect/6e589c7d-bbe9-44a0-853f-754ce49a861b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[3:09 PM ∙ Mar 25, 2023
* * *
6Likes2Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/6e589c7d-bbe9-44a0-853f-754ce49a861b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Arizona:**
The AZ Freedom Caucus has taken the lead on issues ranging from election integrity to protecting children to banning CRT in schools and have been highly effective in pushing back on Democrat Gov. Katie Hobbs' woke agenda. Corporate media in the Copper State has taken notice and a hit piece was written about them in one of the state's largest newspapers criticizing their "far right agenda."
As AZ Freedom Caucus member Anthony Kern put it, there is nothing "far right" about common sense.
[Anthony Kern @anthonykernAZSunday headline s/b "Common-sense Legislators push back on Hobbs agenda that sexualizes our children, promotes men can get pregnant, and turns Arizona into California" @AZGOP @AZFreedomCaucus @AZSenateGOP ](https://substack.com/redirect/ad13c729-11a1-4109-a578-c56ffd25d87b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[9:50 PM ∙ Mar 26, 2023
* * *
169Likes55Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/ad13c729-11a1-4109-a578-c56ffd25d87b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Pennsylvania**
Democrats do not sugarcoat the fact that they despise the First Amendment. That became clear on the Pennsylvania House floor this week when a Democrat State Rep. [called](https://substack.com/redirect/a6a190df-2f81-46cc-adcf-3fa65d155bf3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the University of Pittsburgh to stop conservatives Michael Knowles, Cabot Phillips, and swimmer Riley Gaines from speaking on campus.
Luckily, the PA Freedom Caucus was already weeks ahead with pushing for legislation that would protect free speech on college campuses.
[Pennsylvania Freedom Caucus @PAFreedomCaucusThis morning, Rep Mayes (D-24) asked to ban three scheduled conservative speakers from Pitt's campus. Luckily, PAFC continues to be weeks ahead in the fight for free speech thanks to Rep Joe D'Orsie. Joe, if you're going to tell the future, at least let us look at your bracket 🏀 https://t.co/G8hw6m1b3Z ](https://substack.com/redirect/5edf7428-e692-4a70-9853-b01653585d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[6:47 PM ∙ Mar 21, 2023
* * *
59Likes22Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/5edf7428-e692-4a70-9853-b01653585d4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Illinois:**
Being supermajority Democrat, the Illinois legislature is a bastion of terrible governance. Recently, bills were passed to turn all school busses electric and to [remove](https://substack.com/redirect/d90c4590-15f9-4026-a97d-ad9787be2d8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) pronouns from the state's child welfare laws (Yes. They actually did that). As IL Freedom Caucus member Rep. Blaine Wilhour described it in a [press conference](https://substack.com/redirect/874d5325-2e80-4305-a15e-7d4c26f81e91?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) held this week criticizing the Democrat agenda: "We are a woke dumpster fire of a government."
Even when outnumbered, the IL Freedom Caucus never stops standing up for their constituents.
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_

P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.com/redirect/b6bca40d-cc95-4e13-8561-5ce8ab4a7313?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/902e978f-cf9e-4c9f-97df-233fd8b94dcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Family detention? I’m angry to hear that the Biden administration is “considering reviving the practice of detaining migrant families”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
The Biden administration is considering reinstating family detention for migrant families. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv2g6-GXEwQp8nshEcDXewyWW91p58wEyjOB_Q9V7iLwKU0Gs27aTU-xoAbG9RYB3NRN60b_qk0EPscVwReQLVIG4kokJvc_wOGU-gvw5bBhGnfWPeyJ8wlNaLXoauN8m8KKYkDWQxe4yu22vOIgway4azBuDtmqvS_rX4v_TGH7vpiGqWnhAYsxKnA2MbqSBflJewgCnt4ryphCOZWMSDoOtLJ5ecF6zcJUcV6qseRJ7jfd1rFGCINO76ijxnMGLi5qjT0RFhAAWfOYBu2ohbDs_VCSrzF_MS5ac87pZrv48PJ0qNsgiaCUnYAsj3y967GV4g2kAuNYf7bJuqOEQzjZtuy274JvFoqutMBKin8aZiJiHiF_sXWyh2NOCTB8wy/3uu/QOibMKaXS5GQY1HCAfOW8w/h0/B_li-ot6Pv7N2Ld9So40lo_azN8z3yfsmKEIXLHqpQU)
---
Friend, As a child of immigrants, I know how painful it is to experience policies that make one feel less than. So I am angry to hear that**the Biden administration is “considering reviving the practice of detaining migrant families,”** according to the _New York Times_. The people voted against racist and harmful immigration policies like family detention when they voted for President Biden. Biden ran on reversing Trump's inhumane policies, so this would be a huge betrayal. According to the American Association of Pediatrics, “even short periods of detention can cause psychological trauma and long-term mental health risks for children.” We can’t let this happen. [**Will you add your name right now and call on Joe Biden to not reinstate family detention for migrant families?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmGuZd85JHR2GncOl6WoAAbS6TtmDs2tW2T_QuRojcBnzAkB_rAPkVazXnfwTA7W4jd98Rdgn7OMsPhnC2wbEUJjv8eSyssjeX1Qj_boJwSSNlPBBkvsJd1Fyjb9kINGGawnLS3MLLsku1u3SVdX1RGsjIPX721vaVCZ4GK16_j0yCnv-gjPWpQnTzmUlsTOr1jocxOsneZ8s7c3-vEimVwcl_N03Gh3rUzVs80O3vCRJRMbqT27PhbEyznDyoE-z_oRyu1l3iwsyQ6MwyTaiHdyVixDX__8tP--3A36SET_aPjdgQP1L0LgxBPQkhorpKfBrET0crXEo3nf9JCqvPkylP5asrDinkKFxIbSeQpEq0JSx5UarpBS_YVhMzf8xLO0gQKoAYfZKNsmSGFyCg9WIfD0vTP3vsp8Lw4__E50lncM-9swOjoLwT8vkUeJ3KTyoEB0xmEzWXfyzm41p31bILattx3ZiIDjfsbkAWcZO5qCQtTWIdPt8qPdjH6wtzt6NIO4eeUgx9tSo-_hPt9Sw5ZeB_Td3CX5SDlskl71VvSiAK4c9dYJvLcTNx-TjlcWhtlcC2MXzVN7j1yV2WOKThris0TfxLlF-UJ77p0aA/3uu/QOibMKaXS5GQY1HCAfOW8w/h1/rxaENMCz0whcbgTPWxoyu6SPUjb3jzOTO81-FLBtbSU) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmGuZd85JHR2GncOl6WoAAbS6TtmDs2tW2T_QuRojcBnzAkB_rAPkVazXnfwTA7W4jd98Rdgn7OMsPhnC2wbEUJjv8eSyssjeX1Qj_boJwSSNlPBBkvsJd1Fyjb9kINGGawnLS3MLLsku1u3SVdX1RGsjIPX721vaVCZ4GK16_j0yCnv-gjPWpQnTzmUlsTOr1jocxOsneZ8s7c3-vEimVwcl_N03Gh3rUzVs80O3vCRJRMbqT27PhbEyznDyoE-z_oRyu1l3iwsyQ6MwyTaiHd4mdm9fV33I6nNrejf1GWgmtw4V73pQUYrD5hhwPhGSJhKOwiyrqOyPg2y941jcj6b9p8KjuRyC4lh18bZ6n4zS1ZZ4cERQa_HQIvuqFb96XxTzcq4UEZMtj0axcDHdiSFZ7NEeg8398vk0ZC7U615cVWPuOXzNpxyBc0FOtce-jXklGl6bYYx_YT0PovQM6AziwD_EXmwHBcYnmifnobyjgNAGt67gOJq7ObXmSUvAmrGFUhp4DnQzanW-pTd_sGHFyUjP2UEpwB07hRVxmGJel9z9n2JnAQm3_sKMtUIBCDehgcrNadAvc9H_WvzeuOCUxo9cNiEfo534g-FaWiJA/3uu/QOibMKaXS5GQY1HCAfOW8w/h2/41k4SlqFT9JKUkEEsl5gaiPA6MzlRy-6Qxw9Bj04fYA)
---
**During Trump’s presidency, I visited immigrant detention centers in my state and on the U.S.-Mexico border.** I met with people who came here because they wanted a better future for their children, like my parents did. And I’m still shaken to my core from the dehumanization I witnessed.
People come here for a better life, and they deserve a path to citizenship. They deserve freedom while working on their cases. Our immigrant neighbors deserve humane immigration reform, not Trump-era policies.
Unfortunately, earlier this year, the Biden administration announced new restrictions on immigration and set up more barriers for people who are desperately seeking asylum in the U.S. These harmful policies deport and expel people before they can even come here to seek hearings, and they violate the internationally-recognized human right to asylum.
Everyone fleeing danger has the right to seek safety. **Policies to lock up or deport people who come here seeking a better life are moral failures that harm our communities.**

clean_body: The Biden administration is considering reinstating family detention for migrant families. | | | Friend, As a child of immigrants, I know how painful it is to experience policies that make one feel less than. So I am angry to hear thatthe Biden administration is “considering reviving the practice of detaining migrant families,” according to the New York Times. The people voted against racist and harmful immigration policies like family detention when they voted for President Biden. Biden ran on reversing Trump's inhumane policies, so this would be a huge betrayal. According to the American Association of Pediatrics, “even short periods of detention can cause psychological trauma and long-term mental health risks for children.” We can’t let this happen. | During Trump’s presidency, I visited immigrant detention centers in my state and on the U.S.-Mexico border. I met with people who came here because they wanted a better future for their children, like my parents did. And I’m still shaken to my core from the dehumanization I witnessed. People come here for a better life, and they deserve a path to citizenship. They deserve freedom while working on their cases. Our immigrant neighbors deserve humane immigration reform, not Trump-era policies. Unfortunately, earlier this year, the Biden administration announced new restrictions on immigration and set up more barriers for people who are desperately seeking asylum in the U.S. These harmful policies deport and expel people before they can even come here to seek hearings, and they violate the internationally-recognized human right to asylum. Everyone fleeing danger has the right to seek safety. Policies to lock up or deport people who come here seeking a better life are moral failures that harm our communities. Thank you. Our country has the resources and the duty to take in asylum-seekers. It is my duty as a Congresswoman to raise hell until immigrants seeking safety and a better life are treated with dignity and respect, with their human rights protected. And that includes the 11 million undocumented people who are already living across the U.S. as our neighbors. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I announced that I'm officially running for re-election today. Here's why:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | I just officially announced that **[I’m running for re-election in 2024.](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230327-ElizabethWarren-WarrenAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230327-ElizabethWarren-WarrenAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=10281%2E9716520%2EtjVAW0)** I never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. Senator. But my life has had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's.

I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family.

I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher.

I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations. The CFPB has already returned about $16 billion to American consumers who’ve been cheated.

After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them — and I beat him. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, and to rein in student loan companies. And guess what? We got it all done.

**[But the fight to make our government work for everyone — not just the wealthy and well-connected — isn’t over. So I’m running for re-election to keep up the fight. Will you split a donation between my re-election and the DSCC today so I can keep fighting for working families alongside other Democrats in the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230327-ElizabethWarren-WarrenAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230327-ElizabethWarren-WarrenAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=10281%2E9716520%2EtjVAW0)**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Elizabeth Warren
U.S. Senator, Massachusetts

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12679?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230327-ElizabethWarren-WarrenAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230327-ElizabethWarren-WarrenAnnouncementTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=10281%2E9716520%2EtjVAW0)

| |

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. subject: Peter, Marietta, Ohio, needs your help.

body:
We have a game plan. | | | Hey Peter – I live in Athens County, Ohio, but just under an hour away is historic Marietta, Ohio. It's a beautiful small city, nestled between two rivers along the border of West Virginia. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc4s8YQ1dJ_mFM9a7K93OectSRLxn01YieodpuRSa_rD4k8T6ozcQZyFPPYsBzNBSFB0FV8MiXKONq9suT9k3f8g2amfxhui4fKX0tQPuwAso4G2czgj-9seskMOKq1u0r9Xxv6k2L8J4i3cHRHoiOnSLxsVmAwu9cqQ9nFBGfPeMOWeW66c2KL5al0J1hs_mfWKi2Zonk0mvy07B-2Cniyh6ol4v2qxjCDjqJkfQiyzX4PVuezbOZKQ-eUUQhSBcwyqqNLG9p1nrZN9DZTWo5Lr1RM3SfegDjevj_JrhJlVwTMXEm1OfQ3ZORV6Nv3HP6e0OTtBrfrjShDSDOss2cOYezw4QOsGmXSXeKQH6PHMxqAGmriW9-LX9Upz0UplG2/3uu/9Y6RHmDmSZiMZ-TYSu66kg/h0/WsH6P6LpzZzSG_mEaBtVo2_Xrpr_cziDLytqVmBamFE) Marietta is also the oldest city in Ohio and now serves as the county seat of Washington County. The county is becoming increasingly conservative, voting for a Republican president every year since 2000. **But Marietta, like many small cities in the Midwest, needs Democratic policies.** It's faced business closures, rising prices, and a lack of political priority on getting things done. Marietta residents need better infrastructure, education, access to healthcare, affordable housing, and economic opportunities. **Peter, Republicans have failed on all these counts. We have the power to turn that around – and it starts in towns like Marietta.** United Rural Democrats is committed to organizing, supporting, and campaigning for Democrats and Democratic candidates in rural areas that the Democratic Party has largely put on the backburner for too long. **_[Will you help us work in places like Marietta and small cities across rural America, Peter? Chip in $5 or more to support United Rural Democrats as we deploy the resources that politicians won't – and drive real change for rural voters.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc4s8YQ1dJ_mFM9a7K93Oecv5llAPASjhWPUK8P1UDuIsAswG56v3WkdgTL3HFgpiSoTs2mP93s72JX1TOUApAoFiXrjZZg4bR_kPy60gIqUIM_Iypj4w9AKhHNt_DnzHADGl2aYyGroh5BErcWVLtajtvwwhXO3Ia9QSIf1WF1ZTqkbsp_ITiAI9LMJlFCrDMKqvN_pD_WJ4jinHfV5OJhndTVMfJmRuLnroQ7gKzjtdSJ2ejB-L8wHCyluo7qq74XC7ubpmXN45C6sM-Yc7tfHTAw1bLrAZLd1nbnQmbfZd5OG2aJo3LiDaz5mprib5M0iAIoXoC7HC55EurzWt4uB1QhepRsldcvhTIRLHwqq774TP6tdCJjxvN6pS7QE5z/3uu/9Y6RHmDmSZiMZ-TYSu66kg/h1/FfK860mhy6L8ttIZKdEj3kmRQpqXW9jFwdS4CjVWpkM)_** **[CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gc4s8YQ1dJ_mFM9a7K93OecgKOwTP4xSzdVkWZnFRZ7ioshxDVAph5xSrDz5OnUEfsPsbqB9eKmy9vUxcM8CHPuHsLVJJYGXcd-CGuJAY88d7_e2kL5uHK9qvvOK7fDDOD2lYYh-Ov2nUdWU04JBmXPZVPYRPouZYSg5LGjfvOHXM-JKLqoY7GQB1JpkDeCnjS4fuWpFd3a7XK8yBoKicHyQdwurQA2zXYOpstCCuWduvTtP8d80HOCPyODI8YtOQ_R7ymMUuNJ_K-Lj_EYKafyxbticnbcYIH_brSoujPikRowvvYsDyn7Q8-sydBjIZuZX4z_nNdUmCt291aprxEcUaH4LMaxnKssO4YmYrihdzYF75GC6Ja57B-7z3azAkA/3uu/9Y6RHmDmSZiMZ-TYSu66kg/h2/uTELSqVxfy_4JAu1QFbGSiTxQnd4pMYqhZSciOucTPs)** Thank you for your support, Peter. – Natalie Flanagan
Vice President of United Rural Democrats

---

clean_body: We have a game plan. | | | Hey Peter – I live in Athens County, Ohio, but just under an hour away is historic Marietta, Ohio. It's a beautiful small city, nestled between two rivers along the border of West Virginia. Marietta is also the oldest city in Ohio and now serves as the county seat of Washington County. The county is becoming increasingly conservative, voting for a Republican president every year since 2000. But Marietta, like many small cities in the Midwest, needs Democratic policies. It's faced business closures, rising prices, and a lack of political priority on getting things done. Marietta residents need better infrastructure, education, access to healthcare, affordable housing, and economic opportunities. Peter, Republicans have failed on all these counts. We have the power to turn that around – and it starts in towns like Marietta. United Rural Democrats is committed to organizing, supporting, and campaigning for Democrats and Democratic candidates in rural areas that the Democratic Party has largely put on the backburner for too long. Thank you for your support, Peter. – Natalie Flanagan Vice President of United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema ghosts Dem donors, cozies up to GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
Sinema ignores Dem donors asking for their money back | |
---
Peter – Kyrsten Sinema truly has no shame. Last week, Politico reported on how Sinema **trashed Democrats** and literally **gave** **the middle finger to President Biden’s White House,** all while schmoozing with Republican lobbyists and donors to get them to pad her campaign account. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Our hearts are broken and we are enraged
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

I am devastated and angry. Enough is enough.
Our hearts are broken and we are enraged after tragedy has struck again, this time at an elementary school in Nashville, Tennessee.
Our nation’s schools should be among the safest places in our communities. But today, Covenant School in Nashville turned into the scene of a nightmare.
This morning, a woman armed with two assault rifles and a handgun entered the school. Within a matter of minutes, the shooter opened fire and killed at least three students and three teachers.
These victims are young children. Children of preschool age to sixth grade. And now countless other kids and their parents will live with the trauma that comes with experiencing a mass shooting.
Our children deserve better. Our teachers shouldn’t have to feel unsafe in their place of work.
When will our nation have the courage to stand up and take action to keep our communities and our children safe from gun violence?
There are now families in Nashville who will have to find a way forward without their children who were robbed from them by a senseless act of violence. Violence that could have been prevented if our elected leaders in Congress had the courage to act.
They join a community who understands this kind of tragedy all too well. Whether it be Sandy Hook, Parkland, or any of the other countless communities who have experienced the tragedy of a school shooting.
But now we must ask ourselves: What will we do? What will we do to stop this from ever happening again?
For us at Giffords, the answer is clear. We will continue demanding more change from our elected officials and will not rest until we see a future free from gun violence.
Thank you for standing with us in this struggle.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

* * *

**Giffords PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to Giffords PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230327-2-30&t=1&akid=4796%2E3935704%2EDASyur)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4796%2E3935704%2EDASyur) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: BIG VOTE for Key Plastic Waste Reduction bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60828305/398320060/-620332422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ZGEzNGI4LWUzY2MtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g6xvgK2PEBgipiFrq91YPtYSXb5qLDTxwo1UUj8UqvM=&emci=92d46605-e1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d4da34b8-e3cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Hi Peter, **The Foam-Free Oregon bill (SB 543) is scheduled for a vote in the state senate tomorrow.** If passed, this bill would phase out polystyrene foam (also known as Styrofoam) food packaging, packing peanuts, and coolers. By 2025, it would prohibit the use and sale of these items, and it would prohibit the use of toxic forever chemicals in foodware containers. [**This bill is one of our major priorities for the year. Will you help this bill pass the senate by urging your state senator to vote yes right away?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60828306/398320061/-620332422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ZGEzNGI4LWUzY2MtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g6xvgK2PEBgipiFrq91YPtYSXb5qLDTxwo1UUj8UqvM=&emci=92d46605-e1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d4da34b8-e3cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Expanded polystyrene is a type of foamed plastic made from fossil fuels. Most of us know it as Styrofoam, and it’s typically thrown away after a single-use. When used for food packaging, harmful chemicals can migrate to the food and beverages we eat and drink. As it breaks up into smaller pieces, they become hard to clean up, disperse rapidly, are consumed by animals carrying toxins up the food chain, and exist in the environment for much longer than we ever will. It’s also one of the most commonly picked up items at beach cleanups. Our rural communities along the coast call the beach winter season “plastic debris season” as massive amounts of plastic wash ashore. Community members invest numerous hours cleaning our beaches and roads. [**Ten cities in Oregon already have similar ordinances banning plastic foam foodware. It’s time for our state to become foam-free, too. We need to pass SB 543.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60828307/398320062/-620332422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ZGEzNGI4LWUzY2MtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g6xvgK2PEBgipiFrq91YPtYSXb5qLDTxwo1UUj8UqvM=&emci=92d46605-e1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d4da34b8-e3cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Plastic destroys our health and environment at every stage of its lifecycle–from living near facilities extracting fossil fuels or manufacturing plastic, simply breathing near plastic waste incinerators, or eating food heated in plastic packaging. What’s worse is plastic is literally everywhere; it’s in our forests, in our oceans, and in our bodies. [**We need your help to make sure that we are doing everything we can to reduce plastic’s devastating effect on our climate, environment, and health. Please join us in contacting our lawmakers today to tell them we need the Foam-Free Oregon bill (SB 543).**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60828308/398320063/-620332422?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ0ZGEzNGI4LWUzY2MtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g6xvgK2PEBgipiFrq91YPtYSXb5qLDTxwo1UUj8UqvM=&emci=92d46605-e1cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d4da34b8-e3cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Sincerely, Julia DeGraw

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, The Foam-Free Oregon bill (SB 543) is scheduled for a vote in the state senate tomorrow. If passed, this bill would phase out polystyrene foam (also known as Styrofoam) food packaging, packing peanuts, and coolers. By 2025, it would prohibit the use and sale of these items, and it would prohibit the use of toxic forever chemicals in foodware containers. Expanded polystyrene is a type of foamed plastic made from fossil fuels. Most of us know it as Styrofoam, and it’s typically thrown away after a single-use. When used for food packaging, harmful chemicals can migrate to the food and beverages we eat and drink. As it breaks up into smaller pieces, they become hard to clean up, disperse rapidly, are consumed by animals carrying toxins up the food chain, and exist in the environment for much longer than we ever will. It’s also one of the most commonly picked up items at beach cleanups. Our rural communities along the coast call the beach winter season “plastic debris season” as massive amounts of plastic wash ashore. Community members invest numerous hours cleaning our beaches and roads. Plastic destroys our health and environment at every stage of its lifecycle–from living near facilities extracting fossil fuels or manufacturing plastic, simply breathing near plastic waste incinerators, or eating food heated in plastic packaging. What’s worse is plastic is literally everywhere; it’s in our forests, in our oceans, and in our bodies. Sincerely, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. name: VoteVets
subject: It’s the guns.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Derek —
We’ve said it too many times now. It’s the guns.
They’ll come back and say it’s “CRT” or “woke politics” that’s dangerous for our kids.
But we’ll say it again — it’s the guns.
They’ll come back and say it’s “gender ideology.”
But again — it’s the guns.
A dozen times, a hundred times, a thousand times.
**It’s the guns that are killing our kids.**
The shooter in Nashville carried two assault rifles into that school today. These are weapons of war. Every enlistee spends months training on them, and they continue training throughout their military careers. The possession and use of these weapons is strictly regulated on bases.
Here at VoteVets, we know it all too well. These weapons have no place in civilian hands, and we’ll continue pushing to keep our kids safe by keeping these weapons off our streets.
But today, we’re thinking of six new families with an empty seat at the dinner table.
Stay strong, and don’t lose hope. We need you with us in this fight.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

clean_body: | | | Nancy Pelosi changed the face of power Peter — as House speaker, Nancy Pelosi changed the face of power in our country forever. For more than 20 years, Speaker Emerita Pelosi used her position in House leadership to stand up for what's right. She boldly took on Republican extremists, fought to hold Donald Trump accountable, and worked to defend reproductive freedom. We're so grateful for her leadership. Yesterday was Speaker Emerita Pelosi's birthday, so we're releasing this custom phone background to honor her legacy. Here is a sneak peak for top supporters: Download this special phone background now: Speaker Emerita Pelosi has shown us what powerful, effective leadership looks like, and EMILYs List is so proud that she paved the way for more Democratic pro-choice women like her to hold office. clean_body: | | | | It is never too early to lay the groundwork for a strong grassroots effort. And we need everyone to join this campaign before we can get out there and start knocking on doors. = = With the new Republican majority, Rick sees the Republican shenanigans every day. When Democrats controlled Congress, we saw major pieces of legislation passed (CHIPS ACT, Inflation Reduction Act, etc) but now we see Republicans empowering conspiracy theorists and MAGA acolytes. We need real leadership in Congress. If we can get another 50 people to join us today then we will be one step closer to taking control of Congress and making sure representatives, like Rick, are there to fight for our values. = Join us today and help us stop the extremists and build a grassroots effort that will take back Congress. Can we count on you? name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Here’s what’s happening on Friday, March 31
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Republican super PACs and the far-right are already raising millions to come after Cori and our progressive movement.
#
Peter, it's Adrastos — Cori’s campaign manager.
We’re coming up on our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2023 on Friday, March 31st, and **our team is doing everything we can to reach our $75,000 goal.**
[**I know $75,000 is an ambitious goal, but Cori needs our support. So if you’re in a place to do so, will you chip in $5 now? Whether you can give a little more or a little less, every donation adds up in a powerful way.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230327.DoViNp&amount=5&refcode=em20230327-2406&t=1&akid=2406%2E1082990%2EnMwt7F)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230327.DoViNp&amount=5&refcode=em20230327-2406&t=20&akid=2406%2E1082990%2EnMwt7F)**
Here’s why this goal is so important, Peter:
After Friday, we'll publicly report our numbers to the Federal Election Commission, and everyone will be able to see how much we’ve raised so far this year.
While 2024 seems far away, we know that Republican super PACs and the far-right are already raising _**millions** _to come after Cori and our progressive movement. That means they will be looking at our Q1 numbers as indicators of strength.
Cori is hard at work in Congress delivering for people in St. Louis and communities around the country. In just the past few weeks alone, she introduced bills to cap insulin at $20 per vial and protect access to medication abortion. **Now, we need this powerful grassroots team to match Cori's efforts and ensure we have the resources to keep Cori on the frontlines of our movement.**
**[So with just four days until our big deadline, will you chip in now to show your support for Cori and help us hit our $75,000 goal? We’re counting on your help, Peter.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230327.DoViNp&amount=5&refcode=em20230327-2406&t=21&akid=2406%2E1082990%2EnMwt7F)**
In solidarity,
Adrastos Da Silva
Campaign Manager, Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230327?refcode=em20230327-2406-footer&t=22&refcode2=2406_1082990_nMwt7F&akid=2406%2E1082990%2EnMwt7F) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

Qatar controversially has aligned itself with Islamic terrorists and extremists which has placed it at odds with the United States, Israel and other U.S. allies in the Middle East. ---|--- | | | | | As part of the red carpet rollout for illegal immigrants the Biden administration is dedicating tens of millions of dollars to provide migrant youths with a multitude of services once they are released from government shelters. This includes medical, educational, legal and an array of other services. American taxpayers will also fund detailed home studies by deploying case managers to conduct intensive in-home engagements and virtual check-ins to ensure the safety and continued support for the young migrants and the families they have been released to. ---|--- | | | Just the News A Texas county court has ruled in favor of releasing information about Qatar’s potential influence over Texas A&M; University through funding and by hosting one of the school’s campuses in the Gulf State. In an effort to clean up voter rolls and prevent possible voter fraud, Judicial Watch, a conservative organization that promotes government transparency, sued Los Angeles County on behalf of legally registered voters. We know you’re sick of partisanship and misogyny that dominates right-wing media. But, just when you thought right-wing media couldn’t get any worse, they’ve reached a new low with Governor Whitmer. Last week, the New York Times reported that Tucker Carlson’s team recently “held a mock debate about whether they would prefer to have sex with [the Michigan GOP gubernatorial nominee] or her Democratic opponent, Gov. Gretchen Whitmer.”

Disgusting.

Here’s the deal, though: This sexist nonsense won’t distract Gretchen Whitmer from getting things done for Michiganders. And we need your help to fight back.

Governor Whitmer and the Democratic House and Senate are staying laser-focused on doing the right things to keep Michigan moving forward, and we won’t let the noise from sexist attacks distract from the work she’s done to improve the lives of Michiganders.

But we know what we’ve seen from right-wing talking heads are just another string of attacks targeting Gretchen Whitmer, **_and we know that they’re not going to stop because they’re trying to stall all of our hard-fought progress._**

Gretchen Whitmer has dealt with sexist attacks before, and just like before, it’s not going to stop our progress in Michigan. We’re ready to double down and continue to get things done.

**[The right-wing attacks are just beginning, and we need to be ready to fight back against sexist, partisan attacks like these.
