name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: RELEASE: California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis Endorses Dave Min for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
“Dave has a record of passing critical legislation protecting reproductive freedom” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f6cde4a31db4/releasecalifornia-lieutenant-governor-eleni-kounalakis-endorses-dave-min-for-congress-15652539?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** March 27, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis Endorses Dave Min for Congress** _“Dave has a record of passing critical legislation protecting reproductive freedom”_ **IRVINE, CA** — Today, California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis endorsed Dave Min in his campaign for California’s 47th Congressional District, citing his strong record of support for women and girls. Min, who is endorsed by Congressional leaders Katie Porter, Judy Chu, and Grace Meng, California State Treasurer Fiona Ma, over 25 members of the CA Legislative Women’s Caucus, over 50 in-district locally elected leaders, and SEIU California, [received](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=7394d8f710&e=7017cc100e) a 100% Legislative Scorecard from Planned Parenthood Action. **“Since being elected to the legislature, Dave has been a strong and outspoken ally for women and girls,”** said Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis. **“Dave has a record of passing critical legislation protecting reproductive freedom, ending the cycle of domestic abuse, and expanding health care coverage. I am thrilled to endorse him for Congress and excited to continue our partnership building a more equitable, just, and opportunity-filled state for all Californians.”** Eleni Kounalakis was elected Lt. Governor of California in 2018 as the first woman to be elected to the position. During her first term in office, she served as a fierce advocate on behalf of California’s public university students, fought against offshore drilling on California’s coast, made strides to expand gender equality and LGBTQ+ rights, and represented California’s interests on the global stage. A native Californian, successful businesswoman, and proud mom of two boys, Eleni has never stopped fighting for a brighter future for California. In the State Senate, Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on [family safety](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=8b08b34f3f&e=7017cc100e) and [women’s reproductive rights.](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=6ad133b3c6&e=7017cc100e) When the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in the summer of 2022, Senator Min co-sponsored Senate Constitutional Amendment 10, which now protects reproductive freedom for all Californians. In addition to protecting a woman’s right to choose statewide, Senator Min was also a leading voice for bringing an end to the Providence and Hoag affiliation among local hospitals. The merger had not only interfered with access to basic health care, but also led to discriminatory practices against LGBTQ+ patients and reproductive services on the basis of religious beliefs. Dave is married to UC Irvine School of Law Professor Jane Stoever who runs the law school’s Domestic Violence Clinic and serves as Director of the UC Irvine Initiative to End Family Violence. Professor Stoever is one of the country’s leading experts in this area, and has testified multiple times before the California State Legislature and met with President Joe Biden and dozens of Congressional leaders on behalf of women and children’s safety issues. Dave and Jane live and are raising their three young children in Irvine, which is in the heart of the 47th Congressional District. ############ _California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. clean_body: “Dave has a record of passing critical legislation protecting reproductive freedom” | | | | | | | For Immediate Release: March 27, 2023 Contact:mailto:press@davemin.com California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis Endorses Dave Min for Congress “Dave has a record of passing critical legislation protecting reproductive freedom” IRVINE, CA — Today, California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis endorsed Dave Min in his campaign for California’s 47th Congressional District, citing his strong record of support for women and girls. Min, who is endorsed by Congressional leaders Katie Porter, Judy Chu, and Grace Meng, California State Treasurer Fiona Ma, over 25 members of the CA Legislative Women’s Caucus, over 50 in-district locally elected leaders, and SEIU California, a 100% Legislative Scorecard from Planned Parenthood Action. “Since being elected to the legislature, Dave has been a strong and outspoken ally for women and girls,” said Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis. “Dave has a record of passing critical legislation protecting reproductive freedom, ending the cycle of domestic abuse, and expanding health care coverage. I am thrilled to endorse him for Congress and excited to continue our partnership building a more equitable, just, and opportunity-filled state for all Californians.” Eleni Kounalakis was elected Lt. Governor of California in 2018 as the first woman to be elected to the position. During her first term in office, she served as a fierce advocate on behalf of California’s public university students, fought against offshore drilling on California’s coast, made strides to expand gender equality and LGBTQ+ rights, and represented California’s interests on the global stage. A native Californian, successful businesswoman, and proud mom of two boys, Eleni has never stopped fighting for a brighter future for California. In the State Senate, Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on and When the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade in the summer of 2022, Senator Min co-sponsored Senate Constitutional Amendment 10, which now protects reproductive freedom for all Californians. In addition to protecting a woman’s right to choose statewide, Senator Min was also a leading voice for bringing an end to the Providence and Hoag affiliation among local hospitals. The merger had not only interfered with access to basic health care, but also led to discriminatory practices against LGBTQ+ patients and reproductive services on the basis of religious beliefs. Dave is married to UC Irvine School of Law Professor Jane Stoever who runs the law school’s Domestic Violence Clinic and serves as Director of the UC Irvine Initiative to End Family Violence. Professor Stoever is one of the country’s leading experts in this area, and has testified multiple times before the California State Legislature and met with President Joe Biden and dozens of Congressional leaders on behalf of women and children’s safety issues. Dave and Jane live and are raising their three young children in Irvine, which is in the heart of the 47th Congressional District. ############ California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. | | | Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024 PO Box 5959 Irvine, CA 92616 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Gearing up for 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The candidates we recruit now, like in past years, will become progressive
champions who challenge the political establishment and fight alongside
leaders like AOC, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee — but only if
we have the resources to support them.

Our endorsed candidates are fighting for bold, progressive solutions to
our current crises in Congress, and transforming the Democratic Party
while they work. Here’s what a few of our JD candidates from past years
have been up to:

* As Congresswoman, Summer Lee is tackling the environmental racism that
harms communities like the one she represents. She recently joined
with western Pennsylvania leaders to celebrate federal funding that
will go toward community-level air quality monitoring and keeping our
neighbors safe.
* Cori Bush joined other Justice Democrats in reintroducing the Justice
For All Act — the most comprehensive environmental justice legislation
in history that would expand civil rights and protect our communities
from discrimination.
* Last week, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez spoke out on the House floor
against the bills in states across the country banning books that
focus on race, the LGBTQ+ community and more. Republicans are banning
books like “The Life of Rosa Parks” — we deserve leaders who will
fight back against that kind of fascism.
* As one of Congress’s only former educators, Jamaal Bowman understands
the importance of education equity in racial and economic justice.
That’s why he introduced the More Teaching Less Testing Act created to
provide opportunities and design systems that support high quality
teaching and learning.
* But that’s not all — there are even more Justice Democrats in Congress
fighting for policies that actually address the needs of our
communities and shifting the conversation about what’s politically
possible in Washington.

With your support, we’ve had some incredible victories over the last few
years. We recruited AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee to run
for Congress — and worked with their campaigns all the way from day one
through victory.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132436?refcode=em20230327-28195&t=1001&akid=28195%2E1203867%2EbPA19v ]Now, we’re gearing up for 2024 and we need your help again.
Peter, we need to
hit our $250K goal by midnight on March 31. Will you make a contribution
to Justice Democrats now so we can recruit and support as many progressive
candidates as possible this cycle?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/132436?refcode=em20230327-28195&t=1020&akid=28195%2E1203867%2EbPA19v ]Contribute $3

Thank you for helping us build our movement’s power.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=28195%2E1203867%2EbPA19v ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=28195%2E1203867%2EbPA19v ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230327-28195-footer&t=1023&refcode2=28195_1203867_bPA19v&akid=28195%2E1203867%2EbPA19v

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=28195%2E1203867%2EbPA19v

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Jason Crow
subject: Marching as an Army private
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

20 years ago my life changed forever as I started leading a platoon of young paratroopers in the invasion of Iraq.

https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-03-aumf [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-03-aumf]

It was 2003. We didn’t know what would happen, but we had each other. I think about these soldiers a lot.

It’s said that you see the best and worst of humanity in war. It’s true. I witnessed sheer brutality, but also acts of selfless-service and courage.

Now, as a Congressman, it’s very personal for me. These debates about war and peace have names and faces. I think back to my time marching in the boots of an Army private. I carry their stories with me in every debate.

When Washington makes decisions, young Americans have to follow through. Someone’s daughter, son, mother, or father has to do the work. Sometimes they don’t come home.

We just ended our longest war — one that frankly should have ended a long time ago. We owe those who gave their lives an honest assessment of how we use our military and its limitations. I’m ready to have that debate.

Here’s what I believe, folks: No more blank checks on use of our military. For any administration. It’s way past time for Congress to take back its authority over matters of war and peace. Congress must debate and decide before sending young Americans into harm’s way again. Will you sign on if you agree?

ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2023-03-aumf]

We need a new American patriotism, born out of humility and sacrifice. It’s time we had these honest discussions.

— Jason

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-march-2023]

*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

[https://secure.ngpvan.com/5AdTmae3UU6fPeitwGd55w2] We believe that emails are an important way for Jason Crow for Congress to stay in contact with supporters like you. We appreciate any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. You can contact us here [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com?subject=Feedback] with any questions, concerns, or ideas. To receive text updates from Team Crow, join us here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bjvZx6_NWU2fx5btnSgikw2] .

| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** Last week, House Republicans brought in the TikTok CEO to answer questions on the social media app’s data-collecting practices and connection to the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). It’s as bad as we thought. Our country’s most significant existential threat is the administration’s blind eye when it comes to the CCP. Now, they are using free market principles as a disguise to trick Americans into permitting their continued infiltration of our country.
Our mission with Unleash America PAC has just begun, and we need your help. clean_body: | | | | | March 27, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 6 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) Last week, House Republicans brought in the TikTok CEO to answer questions on the social media app’s data-collecting practices and connection to the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). It’s as bad as we thought. Our country’s most significant existential threat is the administration’s blind eye when it comes to the CCP. Now, they are using free market principles as a disguise to trick Americans into permitting their continued infiltration of our country. Our mission with Unleash America PAC has just begun, and we need your help. In addition to receiving my weekly email, be sure to follow Unleash America's social media accounts on , , and-. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | Hung Cao joins Fox and Friends FIRST to discuss new “unlimited” alliance between Russia and China As Russian President Vladimir Putin welcomed Chinese President Xi Jinping to Russia, Hung Cao joined Fox News to discuss what this alliance could mean for the conflict in Ukraine and the national security of the United States. While China portrays itself as a peace-seeking world leader in the Ukraine conflict, the reality is China wants to prolong the conflict to divert attention from its own military build-up and aggression. | The rise of woke ideology instead of meritocracy Cao writes in a new Washington Times op-ed “Over the last decade, the United States has witnessed a concerning trend in which meritocracy in business, the military, and education is increasingly sidelined in favor of what we know as “woke” ideology. This trend has grave consequences for our country’s future. It undermines the fundamental principles of fairness, equality, and opportunity that have made America the land of the free and the home of the brave.” | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #UnleashAmerica! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you for reading. Be sure to follow Unleash America on social media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. | | Our first FEC deadline of the year is just 4 days away.

This is an opportunity to show Marjorie Taylor Greene how much we raised to take back control of Congress and boot her off her committees.

It’s an opportunity to show the country just how strong our grassroots team is – to show everyone from Joe Biden and the DNC to Donald Trump and the entire GOP that Democrats are ready to defend Georgia.

_**But it’s also a risk._**

body:
Available Online Where Most Books are Sold | | |
# CDC States that 1 in 36 Kids Have Autism — Critics Slam Agency’s Failure to Investigate Causes
---
| _One in 36 (2.8%) 8-year-old children — 4% of boys and 1% of girls — have an autism spectrum disorder (ASD), based on an analysis of data from 2020, published by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention._
---
| [ ](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=b17b933dab&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| The latest findings, reported in the CDC’s Morbidity and Mortality Weekly Report, show an increase from the last report, which found 1 in 44 8-year-olds (2.3%) had autism in 2018.

Since the CDC started collecting the data, prevalence estimates have skyrocketed from 1 in 150 in the 2000's, to today’s estimate of 1 in 36 children in 2020. The trend has been increasing for decades. Autism prevalence in the 1980s, which was 1 in 1,000 children, already represented a tenfold increase over the condition’s estimated prevalence in the 1970's of 1 in 10,000.

A series of reports published over the last 12 months predicted a massive growth in the ASD treatment industry over the next several years due to rising global rates of autism and increasing investment in pharmaceutical research and development.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=a71f443f3b&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| | Modern medicine considers Autism to be an “incurable diagnosis,” but Warrior Mom challenges this claim, sharing one mother’s journey in healing her son's underlying conditions associated with autism so he could live a fully functional life. It is an inspiring story of hope and an indispensable guidebook for any parent desperate for answers on what to do if they think their child could have autism.
---
| [ ](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=72c5603bca&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
|
---
| | [Buy Now](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=87645e9950&e=3a42edfdc4 "Buy Now")
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6f98f890e7&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
Tracy Slepcevic is a Bestselling Author, Certified Integrative Health Coach, Speaker, Air Force Veteran, and the founder of Pur Health, LLC. She is educated in the field of Complementary and Alternative Medicine and has dedicated over 14 years to researching various treatments and therapies for individuals with Autism Spectrum Disorder. Over the years, she has worked with various doctors, scientists, advocates, and researchers, and she has made it her mission to educate families on the importance of living a healthy lifestyle.

clean_body: Available Online Where Most Books are Sold | | | CDC States that 1 in 36 Kids Have Autism — Critics Slam Agency’s Failure to Investigate Causes | One in 36 (2.8%) 8-year-old children — 4% of boys and 1% of girls — have an autism spectrum disorder (ASD), based on an analysis of data from 2020, published by the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. | | The latest findings, reported in the CDC’s Morbidity and Mortality Weekly Report, show an increase from the last report, which found 1 in 44 8-year-olds (2.3%) had autism in 2018. Since the CDC started collecting the data, prevalence estimates have skyrocketed from 1 in 150 in the 2000's, to today’s estimate of 1 in 36 children in 2020. The trend has been increasing for decades. Autism prevalence in the 1980s, which was 1 in 1,000 children, already represented a tenfold increase over the condition’s estimated prevalence in the 1970's of 1 in 10,000. A series of reports published over the last 12 months predicted a massive growth in the ASD treatment industry over the next several years due to rising global rates of autism and increasing investment in pharmaceutical research and development. | | | | Modern medicine considers Autism to be an “incurable diagnosis,” but Warrior Mom challenges this claim, sharing one mother’s journey in healing her son's underlying conditions associated with autism so he could live a fully functional life. It is an inspiring story of hope and an indispensable guidebook for any parent desperate for answers on what to do if they think their child could have autism. | | | | "Buy Now" | | | Tracy Slepcevic is a Bestselling Author, Certified Integrative Health Coach, Speaker, Air Force Veteran, and the founder of Pur Health, LLC. She is educated in the field of Complementary and Alternative Medicine and has dedicated over 14 years to researching various treatments and therapies for individuals with Autism Spectrum Disorder. Over the years, she has worked with various doctors, scientists, advocates, and researchers, and she has made it her mission to educate families on the importance of living a healthy lifestyle. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@warriormom.org | | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Warrior Mom 5857 Owens Ave Ste. 300 Carlsbad, CA 92008 USA

The first FEC quarterly fundraising deadline of the year is just days away. After the deadline, we – along with every campaign across the country – will have to publicly report our fundraising numbers from the first quarter of the year. **Here’s why the numbers on our FEC reports matter:**
* Donors and advocacy groups use them to decide which campaigns are worth investing in.

* Potential opponents look at them to gauge which candidates they think they could defeat.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This fight isn’t over. So today I’m announcing:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)
I just officially announced that **[I’m running for re-election in 2024](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230327-2?refcode=EMAF27_2_EW_20230327_V2_F&refcode2=20113_3422442_85LXQl&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)**. I never in a zillion years thought I'd be a U.S. Senator. But my life has had a lot of twists and turns, just like a lot of people's.
I grew up on the ragged edge of the middle class. After my daddy’s heart attack, my family came within an inch from losing our house, but my mother got a minimum wage job at Sears that saved our family.
I dropped out of college at 19 to get married, but got a second chance at a public college that cost $50 a semester and got to live my dream of becoming a public school teacher.
I’ve dedicated my career to studying why families go broke and fighting to rebuild the middle class. **That’s how I met Katie Porter, when she was one of my law students studying consumer law.** After Wall Street crashed our economy in 2008, I fought to create the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau to protect people from getting scammed by big banks and corporations.
After Senate Republicans vowed to block my nomination to serve as the CFPB’s first director, I went back home to Massachusetts and ran against one of them — and I beat him. I ran to tax greedy corporations, to invest in jobs and our infrastructure, and to rein in student loan companies. And guess what? We got it all done.
[**But the fight to make our government work for everyone — not just the wealthy and well-connected — isn’t over. So I’m running for re-election to keep up the fight — and I would be thrilled to have Katie Porter by my side in the Senate so we can do this work together. Will you split a donation between Katie’s campaign for Senate and my re-election campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230327-2?refcode=EMAF27_2_EW_20230327_V2_F&refcode2=20113_3422442_85LXQl&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230327-2?refcode=EMAF27_2_EW_20230327_V2_F&refcode2=20113_3422442_85LXQl&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)**
I still remember the first day Katie and I met. My class was held early in the morning, meaning a lot of students had their heads down, trying to avoid being called on. But not Katie. She was determined and ready to go. When the first answer she gave wasn’t her strongest, she came to my office hours and said, “Please keep calling on me. I am going to learn to do this.”
Years later, in 2012, then-Attorney General of California Kamala Harris secured a settlement of $18 billion from our country’s biggest banks for their predatory lending practices that spurred the 2008 housing crisis. She asked if I knew anyone who could work as an “independent monitor” to make sure the Big Banks actually paid California families the money they were now owed. It was a massive undertaking, but I knew just the person for the job: my former student Katie Porter. She served as a watchdog over Wall Street banks and held their feet to the fire to ensure California families received the billions they were owed.
When she decided to run for Congress in 2018, I was very happy to support her. I knew that we needed more people like Katie in Washington — who understood the real experiences that working families faced, who had the courage to stand up to big corporations and special interests, and who would fight to make our government work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. A Democrat hadn’t represented her district for decades, but she knew exactly how to personally connect with voters, build a strong movement, and win. She flipped that seat, and she’s been winning for working people ever since.
**Katie and I are still continuing the fight to hold Big Banks accountable and protect consumers. We even proposed a bill together earlier this month that places stricter rules on the banking industry to prevent more bank collapses. I’ve been a fan of hers for years and years, and it would be a great honor to serve alongside Katie in the Senate to get more done for working people.**
[**Before Friday’s critical end-of-quarter deadline, will you please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Katie Porter’s race for Senate? Side by side, we’re going to put government on the side of working people.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230327-2?refcode=EMAF27_2_EW_20230327_V2_F&refcode2=20113_3422442_85LXQl&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230327-2?refcode=EMAF27_2_EW_20230327_V2_F&refcode2=20113_3422442_85LXQl&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF27_2_EW_20230327_V2_F&t=2&refcode2=20113_3422442_85LXQl&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=20113%2E3422442%2E85LXQl)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

End-of-Quarter deadlines are few and far between, and _**they 're the MOST important deadlines of the year.**_

Not only are they our best shot at showing our strength to the Democrats before the upcoming elections, but the liberal donors and D.C. establishment will be watching our report like a hawk because they're looking for every and any opportunity they can to get a leg up on us in the coming months.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email]Friends,
I have some serious news: both mine and Don Davis’ seats are vulnerable in 2024.
We’re coming together to add fuel to both of our campaigns and prepare for whatever attacks national Republicans are planning to send our way. Can you rush in a $30 split donation to support both of our campaigns? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email&amount=30]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
RUSH IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] RUSH IN $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
RUSH IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] RUSH IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
RUSH IN $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email]
Our goal in 2024 is to take back the House. To make it happen, we have to hold on to both of our seats in North Carolina. Both Don and I are focused on fighting for North Carolina families in DC. From affordable health care to revitalizing our economy, we both are working day in and day out to deliver results.
The GOP has made it clear that they are not only going to try and hold on to the House, but expand their majority in 2024. They have a plan to flip back all of the seats that won by less than 5% of the vote, which includes mine and Don’s seat.
This is serious, and the sooner we build up both of our campaign funds, the better chance we have to combat their efforts. So do your part to keep both of our seats BLUE by making a split donation today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2303-q1-wn-split?refcode=230302-email]
Thank you so much, team.
Wiley Nickel
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I made their heads spin when I said this!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
But it’s the TRUTH. And I know you agree.
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kEGPgyAQhX8N3jQ6gOjBw3ZNL91ss9vD7q1BGFsaQaNY0_76xabdQEj45vGGN1hluShLLsKKdAWqAKUiU0EKNKUgADgwkWRNyRAkUAWI2AjC0sW4RPdOdvrix9kOieptdK5k2_AsS6UsCyZFygqOjGNDJTY8h9Ckq87eDxOhbwS2YU-o5hGTYDeiXk1WJq8YS4ujUTK-9Mb5uJ2dHqWZjDvFQWSN94hB6lQnCt0KpSlvqchDW0K3s7dHi9rMltAarTQdgXyFUz-PCgNU5iifTEk7SHNygb5ivyq98-h8KBQ8ZQEeXWd0uH4vfDoc7uUsHvBsdAhU7-Xw1aZsf4_GSg-L6Toz5eusTusPHgMKrTrT3ioiNgTg8Q7gMQvYsc3vZ7772dUx_7je4zrnbFmr8B5OfxvwX_p0SZ7JgIj6D6-Rjbk)
---
| | | | | Friend,
---
| I recently said the greatest threat America faces comes from __**within**__ our own country.
---
| That statement made the heads of every fake news reporter and career politician EXPLODE.
---
| _**But I won’t take it back. I stand by it 100%.**_
---
| _An unelected Deep State that can subvert the will of the American people and weaponize the legal system to eliminate its opposition is *the* GREATEST THREAT to our Republic._
---
| **I know I’m not alone in thinking this. That’s why I’m polling voters like YOU to confirm that our COUNTRY agrees!**
---
| **> >Do you agree: The single greatest threat to our Free Republic comes from within our own country?**
---
| [YES, I AGREE WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kEGPgyAQhX8N3jQ6IOjBw3ZND9tNmz3t7qmhMFYaQaPYpv31i6bdQEj45s2DeVhlXJRlLsKKdAWqAKUiU0EKNKUgAHJgIslOJUOQQBUg4kkQlt6MS3TvZKcvfpztkKjeRm0lC8zyTJeFPGUKmUaqeV6UXFGVamRZ1FWt98NE6BuBbdgTqnnEJNiNqBeThckrxtLiaJSML71xPm5mp0dpJuPOcRBZ4z1ikDrViUI3QmmaN1TwsmCEbmdvjxa1mS2hNVppOgJ8gVM_jwoDVOYon0xJO0hzdoG-xn5VeufR-VAo8pQFeHSd0eHa_rKP7R51_bvC1ugwUH2Qw1eTssMjGis93EzXmYkvWZ2XH6wBhac609wrIjYEYO0DWLOAHdv87Pnue1fH-ef1Edc8Z7elCu_h9PcB_6VPl-Q5GRBR_wEhVo3m)
---

| [NO](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9kEGPgyAQhX8N3jR2QMGDh-2aXrrZZg-b7a1BGFoaQaPYpv31i6a7gZDwzZsH87DelLyqCh5XomtQApRKbA050JwCByiA8WzTVgxBAlWAiC0nLL9bn-ney05fwzi7IVO9Sy61yDeaVUznlEKpqtaoyhieb6goJYi2Tbr6EsIwEfpGYBf3hGoeMYt2I-rFZGHyhql0OFol02tvfUjN7PUo7WT9OY0iZ0NAjFKvOi604UrTwlBeVoIRupuDOznUdnaENuik7QiUC5z6eVQYobIn-WJKukHas4_0b-y_Su8D-hALoshZhCffWR2vzri9-G6OrVjhxeo4UHOQw5fJ2eGZjLUe7rbr7FQuWZ2XH6wBxac6ax414VsCsPYBrFnAnm2Pn-X-Z9-kxcftmTZlwe5LFd7jGR4D_ktfLtlrMiC8-QVd1I1s)
---

| _(I might even share the results of our poll when I go on Sean Hannity’s show tonight!)_
---
| I didn’t think it was possible for the swamp to hate me anymore, but my comment really hit a nerve with the Washington ruling class.
---
| But I didn’t run for president to win praise from the Swamp. If I’m DESPISED by the Washington ruling class for telling the TRUTH, then so be it.
---
| _The only support I care about is _YOURS_._
---
| _That’s why I want to know if you agree that the single greatest threat facing America comes from within our own country._

name: Roy Cooper
subject: We have passed Medicaid expansion!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Bipartisanship works.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60831199/398330519/823540626?refcode=ea.76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJkNjM5YS1mMmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uVILOsN6Wsw5-tit944mFzgPaNZJsaY5YF-IeOwUArA=&emci=a6b00314-e8cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
This is a big deal, Peter. I just signed the bill that will expand Medicaid in North Carolina, which will help 600,000 more North Carolinians receive coverage. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60831200/398330520/1500712034?refcode=ea.76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJkNjM5YS1mMmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uVILOsN6Wsw5-tit944mFzgPaNZJsaY5YF-IeOwUArA=&emci=a6b00314-e8cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176) **We’ve worked hard on this for my entire time as governor, and I’m grateful to the advocates across the state who’ve spent years fighting for this:** Child welfare advocates, health care workers, veterans groups, hospitals, people of faith, Care 4 Carolina, and dozens of nonprofit groups, business leaders, sheriffs and local elected officials from both parties who’ve seen the toll of this crisis up close, and uninsured workers who bravely told their personal stories. Thank you to the Democratic legislators and a number of Republican legislators who never wavered in their support for Medicaid expansion. And thank you to the Republican legislative leaders who ultimately approached this issue with a willingness to change their minds to find a solution that worked for North Carolina. Peter, quality health care should be accessible to _all_. Medicaid expansion will help so many more working families, young adults, and other folks living paycheck to paycheck get the care they need. Medicaid expansion will also help save rural hospitals to make sure care is there when and where you need it. It will save our state millions. _It will save lives._ **This is a huge step forward for our state that couldn’t have happened without a whole lot of negotiation and bipartisan cooperation. We proved that when it matters most, Democrats and Republicans can work together to deliver for North Carolinians.** **[Join me in recognizing this historic moment for our state. Add your name next to mine to show your excitement that a deal was finally reached on Medicaid expansion.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60831201/398330521/1500712034?refcode=ea.76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJkNjM5YS1mMmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uVILOsN6Wsw5-tit944mFzgPaNZJsaY5YF-IeOwUArA=&emci=a6b00314-e8cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | ******[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60831202/398330522/1500712034?refcode=ea.76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJkNjM5YS1mMmNjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uVILOsN6Wsw5-tit944mFzgPaNZJsaY5YF-IeOwUArA=&emci=a6b00314-e8cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=76bd639a-f2cc-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)******

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Regulations on AC Units! What's Next?
body:
Biden is a Parody No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-s/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-j/) **Biden is a Parody** Biden felt the wrath of the Twitter ratio**_a_[fter he claimed "MAGA" Republicans want to cut federal funding for border security](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-t/).** **Did you Watch the Trump Rally?** [**Donald Trump denounced "The Biden regime's weaponization of our system of justice"** ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-i/)in Waco, Tex. Saturday with a defiant speech as his potential indictment by a Manhattan grand jury loomed. **[Trump went after DeSantis](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-d/)** and was met with silence. **They're Coming for Your AC Unit** Biden administration issued **[new regulations for window air conditioners and portable air cleaners](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-h/),** seeking to cut air pollution and drive down consumer costs. **They are too Expensive** Biden's campaign for Americans to buy electric vehicles (EVs) rather than fuel-powered cars [**continue to run up against the barrier of the average person's wallet**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-k/)-- a reality highlighted by a new report out of California. **What Does Kamala Do All Day?**
## [**Biden is reportedly irritated with how Vice President Kamala Harris handles her job**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-u/). But who can blame her when she doesn't know what that entails?
**Poor Baby!**
## This is the heartbreaking moment a**[one-year-old Guatemalan boy was dumped at the US border](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-o/) **by a 'coyote' people smuggler.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-x/)!**
* **[Founding members](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-m/).**
* The real-life **[story of Greta](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-c/).**
* When you know you've**[heard this](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-q/) **before.
* Do you know the **[symptoms](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-a/)**?

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-z/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkkjhht-trhiujldw-e/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C

subject: This is it

name: Jon Tester
subject: experts are doubting us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
At the end of the month, our fundraising numbers will go public, and we need to show Republicans we have the power to fight back against their fundraising machine

| Peter,

I just launched my reelection campaign last month, and experts are already doubting my chances.

**They’re calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection next year, and my race is rated as a complete toss-up.** Mitch McConnell and his allies know this, and they’ve already started spending BIG on attack ads against me to tip the scales in their favor.

Look, let’s not beat around the bush — this is 2024’s most important Senate race. If we lose here, we’ll hand the majority back to Mitch McConnell and his obstructionist buddies. You can bet they’ll get right to work rolling back all the progress we’ve made.

I need your support to reach 50,000 contributions before our first ever FEC goal since announcing my reelection campaign.

**At the end of the month, our fundraising numbers will go public, and we need to show Republicans we have the power to fight back against their fundraising machine — and win.**

[_**Can you rush a $5 split donation between BACKROADS PAC and my campaign today to show Mitch McConnell that, despite what the experts might say, this team has what it takes to win?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60831503/398331677/1999187487?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230327-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGQzZDg3MC1mM2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q55Pt4S9Fxcatl8QKt0kMn9eBvzR5lImqgQCee0-atk=)

name: Sen. Chris Murphy
subject: Can you add your name to personally endorse my re-election today? I’d be honored to have your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy
body:
We just launched our re-election campaign, and we are trying to make a big splash in these early days of this race about our grassroots strength.
#

Friends -
I just launched my re-election campaign, and we are trying to make a big splash in the early days of this race about our grassroots strength.
One of the ways we want to do that is to build a list of personal endorsers who back our movement. Your endorsement would mean a lot to me. Knowing I have your support — and the support of Democrats across the country — means we will be ready to take on the challenges ahead.
[**Will you please add your name today to say you personally endorse my re-election campaign? We are looking to have as many people as possible sign up today.**](https://act.chrismurphy.com/signup/em230131_petition/?source=em230327-ob-gm&refcode2=945.1711221.n2Tleg&akid=945%2E1711221%2En2Tleg)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.chrismurphy.com/signup/em230131_petition/?source=em230327-ob-gm&refcode2=945.1711221.n2Tleg&akid=945%2E1711221%2En2Tleg)**
Together, we’ve taken on big fights and won.
We built a movement that beat the gun lobby, and now, the NRA is a shell of what it once was. Last year, we beat Big Pharma and fossil fuel companies to lower prescription drug prices and finally push climate legislation through Congress.
But our work isn’t done, and our victories have put an even bigger target on this seat for the well-funded special interests who want to stop our progress. So I want to make clear to everyone that this team is ready and stronger than ever.
What do you say?
[**Please use this link to add your name to our campaign’s list of personal endorsers. I’d be honored to have your support for my re-election to the U.S. Senate in Connecticut.**](https://act.chrismurphy.com/signup/em230131_petition/?source=em230327-ob-gm&refcode2=945.1711221.n2Tleg&akid=945%2E1711221%2En2Tleg)
This is a small and simple action, but it speaks volumes about the grassroots support for our campaign.
Every best wish,
Chris Murphy
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.chrismurphy.com/signup/em230131_petition/?source=em230327-ob-gm&refcode2=945.1711221.n2Tleg&akid=945%2E1711221%2En2Tleg)**

Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy

PO Box 230987
Hartford, CT 06123

We try to send only the most important info and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.chrismurphy.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=945%2E1711221%2En2Tleg). If you would like to support Senator Murphy's fight for our shared values, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/csm-web?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=945_1711221_n2Tleg&akid=945%2E1711221%2En2Tleg) today.

**Right now,** there are still ten other candidates in this race. Yes, ten candidates! This means it requires a huge amount of resources to break through the noise and communicate with Philly voters in such a crowded primary.
**Right now,** we’re coming down to the wire. There are only 50 days left until Election Day, and the clock is ticking. We’re mobilizing in neighborhoods across the city to rally this coalition around Helen’s vision for a safe, vibrant, thriving Philadelphia.
**And right now,** Helen is the only candidate in this race with a thirty-year track record of facing our city’s biggest challenges head-on and delivering real solutions that improved the lives of everyday Philadelphians. Her bold leadership helped restore nurses and counselors to our public schools, create the city’s first mental health mobile crisis response unit, and guarantee stable schedules for hourly workers.
[**So what do you say? Can Helen count on your contribution before the report goes public?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60831517/398331801/1688789995?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230327_PM3_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODVhOTRjZC1mM2NjLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ymw4M2fyKPAzMUhCPCxLtMMsly7MJwB9cDm_eA7yel8=)
This deadline really is the most important one yet. It’ll be the first time since January that we’ll be able to evaluate the fundraising strength of the other campaigns. Let’s make sure we have the strongest possible number to report so it’s clear to everyone that our people-powered movement can go the distance.
We appreciate your support.
— Team Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. clean_body: Our biggest reporting deadline of this race so far is 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT, and we’re just $429 shy of our $10,000 goal. | = We’ll get straight to it — Our biggest reporting deadline of this race so far is 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT, and we’re just $429 shy of our $10,000 goal. Will you make a contribution right now? We’ll share in a minute why your contribution is crucial. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Right now, there are still ten other candidates in this race. Yes, ten candidates! This means it requires a huge amount of resources to break through the noise and communicate with Philly voters in such a crowded primary. Right now, we’re coming down to the wire. There are only 50 days left until Election Day, and the clock is ticking. We’re mobilizing in neighborhoods across the city to rally this coalition around Helen’s vision for a safe, vibrant, thriving Philadelphia. And right now, Helen is the only candidate in this race with a thirty-year track record of facing our city’s biggest challenges head-on and delivering real solutions that improved the lives of everyday Philadelphians. Her bold leadership helped restore nurses and counselors to our public schools, create the city’s first mental health mobile crisis response unit, and guarantee stable schedules for hourly workers. = This deadline really is the most important one yet. It’ll be the first time since January that we’ll be able to evaluate the fundraising strength of the other campaigns. Let’s make sure we have the strongest possible number to report so it’s clear to everyone that our people-powered movement can go the distance. We appreciate your support. — Team Helen Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. body:
We're in this righteous fight together, and your support right now will truly make all the difference. | |
---
I’m making it official today, Derek, and I wanted you to hear it from me: **I’m running for reelection to the U.S. Senate next year.** Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One: **[Derek, can you split a donation right now to support my reelection campaign and the work that the DNC is doing? [ Donate another amount ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZj53HcbokGe87JuFmYN3tdMaTRK0BTJaOLRXjC9sSXYYKQ80HpM9P08q1PVeVGDIj51L4UG5blGDOpXng24vCm6ju9tbY3aD5juH1XeSCa8ZXsNarPNTs7wmNN2zw9dFzgwHl10aR7eRpSG6cdu4h3h4Cl79_7_96hQy2PkhW9jeXWUxwA9FrAPz3Gr7Uuu5L5ycLyhxzz2XPkluBnpX9_ySqaXYPrQGgEC8b-8oHNWxz67qRKs-y0D7B3FToxOwxN1r3D7peVB7_S4An6cmHKGsoj1YciHuNaQoklpIl6I0RM6diYMLh-mZeHYOOGJSd8wy4_ZsFx7mgslhTCfBFlksoYjxRoKsEsnhH_JKDZhPUOdBPMXzOtcrEHfeqFP0/3uu/UMzAnatRSsqwPV0IzBKVSA/h6/WqIy04_nzb3cf1P0QMai3ev5wL3Cp6G0qWRGD5NGKGI)
** ** **** ** I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including:
* Getting student loan debt cancellation to President Biden’s desk
* Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits
* Lowering the cost of hearing aids and insulin
* Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal

Now I’m running for reelection because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top. **We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change.** [**Please make a contribution to support my reelection campaign and the DNC today, if you can. Every contribution, no matter how big or small, adds up and helps show that there’s strong support for our plans and our values. Side by side, let’s rebuild the middle class, root corruption out of Washington, and strengthen our democracy by electing Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZj53HcbokGe87JuFmYN3tdMaTRK0BTJaOLRXjC9sSXYYKQ80HpM9P08q1PVeVGDIj51L4UG5blGDOpXng24vCm6ju9tbY3aD5juH1XeSCa0nY2Re6kKbjPJOln7KsL38BaSOUtVXXE9nrPotrrpSbYVWi_7232dz3b8wCxiY2lmr6aiqwCHMVyOtYQRyX5mxJgfzRMyCYa50swByryGRxVW7sGmdV4ihUnfXKiTeyhJbhmdjN7bswNhr7X7hU0yAsfU25NAPSv4r3NRvJhkZU8eGvr7KKEn8sNfMWOJXhdnAubENFvDjShql6PA6B7PmCAYWgkjnOhKPOradjdsUMDByrizCM-hAt-WbPyo-3weUgwmsEcewNG40igULk8I4/3uu/UMzAnatRSsqwPV0IzBKVSA/h7/XzCmqZQ9LPq6tRI3TcY-C97WtgSKWj9s8ajvJyKiWzs) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Elizabeth Warren
U.S. Senator, Massachusetts
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zZj53HcbokGe87JuFmYN3tdMaTRK0BTJaOLRXjC9sSXYYKQ80HpM9P08q1PVeVGDIj51L4UG5blGDOpXng24vCm6ju9tbY3aD5juH1XeSCaweCGrnmDbGHl6UGS6Gjt3bcKB_jkpziUYvUVT4xc2mzZImJf64o2vP1ajjjNfN68oEymAmDAWCLQuj9kZi1BGInUImaLqXwCDAkcgZiO8aLgdppiNsyS09Ta1zjK2NmL8-KghODu3za9uZDGiUezTz3RlWKeEcehmXQ_oo-Qr1eXyRRtHTJIPojMlFoTysIgERUCdtLJd1OQpWGEEC-U8-K2AyvCej6miolGrTrqyATWNrMcmNmm-09j7m-212tUT4CJgevQgy-7klpntsDif8/3uu/UMzAnatRSsqwPV0IzBKVSA/h8/73y-1jVcWQcIesbPdvTeT6oZOul69Hnvp1X6_5homvY)

The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. clean_body: We're in this righteous fight together, and your support right now will truly make all the difference. | | I’m making it official today, Derek, and I wanted you to hear it from me: I’m running for reelection to the U.S. Senate next year. Together, we’ve won some big battles for working families across the country. But there’s plenty more to do. So I’m staying in the fight. And I’m asking if you’ll be a part of this new campaign from Day One: I first ran for Senate because I saw how the system is rigged for the wealthy and well-connected and against everyone else. I won because Massachusetts voters know it too. And even though we’ve been up against powerful forces, the past ten years have shown us that when we organize, fight righteous fights, and hold those in power accountable, we can make positive change, including: Getting student loan debt cancellation to President Biden’s desk Passing a new tax on massive corporate profits Lowering the cost of hearing aids and insulin Pressuring Wells Fargo executives into resigning after their fake accounts scandal Now I’m running for reelection because there’s a lot more we’ve got to do. Make child care affordable. Ensure the right to an abortion. Protect consumers from big banks. Make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top. We’re going to build this new campaign the same way we’ve built all our campaigns: from the grassroots level. Because with a grassroots-funded movement, we can fight back against extremist Republicans and powerful interests who use their deep pockets to try to block change. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Elizabeth Warren U.S. Senator, Massachusetts The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Josh
subject: a major decision
body:
Hi All - I just got out of a meeting with my campaign team and wanted to share a few takeaways with you.
Hi All -
I just got out of a meeting with my campaign team and wanted to share a few takeaways with you.
**Where we stand:** This Friday is our first end-of-quarter deadline of this campaign. Right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. If you can afford to donate right now, here is the [link](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60832065/398333675/-1774127304?refcode=E20743-20230327-PersonalEOQ-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RiMjc4YTMtZjdjYy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1uW2g7XesXOYr759Z0ISTIRQqvAkn6AJiXujvC-z8k0=).
**Why this goal matters:** As you know, this goal is a big deal because if our fundraising numbers are low, it sends a bright flashing light to our brand new GOP opponent and to national Republicans that we’re in trouble. It also directly impacts some big budget decisions we have coming up.
**What decisions we need to make:** One of our strategic advantages last cycle was how early we invested in grassroots organizing. It meant we spoke to voters, especially our latino voters, early and often (and in-language). I absolutely want to make that early field investment again. However, all that hiring revolves around if we hit this end of quarter goal.
**Other considerations:** Outside money is always a huge threat in this toss-up seat. We have to have the budget to match the Republicans dollar for dollar in fundraising in order to combat their onslaught of ads. If they spend $500,000 on attack ads against me, we have to spend $500,000 back. It’s that simple.
**What I need from this team:** Well, I need your help hitting tonight's fundraising goal! If we fall short, the GOP will have a huge advantage because we won’t be able to get our field organizing started or have enough resources to fight back against negative ads.
That’s why I’m asking you to please send in the biggest donation you possibly can right now. It’s the only thing that’s going to help us come out on top.

Hi All - I just got out of a meeting with my campaign team and wanted to share a few takeaways with you. Where we stand: This Friday is our first end-of-quarter deadline of this campaign. Right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. If you can afford to donate right now, here is the =. Why this goal matters: As you know, this goal is a big deal because if our fundraising numbers are low, it sends a bright flashing light to our brand new GOP opponent and to national Republicans that we’re in trouble. It also directly impacts some big budget decisions we have coming up. What decisions we need to make: One of our strategic advantages last cycle was how early we invested in grassroots organizing. It meant we spoke to voters, especially our latino voters, early and often (and in-language). I absolutely want to make that early field investment again. However, all that hiring revolves around if we hit this end of quarter goal. Other considerations: Outside money is always a huge threat in this toss-up seat. We have to have the budget to match the Republicans dollar for dollar in fundraising in order to combat their onslaught of ads. If they spend $500,000 on attack ads against me, we have to spend $500,000 back. It’s that simple. What I need from this team: Well, I need your help hitting tonight's fundraising goal! If we fall short, the GOP will have a huge advantage because we won’t be able to get our field organizing started or have enough resources to fight back against negative ads. That’s why I’m asking you to please send in the biggest donation you possibly can right now. It’s the only thing that’s going to help us come out on top. body:
Here’s what we have on file for you:
#
Hey Peter,
Our very first end-of-quarter deadline is less than one week away, so we wanted to give you a quick look at your 2023 supporter record:
**_Peter's Team Kunce Supporter Record_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2023 Donor:** No — not yet! **Suggested Donation: $10** **[CHIP IN $10 NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29944?refcode=em20230327-2884&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2884%2E614464%2EPOcOf8)**
---
This is our first real opportunity to show voters, the media, and even our opponent the sheer amount of people-power behind Lucas Kunce + his campaign to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.
But if we’re going to hit Lucas’ goal of raising 30,000 individual donations before March 31 + prove the strength of our movement to everyone watching our race, we need help from supporters like you before it’s too late. **So Peter:**
**[Will you add a donation of $10 or anything you can afford to our campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce right now? body:
I just launched my reelection campaign last month, and experts are already doubting my chances.

| Peter,

I just launched my reelection campaign last month, and experts are already doubting my chances.

**They’re calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection next year, and my race is rated as a complete toss-up.** Mitch McConnell and his allies know this, and they’ve already started spending BIG on attack ads against me to tip the scales in their favor.

Look, let’s not beat around the bush — this is 2024’s most important Senate race. If we lose here, we’ll hand the majority back to Mitch McConnell and his obstructionist buddies. You can bet they’ll get right to work rolling back all the progress we’ve made.

I need your support to reach 50,000 contributions before our first ever FEC goal since announcing my reelection campaign.

**At the end of the month, all of our fundraising numbers will go public, and we need to show Republicans we have the power to fight back against their fundraising machine — and win.**
